| | Gun violence, reproductive health care access, and climate change were among the top priorities of respondents like you. [**Do these priorities align with your own?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59062122/393073468/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk978-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzgzMDhkYS00M2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQ0EC_VQwjbGIYXkkLVJjpXLj6UbvligyOi9wOrVHks=&emci=9ac8c19b-03af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=7c8308da-43b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=25369504)

| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59062126/393073471/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk978-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzgzMDhkYS00M2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQ0EC_VQwjbGIYXkkLVJjpXLj6UbvligyOi9wOrVHks=&emci=9ac8c19b-03af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=7c8308da-43b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, my team just finished compiling our first round of survey results, and I’m excited to share them with you.

But first, I wanted to write you a quick note of appreciation for participating in my February Priorities Survey. When I became New York’s first Black attorney general, I knew that my historic accomplishment would mean _nothing_ if I didn’t use my post to fight for families and neighborhoods like my own.

**And thanks to all of the folks who took 90 seconds out of their day to respond to my priorities survey, now I _can_ fight for the things that matter most to everyday, working Americans.

Now, let’s take a look at the things that matter most to you and your loved ones:**
Overwhelmingly, respondents from across the country said that their top three priorities were: preventing **gun violence** _(78% of respondents said this was a top priority) , _expanding _ _**reproductive health care access** _(71% of respondents said this was a top priority)_ , and reversing **climate change** _(64% of respondents said this was a top priority)._
It makes sense why these are the top priorities for so many people. Around the nation, loved ones are still dying from gun violence, millions of people are without access to reproductive health care, and climate change is wreaking havoc on communities.

But every day, I’m fighting to change those realities. In my first term as attorney general, I took gun manufacturers and sellers to court for their roles in the gun violence epidemic, I took legal action to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking abortion, and I held Big Polluters accountable for harming the environment.

**Peter, I hope I’ve been able to emphasize how important these surveys are to my work and how much I appreciate every single response I receive. [If you haven’t had the chance to fill out my priorities survey, this is the best link to fill out your responses. The survey will only be open for ONE more day. Take action now before it locks at 11:59 p.m. tonight!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59062128/393073476/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk978-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzgzMDhkYS00M2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQ0EC_VQwjbGIYXkkLVJjpXLj6UbvligyOi9wOrVHks=&emci=9ac8c19b-03af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=7c8308da-43b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59062130/393073478/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk978-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzgzMDhkYS00M2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQ0EC_VQwjbGIYXkkLVJjpXLj6UbvligyOi9wOrVHks=&emci=9ac8c19b-03af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=7c8308da-43b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=25369504)

workers and our right to form unions.

couldn’t be more proud of our founder.

name: Team Cori
subject: How you can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
February may be a short month, but our bills and budget stay the same.
#
This month is unique.
At the beginning of every month, I look at our monthly costs to keep our people-powered campaign running and figure out how much money we need to raise each day in order to cover that month’s bills.
But with February being 2-3 days shorter than the average month, it changes how we approach our fundraising and budgeting. Even though February is a shorter month, our operating costs stay the same amount.
And right now, we are not on track to hit our monthly budget goal by February 28. **[Can you rush a donation today to help us make up for this short month and keep our movement on track?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230221.1YfAem&refcode=em20230221-2215&t=1&akid=2215%2E1082990%2EbBRi65)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230221.1YfAem&amount=5&refcode=em20230221-2215&t=20&akid=2215%2E1082990%2EbBRi65)**
When we have monthly deadlines like this, we are depending on grassroots donors like you — because Cori and our team takes $0 from corporate PACs, lobbyists, and billionaires.
You can count on us to always be a people-powered, grassroots campaign and will never accept a dime from those corporate PACs. That’s why I’m reaching out to you, on behalf of Team Cori. We need your support in the shortest month of the year.
[**Can you join fellow Democrats and progressives across the country by rushing a $5 donation today?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230221.1YfAem&amount=5&refcode=em20230221-2215&t=21&akid=2215%2E1082990%2EbBRi65)
Thanks for your continued support,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230221?refcode=em20230221-2215-footer&t=22&refcode2=2215_1082990_bBRi65&akid=2215%2E1082990%2EbBRi65) **

Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

name: Rick Scott
subject: They’re lying about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | **This month, Joe Biden traveled to Florida and continued to spread lies about me.**

__Peter, I’m used to having radical Democrats like Joe Biden go after me - but right now, I’m facing attacks from ALL sides of Washington for standing up to the establishment._ _

Between Mitch McConnell REMOVING me from my committee assignment and Joe Biden’s lies, I have blows coming from all angles.

clean_body: Election forecasters and pundits are calling the 2024 Senate map a tough one for Democrats — but we proved last year that we can overcome the odds when we unite voters around our shared priorities. From the urgency of climate change to relentless right-wing attacks on reproductive rights, it’s important to remind voters that there’s too much at stake to lose our Senate majority. While Martin fights in the Senate to pass legislation that puts people and our planet first, our campaign is building up resources to defend the Senate in 2024. Will you pitch in $20.24 — or any amount — to fuel this critical work? | | = | = Democrats are defending 23 out of the 33 Senate seats up for re-election — including Martin’s. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: What the Star Tribune Said About Us
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_talking_about_us&n=1)
---
Peter \-- One thing is certain: When we put pressure on politicians, it works!!! **That's why the Star Tribune published an article last weekend[mentioning us by name](https://www.action4liberty.com/democrat_anti_free_speech_bill_targets_action_4_liberty_star_tribune_writes?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_talking_about_us&n=2)! The story was about the Radical Democrats newest anti-free speech bill that seeks to SILENCE us.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/democrat_anti_free_speech_bill_targets_action_4_liberty_star_tribune_writes?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_talking_about_us&n=3) Democrats are on the attack against groups like ours because we **create political pain for politicians** voting against your liberty. In fact, they came after us with a Campaign Finance Board complaint in 2021 when there was no election, no campaign and no candidates. All we are doing is voicing our opinion on important political matters with the voting public. That's Free Speech 101! Make no mistake about it - this is an assault on SPEECH - not campaign transparency. Right now they are crafting legislation to STOP us from being able to be your voice in Minnesota. Let's be honest, it's not really Action 4 Liberty that they want to silence... **IT'S YOU!!!** As they were inking our names in the liberal paper, we had door knocking teams on the ground in the north metro holding Democrats accountable. We did this because you spoke LOUD & CLEAR that you want to hold Democrats like Politician Matt Norris accountable for their radical votes. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_talking_about_us&n=4) This is what we do at Action 4 Liberty. We hit politicians where it hurts by taking our message directly to their voters. Someone has got to get the message out about their globalist, radical left-wing agenda because you and I both know, the corporate media won't do the job. **And Big Tech social media companies do their best to shadow ban our content online.** Right now, Radical Democrats are debating HF4 on the Senate floor that would give state issued driver's licenses to illegal aliens. There will be no identifying feature to state that the individual is a non-voting citizen, because, you know, that would create an undesirable stigma.
## THIS IS INSANITY!!!
People who broke our laws and are now being rewarded. But none of this comes as a surprise at this point. Like me, I'm sure you are starting to see how radical the Democrat agenda has become. And the worst is yet to come... Democrats have introduced an Anti-Gun Omnibus bill that would make people like you and me FELONS for owning common sportsman firearms and magazines!!!! On top of that, their crazy, radical anti-gun bill would also create a state run gun registry and license system. We simply can't let this become law! But I'm afraid all of this globalist, radical left-wing agenda will pass if we don't STAND UP right now and ramp up the pressure on vulnerable Democrat politicians. I need your help to make this possible. **Please RUSH in a donation to help us increase our pressure****campaign IMMEDIATELY!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_talking_about_us&n=5 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_talking_about_us&n=5)
---
The Star Tribune article shows just how effective we are in the political arena.
Democrats are targeting us because they know exactly what impact we had when we launched our massive 2021 doorknocking operations.
We had **7 targets** and **three of them quit** and didn't run for re-election last year.
**Two of the remaining targets got beat** in the November election.
The last two who held on, are already voting with Republicans on some issues because they don't want to have a similar fate as the others.
## PRESSURE WORKS!
Peter, I beg you to help us fully fund our pressure campaign so we can STOP the Democrats from getting their who radical agenda passed into law.
We're at the end of February and these bills are moving through committees at lightening speed.
**We don't have much time.**
Listen, I could send you an email asking you to drive up to the Iron Range or the North Dakota border to door knock for the next week. But I'm sure that's not in the cards with your busy schedule.
I know how to hire young liberty professionals who are capable of doing this work on your behalf. So can you please help me fund this operation!
**_Instead of giving four hours of your time to door knocking, consider giving four hours of your wages to this effort. It will make all the difference!_**
The Anti-gun Omnibus bill that would make you and me FELONS is making its way through the legislature, along with a long list of other radical bills.
We CAN'T LET THIS PASS!
Help me put the door knocking teams together IMMEDIATELY!
[**Please help me by donating $25, $50, $100 or even $200. Or if you want to make a MASSIVE IMPACT, sponsor a door knocker for a week at $1,250 (fuel, lodging and pay).**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_talking_about_us&n=6)
Thank you in advance!
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_talking_about_us&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Twitter](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNMKEFqgeopFpxY5QWaZ2_87o0uGazOuSpJ71QL9z0kyC&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_talking_about_us&n=8) or [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_talking_about_us&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_talking_about_us&n=10), software for leaders.

Let's be honest, it's not really Action 4 Liberty that they want to silence... IT'S YOU!!! As they were inking our names in the liberal paper, we had door knocking teams on the ground in the north metro holding Democrats accountable. We did this because you spoke LOUD & CLEAR that you want to hold Democrats like Politician Matt Norris accountable for their radical votes. This is what we do at Action 4 Liberty. We hit politicians where it hurts by taking our message directly to their voters. Someone has got to get the message out about their globalist, radical left-wing agenda because you and I both know, the corporate media won't do the job. And Big Tech social media companies do their best to shadow ban our content online. Right now, Radical Democrats are debating HF4 on the Senate floor that would give state issued driver's licenses to illegal aliens. There will be no identifying feature to state that the individual is a non-voting citizen, because, you know, that would create an undesirable stigma. THIS IS INSANITY!!! People who broke our laws and are now being rewarded. But none of this comes as a surprise at this point. Like me, I'm sure you are starting to see how radical the Democrat agenda has become. And the worst is yet to come... Democrats have introduced an Anti-Gun Omnibus bill that would make people like you and me FELONS for owning common sportsman firearms and magazines!!!! On top of that, their crazy, radical anti-gun bill would also create a state run gun registry and license system. We simply can't let this become law! But I'm afraid all of this globalist, radical left-wing agenda will pass if we don't STAND UP right now and ramp up the pressure on vulnerable Democrat politicians. I need your help to make this possible. Please RUSH in a donation to help us increase our pressurecampaign IMMEDIATELY! | "Donate" The Star Tribune article shows just how effective we are in the political arena. Democrats are targeting us because they know exactly what impact we had when we launched our massive 2021 doorknocking operations. We had 7 targets and three of them quit and didn't run for re-election last year. Two of the remaining targets got beat in the November election. The last two who held on, are already voting with Republicans on some issues because they don't want to have a similar fate as the others. PRESSURE WORKS! Peter, I beg you to help us fully fund our pressure campaign so we can STOP the Democrats from getting their who radical agenda passed into law. We're at the end of February and these bills are moving through committees at lightening speed. We don't have much time. Listen, I could send you an email asking you to drive up to the Iron Range or the North Dakota border to door knock for the next week. But I'm sure that's not in the cards with your busy schedule. I know how to hire young liberty professionals who are capable of doing this work on your behalf. So can you please help me fund this operation! Instead of giving four hours of your time to door knocking, consider giving four hours of your wages to this effort. It will make all the difference! The Anti-gun Omnibus bill that would make you and me FELONS is making its way through the legislature, along with a long list of other radical bills. We CAN'T LET THIS PASS! Help me put the door knocking teams together IMMEDIATELY! Thank you in advance! In Liberty, ** Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59063535/393099916/-784029614?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2289-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDA0MWVlLTRjYjItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V17wS0gPozQhnnnGxgQSTJfEO7Vqnkg7ZsMHX6FbXUs=)

Hello,

**I am officially running again against Lauren Boebert!**

In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the __entire__ country. Now, I’m running again to finish the job, but I need you with me from day one:

[**Please, will you make a donation now – split between my campaign and American Bridge PAC – and become a Founding Donor to my 2024 campaign to defeat Boebert?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59063536/393099917/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2289-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDA0MWVlLTRjYjItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V17wS0gPozQhnnnGxgQSTJfEO7Vqnkg7ZsMHX6FbXUs=)
No one believed we could pull it off in 2022. All of the pundits said Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District was a “Safe Republican” seat. The national Democrats and the national Republicans wrote us off.

But we proved them all wrong.

With Lauren Boebert now on notice, this campaign is going to get even nastier. Her super PACs and supporters are going to spin lie after lie against me on TV. **I’m counting on you to be able to correct the record and hold Boebert accountable.**
**[No amount is too small: Click here now and make a donation to my campaign and American Bridge PAC of whatever you can afford today. It’s important that we have as strong of an early showing as possible.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59063537/393099918/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2289-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDA0MWVlLTRjYjItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V17wS0gPozQhnnnGxgQSTJfEO7Vqnkg7ZsMHX6FbXUs=)**

name: Rep. Barbara Lee
subject: I'm officially announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| | Hello,

**My name is Barbara Lee. I'm a proven progressive champion – and today, I'm officially announcing my candidacy for the U.S. Senate.** | [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40851?t=6&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF)
---|---
Right now, there are no Black women serving in the Senate, and in our nearly 250-year history, only two Black women have held Senate seats. I'm running to change that, and I’m so grateful to have the support of Voter Protection Project, but I need to know you're with me in this fight too.
[**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the first donors to my campaign by splitting $10 or more between my campaign and Voter Protection Project right now. Every dollar will help me build a broad coalition of supporters and secure a progressive future for all.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40851?t=7&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF)
I grew up in the segregated South – where my mother was denied admission to the hospital while in labor because of the color of her skin. When they finally did let her in, the situation was so dire that they had to perform an emergency forceps delivery. I wear those scars to this day. A world of racism and ignorance gave me that mark, but it’s driven me to leave my mark on our country.

That's why doing nothing has never been an option for me. When my high school said cheerleaders couldn’t be Black, I worked with the NAACP, and earned my spot as the school’s first black cheerleader. When there weren’t protections for victims of domestic violence, I wrote California’s first Violence Against Women Act. And in the aftermath of the 9/11 attacks, I stood alone as the sole member of Congress to vote against the Afghanistan War, because I knew endless wars were not the solution.

The fight for justice has never left me, even to this day. Now, I'm ready to take that fight to the Senate. **My lived experience as a Black woman making true progressive change for Californians will give a voice in the U.S. Senate to those who are currently voiceless.**

**But this isn't going to be an easy fight. Analysts at The Washington Post are already saying that I'm at a fundraising disadvantage in this race. I won't let that stop me, and I know you won't either.**
**That's why I'm personally asking:[Will you split $10 or more between me and Voter Protection Project before midnight tonight to join this team, kickstart my campaign for Senate and help me build a progressive future for all?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40851?t=8&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Barbara Lee and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40852?t=9&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40853?t=10&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40854?t=11&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40855?t=12&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40856?t=13&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF)
Thank you for being on my team. I can't win without you.

– Barbara Lee
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=6437%2E878179%2EsHifJF)

name: Leah Donahey, LCV
subject: [ TAKE ACTION ] It's not too late to tell the Biden administration to reject the Willow oil drilling project.
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcYAj36h~/MTVEWUJoT1EzVWprcnJwVHdkck1xY2RjSGtzUVRuYVNDNkZpd1YwT2tWN3RwUk95elVCeW5oK05BWTg2UkxZMzlJL0FYcUVubkRiaFdtUW9UM0dMZkRDRlN5QmYxTzhlaFNYdGlYR2xZOVE9S0/SktndnVJaXN5YWRMVXRpVjRZeStTM01ZWkU4N3dFc1FNVGFjY2tZaEpjMFBpWXYvQ2lHc1B5WmtaSU8yc2dIR3o4K0lSWHkzYk8zZEY5c0xaQ09tTmlOamZtcHAxMzV6S0

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director

clean_body: Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA: PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur. Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again. GOAL: 5,000 actions TAKE ACTION ? ? ? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents. This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health. Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces. Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks. But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers. Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters. Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters. Sincerely, Madeleine Foote Deputy Legislative Director League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? body:
Oregon is ranked the worst in the nation for... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6e726ade7403/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8117383?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=25f40fb375&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,
_**Oregon is currently ranked the worst in the nation for drug problems, with drug use at number 1 and drug treatment at number 50.**_
_The root of the problem starts at our southern border,_

Open border policies and lack of leadership have allowed drugs like fentanyl to enter our communities and destroy lives.

I know the devastating impact drugs like fentanyl can have on families and communities. I am fighting to **secure our border** and prevent these dangerous drugs from entering our state and our nation.

_But I can't do this alone,__Peter_ _!_

[_**With your help, I know that we can make a difference and secure our border. Together, we can create a safer and healthier Oregon for our families and future generations. >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=8e955b16ac&e=c87c5d8d97)

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Will you make a $10 donation to the DNC to renew your 2023 membership? When you do, you will receive your own personalized Official 2023 DNC Membership Card in the mail.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. | |
---
This grassroots team has helped make immense progress for the American people. In 2022, we capped the price of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare, made the largest investment in climate in a generation, passed the most significant gun violence reduction legislation in the last 30 years, protected same-sex marriage through federal law, invested in the removal of lead pipes, expanded health care for veterans, and so much more. We have a lot to be proud of, but there’s still more to do this year. Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. **[Will you make a $10 donation to the DNC to renew your membership? clean_body: Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. | | This grassroots team has helped make immense progress for the American people. In 2022, we capped the price of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare, made the largest investment in climate in a generation, passed the most significant gun violence reduction legislation in the last 30 years, protected same-sex marriage through federal law, invested in the removal of lead pipes, expanded health care for veterans, and so much more. We have a lot to be proud of, but there’s still more to do this year. Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. As the only party organization responsible for electing Democrats from the school board to the Senate, the DNC powers critical programs that help to protect our fundamental rights, hold the GOP accountable, and provide Democratic candidates nationwide with the resources necessary to win. Last November’s midterms were only the most recent step in our work to pass the Biden-Harris agenda and lower costs for working families. The DNC is already making critical investments in organizing and voter protection efforts that Democrats will rely on to win in the years to come, but they need your support. We appreciate all of your hard work. It means so much. Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. | | Don't you agree that this is the pro-freedom fighter we need working for us in the Oval Office? [**If you 're ready to have Ron DeSantis fighting for you as Commander in Chief, click here to contribute to READY FOR RON and join the grassroots movement of Americans drafting DeSantis to run for President.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62348893:Jf3ej7GNy:m:1:3331421248:C446A01DECB9D3D29EDF9FB96B6CB3C9:r) After three years of failure, criminal negligence, and weak leadership under Joe Biden, it's time for America to elect a PROVEN and SUCCESSFUL fighter with a track record of taking on our culture war's biggest battles... and winning. But to do that, Ron DeSantis needs a massive, nationwide grassroots movement of patriots behind him to launch a record-smashing bid for President. **And he needs a historic war chest because you know that Disney and the woke elite he 's defeated are going to retaliate against his campaign for President and spend BILLIONS of dollars to stop him.** That's why he needs the financial support of patriots like you to serve as the backbone of a campaign that will ultimately culminate in Ron DeSantis taking the oath of office as the 47th President of the United States of America. **Will you support Ron DeSantis today?** [**Please click here to contribute to READY FOR RON and join the grassroots movement of Americans drafting DeSantis to run for President.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62348893:Jf3ej7GNy:m:1:3331421248:C446A01DECB9D3D29EDF9FB96B6CB3C9:r)

Ready for Ron

**Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.**

Majid Khan worked directly for al-Qaeda senior leader Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who planned the deadly September 11th terrorist attacks.

Khan has been moved to Central America.

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there.

**What 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! **

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either won't flush or repeatedly explode in cells
* Stuck in cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for over a year and a half...up to two years...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

As you know, I'm fighting to free the January 6 Peaceful Protesters through two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions.

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[ **Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you 've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch. ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62348891:JjwzN7GNS:m:1:3331421248:DE1ED3C873444566F022B3C344BB14E7:r)

I can't do it without you.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Joe Biden just let a top 9-11 terrorist out of prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ... while peaceful, innocent Americans are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. ** These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!

| I’m no stranger to disgusting attacks from CNN.

Two years ago, liberal anchor Jake Tapper went in front of his large audience and made me his personal target, questioning my commitment to Democracy and trying to make me the next target of the Left’s cancel culture.

| [JOIN ME: HELP US STAND UP TO CNN!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3ubit2nmsfrt3k0i6hbf5pjb27u1jle7208fi1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1hmcor6c9h2bs "JOIN ME: HELP US STAND UP TO CNN!")

| And, Friend, I may have lost two legs for Jake’s right to say whatever the hell he wants... but I knew that he couldn’t have been further from the truth. **I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0keetnphdkaic1o66qtmjepdri9m7btulu8s1og_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1hmaob4cth2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

# God’s timing is perfect, isn’t it?
And here’s something we want you to know: Hollywood is watching. **JESUS REVOLUTION** opens in theaters nationwide this week—just as revival is breaking out at Asbury University, capturing national attention! Something big is happening. And we invite you to be part of it. We know that it’s easy to wait for a film to be on streaming platforms. We know that you may not have been back to the theaters since 2019. **We’re asking you to make this film your return—on opening weekend.** A film's audience on opening weekend signals to the theaters that people are hungry for these uplifting stories. Join the movement with thousands of Christians around the nation who are praying for revival and pledging to show up in person **on February 24**. Your presence will make all the difference. This is more than a film. It's an invitation. And we can’t wait to see you at the theaters. [GET TICKETS HERE](http://click1.srnemail.com/jnjnvmzzvptwppkzwttdbwfpcvwqmccprmdkcrtjrrrnsn_nrtppttftyfknqprrwrttww.html)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I'm excited to share this with you
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=746c8a2a56bc7b2d8970e2c1f796ab14328d3b1af71347fc1eac3a1fe73379708bcda4d76f296a536faf6e0d17bf0868096949d6548ef75d6f87de6ffa9641f8172fda3fc9f4236e67445e2fd757a550

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8557c1ff6053b4bf91313d4fcff299329e14f8ec3a9ecff26527dc1ff3721d958568f0f5bf5dce39a7d55debd570b42c9f4e7f70338090fb38341be2d76e5597

I’ve set aside a few copies of my new book, “The Courage to Be Free: Florida’s Blueprint for America’s Revival”
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8557c1ff6053b4bf91313d4fcff299329e14f8ec3a9ecff26527dc1ff3721d958568f0f5bf5dce39a7d55debd570b42c9f4e7f70338090fb38341be2d76e5597
and I want YOU to have a chance to win a signed edition.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8557c1ff6053b4bf91313d4fcff299329e14f8ec3a9ecff26527dc1ff3721d958568f0f5bf5dce39a7d55debd570b42c9f4e7f70338090fb38341be2d76e5597

We established a blueprint for governance in Florida that is producing tangible results and serving as a rebuke to the failed policies of entrenched elites who have driven our nation into the ground.

Florida is a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world.

Most importantly, Florida is proof positive that We, The People, are not powerless in the face of these elites.

My book provides behind-the-scenes details of my battle-tested blueprint for America’s revival, along with personal stories that have shaped who I am today.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8557c1ff6053b4bf91313d4fcff299329e14f8ec3a9ecff26527dc1ff3721d958568f0f5bf5dce39a7d55debd570b42c9f4e7f70338090fb38341be2d76e5597
>>"> ENTER NOW FOR A CHANCE TO WIN A SIGNED COPY >>>

In Florida, we created a blueprint for success — and, with it, proven the underlying principles of governance that we believe can restore and revive American greatness.

It’s critical that we reach as many Americans as possible with this message, so I hope that you will read the book, and share your thoughts about it with friends, family, and colleagues.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8557c1ff6053b4bf91313d4fcff299329e14f8ec3a9ecff26527dc1ff3721d958568f0f5bf5dce39a7d55debd570b42c9f4e7f70338090fb38341be2d76e5597
>>">Enter now for your chance to win a signed copy of my book by following this secure link. >>>

Sincerely,

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8557c1ff6053b4bf91313d4fcff299329e14f8ec3a9ecff26527dc1ff3721d958568f0f5bf5dce39a7d55debd570b42c9f4e7f70338090fb38341be2d76e5597
ENTER NOW

Sponsored by Friends of Ron DeSantis.

Hi , The [ _American Home Defense Foundation_](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11677/6374453/e684279cc1cdf87a8d0819fcd932b4ea738d3eb5/e3923e7f36c19cc43bf35988816b21aa99c33e84)is giving a **[FREE](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11677/6374453/e684279cc1cdf87a8d0819fcd932b4ea738d3eb5/e3923e7f36c19cc43bf35988816b21aa99c33e84) High-Powered Gun Magnet** to 200 American families. We have a free gun magnet reserved in your name and we would like to ship it out to you right now. Normally these gun magnets cost $29.99 each and can be installed literally anywhere in your home... But you can get one for FREE today! Your free gun magnet is currently on hold. Click the link below to give us permission to drop this in the mail and send it to you: [**> > ****Yes! You Have Permission To Send My FREE High-Powered Gun Magnet**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11677/6374453/e684279cc1cdf87a8d0819fcd932b4ea738d3eb5/e3923e7f36c19cc43bf35988816b21aa99c33e84) No Trials, No Hidden Fees, No Strings Attached! These magnets are capable of holding up to 25 LB’s on your ceiling! But most people use them to stash their firearm...
* In their car...
* Under their desk...
* Under their bed...
* Behind their nightstand...
* On the back of their door...

I even installed one by my toilet so no one can sneak up on me while I’m doing my business... That’s how John Travolta’s character died in the movie Pulp Fiction! You can install these magnets literally anywhere... But remember – the _American Home Defense Foundation_ is only giving away 200 magnets. If you don’t want one... Or if you don’t claim it in the **next 24 hours** ... This offer will be sent to someone else. American gun owners should have a dozen of these magnets in their homes and vehicles... And if you’ve never used a gun magnet... Today’s your chance to get one for FREE! [**> > Your****Free Gun Magnet – Click To Claim**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11677/6374453/e684279cc1cdf87a8d0819fcd932b4ea738d3eb5/e3923e7f36c19cc43bf35988816b21aa99c33e84) Remember, only 200 magnets are being given away... And you only have 24 hours to claim yours! [**No****Trials,****No****Hidden Fees,****No****Strings Attached!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11677/6374453/e684279cc1cdf87a8d0819fcd932b4ea738d3eb5/e3923e7f36c19cc43bf35988816b21aa99c33e84) Keeping you safe.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Vladimir Putin has infiltrated the U.S. Senate and most of our media refuses to talk about it. Watch the interview with Dr. Ruth May, Professor of Global Business at the University of Dallas.
body:
The Blue Letter
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7fe2df5-d886-4e6c-b25e-7f8b0eb02420/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[Vladimir Putin has infiltrated the U.S. Senate and most of our media refuses to talk about it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c704b41-00f7-4e2d-99bc-f325c0320105/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Let's be clear what we're talking about: Russians came here years ago, and gained U.S. citizenship. Then, they went into business with relatives and/or friends back at home who just happen to be Russian oligarchs close to Putin. [Watch The Video At The Blue Amp Channel!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad39baac-f612-4583-a7ca-46337dda0cd3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**It feels like something out of "The Americans," **[**yet was backed up with hard evidence by Dr. Ruth May, a Professor of Global Business at The University of Dallas.** She came across the story almost by accident, subsequently writing it up for The Dallas Morning News.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T426a7f46-f9f3-44e1-ac82-1932decc8509/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ Where were the NY Times, Washington Post & CNN, among others? Apparently out to lunch. And that hasn't changed. **_[This is why we, at the Blue Amp Channel, chose to interview May](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbca20e4e-b4f1-4043-beef-7bb225d4edc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_[.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td95e209e-63bb-40cc-8b12-d3e15a881402/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _How does any news organization not want to know what the hell's going on here??_** _After the FBI's Charles McGonigal, in charge of investigating Trump/Russia & oligarch Oleg Derispaska...is arrested for taking payments from Derispaska._ [Watch The Video At The Blue Amp Channel.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c9e3e4b-4a3f-40bb-88bd-46e166195cba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Folks, this is the tip of the iceberg. _**[We have Republican politicians (even a few former Democrats),](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td78a1919-222a-44df-883b-ea55da2e3c58/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) high-ranking FBI and important cultural figures in business, news and entertainment being paid by Putin.**_ **An expose was recently written in Europe on high ranking EU figures taking Russian payoffs, here are some of its conclusions:**
* Leaked emails show how a Duma insider built a network of analysts, journalists, and others who helped him push the Kremlin’s interests abroad.
* His group offered cash to European politicians to propose pro-Russian motions in their local legislatures, and paid far-right activists to publish pro-Kremlin articles in European media

[Watch The Video At The Blue Amp Channel!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7189d88a-b779-450c-aabe-a7def2348fba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_[Dr. May showed how many millions of dollars were funneled into SuperPACS supporting Mitch McConnell, Marco Rubio, Lindsey Graham, and other Republicans.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tebe0b027-03f0-42e3-9ae6-406b39f8ea9b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Does their behavior make a little more sense now? _** **_[One of the Russians giving large donations looked at a lifetime loser, petty criminal and serial liar, George Santos, and saw something nobody else apparently did](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2caa3a21-5999-4fc5-9b81-6206edfaa5ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). _**_This man, Andrew Intrater, had given 250K to Trump's inauguration, for example, for a private meeting with his cabinet._ [Subscribe To The Blue Amp Channel!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5fb3df8c-11fd-450a-a56b-05afeb5e2f27/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _So, he looked at Santos, who lost his House run in 2020 and was broke, and... decided to go into business with him? Seemingly helping enrich Santos out of the kindness of his heart? Then Intrater gave 56K in donations (that can be traced) to various campaign orgs supporting Santos. Did we mention Intrater's cousin is one of the biggest Russian oligarchs, Viktor Veklesberg, who's been sanctioned?_ **_[Why would Intrater invest in Santos?? Why did Santos suddenly start vocally supporting Russia and attacking Ukraine??](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63cbd5c0-99ce-453e-bc4c-7543477e0360/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** [Watch The Video At The Blue Amp Channel!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8fbea50-1254-41ef-8e19-061fa7eaa569/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [There is so much more than this in the video. Please go to the Blue Amp Channel, watch it](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28ef8486-caf2-4db9-a5e2-73ab7491a6c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and[ subscribe](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e62bdf6-6d12-4889-882a-1fd84aa70dbf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! We will stay on this story, we promise you. Our democracy depends on it. Thank you, Cliff ******************* **PS[: Go shop for gifts or yourself at our new sponsor, Dissent Pins! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92a56fb4-991e-4e53-a5b1-509a73c3009b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)They give half their profits to great causes, which comes out to nearly $1 million since they began!** Also: [Subscribe to the Blue Amp Channel on Youtube!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfce85e4b-6ab4-443a-8645-9f8d9c340667/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!! [Follow ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta02c1436-f3b8-49fa-8d2a-3335e7fc9587/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[@cliffschecter](?) on Twitter [Follow @cliffschecter on Post](https://default.salsalabs.org/T012dba0f-66d5-446d-ba24-72545b68dafc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks again!
---

---
| | |
---
|
---

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/newsletterfeb232023-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5b6a220-9341-4924-ad3e-9f18564d57e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=780f2f6a-33d7-4adb-8f13-aa4c532c0116&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=780f2f6a-33d7-4adb-8f13-aa4c532c0116&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Ted Cruz
subject: They want to silence you
body:
[](http://trk.tedcruz.) Fellow American, If you love America... If you believe in freedom... If you don’t want the government to run your life... **_The Democrats want to silence you! _** And you already know they want to suppress my voice because I’ve never put up with their lies and radical political agenda — not under President Obama and certainly not under President Biden. [**As I fight for freedom of speech, the protection of our religious liberty, and the future of America’s children against radical Democrats who want to use taxpayer-funded schools to indoctrinate the next generation, I need your support of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any amount you can afford today.**](http://trk.tedcruz.-V6F2IEf0DHr2GXrozALpg) [**Contribute**](http://trk.tedcruz.) **I won’t let the left silence me**. And I bet you won’t either, Fellow American. [**Let’s respond to their attacks on America-loving conservatives like you and me by winning BIG in 2024. **](http://trk.tedcruz.) [**Contribute**](http://trk.tedcruz.) For liberty, Ted Cruz Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 _To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, [click here](http://trk.tedcruz.) to unsubscribe._

---
| | | |
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDUzLTA4Nzk5NzA5MDE2YjRhODM4MDNjZGY4NzM4Y2QxNTg0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1zdXJ2ZXk_c2M9MDA1NjhOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXN1cHJlbWVjb3VydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD12MS1BRV9GRk8zNjA0MCJ9/F-4UkP_RKvbt7n-RR6rvIA)

| | | Dear Friend,Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDUzLTA4Nzk5NzA5MDE2YjRhODM4MDNjZGY4NzM4Y2QxNTg0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1zdXJ2ZXk_c2M9MDA1NjhOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXN1cHJlbWVjb3VydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD12MS1BRV9GRk8zNjA0MCJ9/9SZzknSJ-3oEiSxtcRXWMQ)[NO](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDUzLTA4Nzk5NzA5MDE2YjRhODM4MDNjZGY4NzM4Y2QxNTg0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1zdXJ2ZXk_c2M9MDA1NjhOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXN1cHJlbWVjb3VydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD12MS1BRV9GRk8zNjA0MCJ9/-rlmatVfCTtSf1UfC9gqQg)Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

That is why I’m reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?_

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link:**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDUzLTA4Nzk5NzA5MDE2YjRhODM4MDNjZGY4NzM4Y2QxNTg0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1zdXJ2ZXk_c2M9MDA1NjhOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXN1cHJlbWVjb3VydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD12MS1BRV9GRk8zNjA0MCJ9/hlDrHpWZN-qpQRe3sl5ahw)**

Thank you for your time and attention—and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,
---
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

These are not small issues; these are threats to American freedom.

Apparently, when Democrats conduct oversight, they're hailed as heroes, but when Republicans do it, we're labeled as "conspiracy theorists." Friend the abuses of our Federal Government range from warrantless data collection, labeling parents as "domestic terrorists," and even silencing medical professionals who did not agree with the Biden Administration's response to COVID-19. name: Mark Warner
subject: Making history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Sign our card to congratulate Jennifer McClellan!

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59084792/393158843/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTc5MmZkZC1jN2IyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1w0sk1k3MNAvBbvT02yNesrX1nZRyG7lqpXZ13ykJw=&emci=0917f179-19b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=1e792fdd-c7b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)

| | Big news out of Virginia, Derek. **Thanks to hard work from folks like you, Jennifer McClellan defeated her Republican opponent in the special election in Virginia’s Fourth District. I am thrilled to have such a dedicated public servant and good friend of many years joining Virginia’s Congressional delegation. This is also a historic moment, as she will become the Commonwealth’s first Black Congresswoman.** Jennifer McClellan has spent _18 years_ delivering results in the General Assembly, passing legislation that has changed the lives of Virginians, including the Voting Rights Act of Virginia and the Reproductive Health Protection Act – and now, she gets to take her work to Congress. There’s no one more deserving to break this glass ceiling. **[_Sign our card to congratulate Congresswoman-Elect Jennifer McClellan on her historic win >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59084794/393158846/1047561417?refcode=mw_em_230222_1&ms=mw_em_230222_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTc5MmZkZC1jN2IyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1w0sk1k3MNAvBbvT02yNesrX1nZRyG7lqpXZ13ykJw=&emci=0917f179-19b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=1e792fdd-c7b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)** With her distinguished record leading on voting rights, abortion, and much more, I was proud to support her campaign and I can’t wait for her to join me in Washington so we can keep up the fight to expand health care, protect women’s reproductive freedom, and address the climate crisis. **[_Will you join me in celebrating her momentous win and sign our card?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59084796/393158848/1047561417?refcode=mw_em_230222_1&ms=mw_em_230222_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTc5MmZkZC1jN2IyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1w0sk1k3MNAvBbvT02yNesrX1nZRyG7lqpXZ13ykJw=&emci=0917f179-19b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=1e792fdd-c7b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)** With another strong democratic ally in Congress, we’re one step closer to building a better future for the Commonwealth. Let’s get to work. Thank you, Mark Warner ** ** ****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59084799/393158851/1047561417?refcode=mw_em_230222_1&ms=mw_em_230222_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTc5MmZkZC1jN2IyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1w0sk1k3MNAvBbvT02yNesrX1nZRyG7lqpXZ13ykJw=&emci=0917f179-19b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=1e792fdd-c7b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)****

clean_body: Sign our card to congratulate Jennifer McClellan! | | | Big news out of Virginia, Derek. Thanks to hard work from folks like you, Jennifer McClellan defeated her Republican opponent in the special election in Virginia’s Fourth District. I am thrilled to have such a dedicated public servant and good friend of many years joining Virginia’s Congressional delegation. This is also a historic moment, as she will become the Commonwealth’s first Black Congresswoman. Jennifer McClellan has spent 18 years delivering results in the General Assembly, passing legislation that has changed the lives of Virginians, including the Voting Rights Act of Virginia and the Reproductive Health Protection Act – and now, she gets to take her work to Congress. There’s no one more deserving to break this glass ceiling. With her distinguished record leading on voting rights, abortion, and much more, I was proud to support her campaign and I can’t wait for her to join me in Washington so we can keep up the fight to expand health care, protect women’s reproductive freedom, and address the climate crisis. With another strong democratic ally in Congress, we’re one step closer to building a better future for the Commonwealth. Let’s get to work. Thank you, Mark Warner ** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Laurie Teper
subject: Fwd: Next week 2 Days of Action
body:
__Laurie Teper__
__[teper@sbcglobal.net](mailto:teper@sbcglobal.net)__

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Courtney Geels** <[Courtney@ncvalues.org](mailto:Courtney@ncvalues.org)>
Date: Wed, Feb 22, 2023 at 9:50 AM
Subject: Next week 2 Days of Action
To: Richard J Teper <[teper@sbcglobal.net](mailto:teper@sbcglobal.net)>, Laurie Teper <[volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)>

**We are raising the alarm, and need your help. We urgently call on all pro-life supporters of our coalition to take action that helps us save over 26,000 babies in North Carolina per year!**
In the next few days the NC legislature will decide what legislation will be put forward to limit abortion. This decision is being made in Republican caucuses behind closed doors, and the pro-life movement in North Carolina needs to act NOW, before a bill is filed. There is much pressure on these lawmakers to present a bill that only makes minimal changes to the current abortion law, and saves only around 4,000 babies a year.
For the legislature to present a bold pro-life bill that will save over 26,000 lives a year, they need to hear from you! A Heartbeat Act that limits abortion when a heartbeat is detected in the pre-born child—about 6 weeks—will make a significant impact by saving the lives of 22,000 thousand more babies than the 13-week limit being floated in legislative chambers. States like Texas, Arkansas, Georgia, Alabama, Tennessee, Kentucky, South Carolina (although the South Carolina Supreme Court overturned it) and Missouri have passed Heartbeat Acts. Even Governor Ron Desantis in Florida has indicated that he will sign a Heartbeat Act into law. This is a decision that our legislators are deciding right now, and they need to hear from you as soon and frequently as possible! We are talking about saving real lives.
We need all hands on deck next week! Bring your friends; bring your families; bring your churches!!
[**VISIT**](https://ncvalues.nationbuilder.com/r?u=qu8RDOkPDZZrxgFkhA3IjKZOFnDTEDG1DVYTBnzW8HoEqsfZ5S4IAw69XnCiK4o0TipS_dqAFh7ioQVVa9apVA&e=d8557ad7e9f695d8a3c759b016ac48e9&utm_source=ncvalues&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230221_heartbeat&n=6) : We are organizing two important Days of Action on Tuesday and Wednesday of next week (February 28th and March 1st). We’re calling on coalition members from all across the state to drive down to Raleigh and join us as we go and visit legislators in person at the General Assembly. Your presence and activism will make a critical difference in whether legislators propose a Heartbeat Act or a 13-week limit on abortion. If you would like to join us for one of these days, there is information at this link and below: <https://ncvalues.org/event/legislative-days-of-pro-life-action/>
Please come and show your support.

**WHO** : You, and pro-life supporters all across NC.
**WHAT** : Legislation Days of Pro-life Action in Support of the Heartbeat Bill.
**WHERE** : 16 West Jones Street, Raleigh, NC. The first floor 1000 Court of the Legislative Building (visit [https://www.ncleg.gov/About/VisitorInfo](https://ncvalues.nationbuilder.com/r?u=MCbI1bFtm3KGufXMRCM6NydAe3Zd73SkgwN7idDaSKsFz4YHPC0q0uYgztFxEKHK&e=d8557ad7e9f695d8a3c759b016ac48e9&utm_source=ncvalues&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230221_heartbeat&n=8) for more). To meet up, enter the building at 16 West Jones Street. There will be a big medallion with the state seal on the ground. Enter the building, and go through security. Turn to your right and walk forward and that will be the "1000 Court" of the legislative building. You will see tables and a fountain. look for NC Values team and we will give you instructions.
**WHEN** : Tuesday, February 28th, 2023, and Wednesday, March 1st, 2023, between 9am and 1pm.
**HOW** : If possible, please wear a baby blue shirt in support of the unborn and to make it easier to identify you.
**P****arking:** [https://www.ncleg.gov/About/VisitorInfo](https://www.ncleg.gov/About/VisitorInfo)
Thank you for everything you are doing, and as always, we would appreciate your deepest prayers that we protect as many unborn babies in North Carolina as possible.

### Courtney Geels
Outreach & Coalitions Director

919-593-6738

|

This is a historic victory. **Congresswoman-elect McClellan is the first black woman to ever be elected to Congress in the Commonwealth of Virginia.** This is an incredible victory for every Virginian – and we have a great deal to celebrate. # _**Pre-Order Today!**_
## Get your signed copy of _Common Sense for a Dying Nation_
---
|
---
| [ORDER NOW](https://jonahdschulz.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fca39b236a4d3fca484c28fd6&id=904dd26a70&e=3ebdc747e6 "ORDER NOW")
---
| Inspired by Thomas Paine's "Common Sense," this book was written with a simple yet difficult goal: to inspire the present-day American to rekindle the light of liberty within our very soul. _Common Sense for a Dying Nation_ takes a deep and direct dive into the heart of the issues plaguing our politics, government, culture, and spirit. Instead of seeking to diagnose and prescribe solutions for every public policy dispute, this work seeks to get to the root cause by first examining the nature of our God-given rights, the true meaning of liberty, and how we ought to live our lives.

While this work is written with present-day facts, the fundamentals it espouses are timeless and universal. In this brief work, we will focus on rediscovering truth and an unwavering moral center that guides a free society and a good people.
---
