body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4775b0d7330425884d7ed79c57bd28c&_e=C71HG67SNMnsg3QD1VzrU7LFU5uNiTOgEwUqpwySev5smmMlY4Q3q1Rm2M17I8P2ZuVETh8kkOOizNUF-A1_wqQnkSTLNf200zIFfIO6JvqMsuLVusp4jiSKAyYPVPq6SigfPhNYQY-lp8H-IFeyhtrNleLY6RlVtvcs2qVMlPKxbg1X2yG-DB2IlvvQ3hUcssONdaLasxu7Ye0l6I3YfsGARI1O0AbgpFa3B0kbO4OAtUeRw4Y2GqAjdIlKO0rKndzMuuwc_mQPeSpaMobJHEHCs_Iui1aiIezueMimMls%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4775b0d7330425884d7ed79c57bd28c&_e=C71HG67SNMnsg3QD1VzrU7LFU5uNiTOgEwUqpwySev5smmMlY4Q3q1Rm2M17I8P2ZuVETh8kkOOizNUF-A1_wqQnkSTLNf200zIFfIO6JvqMsuLVusp4jiSKAyYPVPq6SigfPhNYQY-lp8H-IFeyhsstZvpwsfHhO0yxBd2qN1_1vHaRYenlBR0nOrrOWJRGjnI7rauMAGxbDF0f2A03LcEu4SLpX_CrjM-7EElMa3csRTVE6DryR0LT8wow-gHF_6avLm9TsTVhU4cyIg8VtayvMfnasx4K48N-tS_YZaQ%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4775b0d7330425884d7ed79c57bd28c&_e=C71HG67SNMnsg3QD1VzrU7LFU5uNiTOgEwUqpwySev5smmMlY4Q3q1Rm2M17I8P2ZuVETh8kkOOizNUF-A1_wqQnkSTLNf200zIFfIO6JvqMsuLVusp4jiSKAyYPVPq6SigfPhNYQY-lp8H-IFeyhjWZNBNM3VaH9yr-UVK1tKg1i08o-_LuJLjV3zrCs2sIZwJ7B6TsdwOHRAWSt0PK5zHgy-pi62RAAUkO6V5xXBJjYoP0tftYeJ0rMmQM0rBGH1Vy1zVJ4nkff-tNSFwmySBCyndI-PEyI7Ic6qAx3vw%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4775b0d7330425884d7ed79c57bd28c&_e=C71HG67SNMnsg3QD1VzrU7LFU5uNiTOgEwUqpwySev5smmMlY4Q3q1Rm2M17I8P2ZuVETh8kkOOizNUF-A1_wqQnkSTLNf200zIFfIO6JvqMsuLVusp4jiSKAyYPVPq6SigfPhNYQY-lp8H-IFeyhlQlVtf0v4F5jqRkaIr31d01r2X0qP8P2WFrnHrtW2HTAdPinXcqaPWdF7b2ReH321f9YCeGuaoJdR1PjWSOlLJ40WljFQe9oYeN26znajY09dM7U72xRq792JAmYQrgOfFaf41LpvDumKq2KQoEVHk%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4775b0d7330425884d7ed79c57bd28c&_e=C71HG67SNMnsg3QD1VzrU7LFU5uNiTOgEwUqpwySev5smmMlY4Q3q1Rm2M17I8P2ZuVETh8kkOOizNUF-A1_wqQnkSTLNf200zIFfIO6JvqMsuLVusp4jiSKAyYPVPq6SigfPhNYQY-lp8H-IFeyhuhKdlAzm-ApUJKhouO9meZl6qnqVuEsdi8LezlDsYqvjG3hwikVk_mgP98W2c7K6YXV_R10LG5CC_ouA16gNJyxB2-zDpLq9NdCSBAqgUDPSuvXemLBsLtnIIgTB2rmnLALNh87rXMlU37Ctpx-pAU%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4775b0d7330425884d7ed79c57bd28c&_e=C71HG67SNMnsg3QD1VzrU7LFU5uNiTOgEwUqpwySev5smmMlY4Q3q1Rm2M17I8P2ZuVETh8kkOOizNUF-A1_wqQnkSTLNf200zIFfIO6JvqMsuLVusp4jiSKAyYPVPq6SigfPhNYQY-lp8H-IFeyhnTyHLKtbtLhvUvCU4Kdc-g4ycZiGbKJQnLFJXALausOILHlCtb-AO9fW5bcvCg0LpPNi4PgnwSar9PM12FQa51WT1sgWo27V_nBx4L3UdtgtNf6oj6KXitwFZ6wwl6dMFSDKbRYQpdCCeJzP1a3EBE%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4775b0d7330425884d7ed79c57bd28c&_e=C71HG67SNMnsg3QD1VzrU7LFU5uNiTOgEwUqpwySev5smmMlY4Q3q1Rm2M17I8P2ZuVETh8kkOOizNUF-A1_wqQnkSTLNf200zIFfIO6JvqMsuLVusp4jiSKAyYPVPq6SigfPhNYQY-lp8H-IFeyhjSeUlRjfLOfpJCUULY051i5vrydKEEnuG89nZQRvM0CvOUMOecSqiEKihJw5sXuQmpDBFQL5SOpVwVftWui4UlY31pqXws59tW0w9fSocEYTmlA0gmivqRUcepQiNqCwJbxHpfadFHY-ONSNvv4uhE%3D)
---

Dear Friends, It's been over six weeks since I took the oath of office. Being on the House floor for that moment was a humbling experience, even at 1:30 am. Despite the dysfunction in Washington showcased during the Speaker's vote, I’m off to a strong start. On the Oversight Committee, I've called out House Republicans’ hypocrisy problem and the rise of antisemitism on social media. As a member of the Foreign Affairs Committee, I've focused on strengthening economic, diplomatic, and military ties with Israel. And as a Vice Chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force, I've worked across the aisle to reintroduce bipartisan legislation to make our schools safer...and we're just getting started. And yet, at the NRCC’s winter retreat, they’ve made it clear that I will be a top target to unseat in 2024. [**I want to remain your strong voice in Congress, and I hope you will consider chipping in today to help me defend this competitive seat in 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59065844/393112234/2121217915?refcode=1026&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTE4NWM2ZS1hOGIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PIb8rQQoCYXYXnv95q5pOBgRa3uu_5BcZ1oytBlJFic=)

name: American Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650839%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PWvVFV1o5%2bo9ZxjaUzM1gg&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650830%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QuK%2fiZe8sDC0gbrwVfq1cQ&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650831%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wTlGE6tt0TClJm6zWL8qoA&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650832%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=02Eq9UwdptNSA3bE5z5qkg&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650833%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oi8uDcvNSMyu5L77VM%2fokg&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

In an interview published in Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: “My job is to apply the Constitution.” But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.” What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. name: American Action News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z76dnvss06mfccp76c80go60151glpul94nlspvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1geeob3c9h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztoakpvk4u0ld2mqeis73o2vngsknrf0pacvikp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1geeob3c9h2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zablvtnbpngtu0trlbk9i23d4v6j16sd4q7hph40_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1geeob3c9h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zut3n84g1cbvm62uhb9r91uv55r9g730kj8r83h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1geeob3c9h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg8tu4gtrc6cqiul1l175ubtc81p8mtf2e73rp1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1geeob3c9h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Your Supreme Court Survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhfn3l5i130h850f894d2m29rjc0bgjn4sre5h5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1geepr4cdh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk51h13agbvc3l3n9gbgul1ld048asiiat1nrut0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1geepr4cdh2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk3at3gd6vbd5el18gg0d1056fj7ldjstp9cgajg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1geepr4cdh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk0j542dt8t8shp4j3f3o19067aq4gj0a8s86g4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1geepr4cdh2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhtt4gd576dr8ug1qulk4n4u9mfgacp657p6b9p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1geepr4cdh2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

|
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2znrae7de58vpulsrqpb6mcqf8ki9sc1a4i3mrm08).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkkqedbkkqe3fu4tm2dj6b9h13nblv3n7mfvk35g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1geepr4cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Child Mutilation Illegal in Mississippi
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| Yesterday, the Mississippi State Senate passed the Regulate Experimental Adolescent Procedures (REAP) Act, House Bill 1125, to prevent child mutilation and to protect vulnerable children by prohibiting gender reassignment surgery and hormone replacement therapy for anyone under the age of 18. The House Bill, having already been passed previously by the House of Representatives, had a clean pass through the Senate with no additional modifications, changes, or amendments and is now headed to the Governor for signature.In a legislative session that has been thus far wrought with disappointment for conservatives, this is a huge WIN for conservatives, and it is all thanks to YOU.The Mississippi Freedom Caucus sent out an email in early September 2022 titled “Stop Supporting Woke UMMC Agenda” alerting our supporters that your tax dollars were funding the University of Mississippi Medical Center (UMMC), a state-owned and funded hospital, and that the hospital was promoting gender reassignment surgery, including for children.The Trustworthy, Evidence-based, Affirming, and Multidisciplinary (TEAM) Clinic within UMMC’s Center for Gender and Sexual Minority Health listed via their website that anyone over the age of 13 could make an appointment with the clinic that provides “gender affirmative medicine, including hormone therapy.”Immediately upon learning this, YOU, our supporters, took decisive action utilizing our action center to send out nearly 1,000 emails to EVERY member of the MS Legislature alerting them of UMMC’s woke agenda and demanding action to stop child mutilation. We are proud to say that, based on YOUR efforts, the bill to outlaw this practice in Mississippi is now on its way to the Governor’s desk.
---
|
---
| The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is the only group of legislators who fight every day for your rights and freedom. But, we need your help!Please consider financially supporting the Mississippi Freedom Caucus so we can continue the fight in the Mississippi legislature.
---

---

Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/SzSw4R8nRFTxyCBQ4vad-A) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

clean_body: | | | | Harriet is fighting back Friend, Kamala Harris holds one of the most important positions in our government - She is in charge of our southern border. And she is failing to live up to the expectations of the American people in. Instead of working tirelessly to make our country a better place, she has been focused on advancing her own political agenda and ignoring the needs of the people she was elected to serve. She continues to mishandle our southern border. We've seen an increase in illegal immigration and a continuous flow of dangerous drugs entering our communities. | Our country is facing serious challenges, and it is more important than ever that we have leaders like Harriet who will fight to protect our freedoms and way of life. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | | |

name: Dr. Frank Turek, CrossExamined.org
subject: The winning arguments for pro-life causes
body:
When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, the fight to protect innocent babies TRULY began.

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z15f21527uuar2ii51uo1rmqiupvck49g21gdqqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8ob0chh2bs)
---
Friend, When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , the fight to protect innocent babies TRULY began. You and I must now fearlessly and faithfully speak up to defend life -- and take on the arguments made by the "Woke" pro-abortion culture of death. _But it can be difficult to know what to say to a zealous pro-abortion advocate or a friend or co-worker sharing their opinions on abortion ... so too often, we remain silent._
[**That's why CrossExamined has prepared a special digital resource for YOU, Friend: the 4-Point Argument for Life, based on the work of Professor Stephen Schwarz. Please claim your free copy right now!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z61edr56mn2ccn14o3psgump0md1b23h4lm59c28_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8ob0chh2bs)
---
[Download the 4-Point Argument for Life](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z84j6q5uo7o9hf42lh40v8ngln4c4kc3igl6ies8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8ob0chh2bs)
---
Thanks to generous CrossExamined supporters, your FREE copy of the 4-Point Argument for Life, based on the work of Prof. Schwarz, will help you: • Effectively make the case for protecting unborn babies' lives by addressing the intellectual _and_ emotional arguments from abortion advocates • Confidently respond to the most common abortion arguments • Be ready to defend your beliefs -- and the pro-life cause -- so you can speak up to help protect unborn lives when it matters most [**Please claim your FREE copy of CrossExamined's 4-Point Argument for Life, based on the work of Prof. Schwarz, right now. You'll be able to download this resource and put it to use right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf6ge1eh3pnn3gokpsiosc2hj630ci98rmt2amj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8ob0chh2bs)
---
[Download the 4-Point Argument for Life](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9ead4f1dl1pa6dvkjjvro9nkdopdutsmds30ijo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8ob0chh2bs)
---
Since the Court overturned _Roe_ , you and I have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to FINALLY WIN the fight for life and protect MILLIONS of precious unborn lives and vulnerable mothers. [**That's why our CrossExamined team went to work right away to prepare this 4-Point Argument for Life, based on the work of Prof. Schwarz, for pro-life advocates like you.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zehsnj1h86fokh0rjp0c3a6i0oo2gajo1oq6mf50_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8ob0chh2bs) Every year, our non-profit ministry CrossExamined reaches MILLIONS of people with our in-person and online events, online writings and courses, and our books, DVDS, and other media. With the help of generous donors, CrossExamined is ending the "youth exodus" of students leaving their faith ... inspiring, educating, and edifying MILLIONS each year with our Christian apologetics materials ... and bringing the truth to high school and college students who are often unequipped to correct the erroneous assertions put forth by atheistic college professors. _Now, with the protection of millions of innocent unborn babies at stake, CrossExamined is preparing pro-life advocates like YOU to defend life._ [**Please -- while it's still available -- claim your free copy right now of the 4-Point Argument for Life, based on the work of Prof. Schwarz. You'll be able to download this resource and start using it today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z94rveo6fpml9rqiku7o7upo6babjtf4l4u5vme0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8ob0chh2bs) Thank you and God bless,
---
Dr. Frank Turek President CrossExamined
---
[Download the 4-Point Argument for Life](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkqd7kvhdehbgjmvmrk845shvn9klooa8jm9m5mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8ob0chh2bs)
---
---

Good day fellow patriot!

As you know, we live in dangerous times and having a reliable and powerful flashlight is essential tool for anyone who may find themselves alone at night.

[This Ultra Bright 800 Lumen LED flashlight ](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11678/6374453/dd8a219f2bffd589c984988e8352ef0712c8e076/b00b9c67737d1efee5a63f091d34fb79fc9e7b03)is the perfect tool for keeping you safe in any situation.

Here are just a few reasons why this flashlight is a great safety tool:
* **Brightness:** With 800 lumens of power, this flashlight is extremely bright and can easily light up even the darkest of spaces. This makes it ideal for situations where you need to see clearly, such as when you're walking in a poorly lit area or when you're trying to find your way in a power outage.

* **Durability:** This flashlight is built to last, with a tough and durable construction that can withstand rough handling and tough conditions. Whether you're using it in the backyard or on a camping trip, you can count on it to stay in good working order.

* **Convenience:** The Ultra Bright 800 Lumen LED flashlight is small and lightweight, making it easy to carry with you wherever you go. It also has a long battery life, so you won't have to worry about replacing the batteries frequently.

* **Versatility:** This flashlight has multiple light modes, including a high beam, low beam, and strobe function. This makes it ideal for a variety of situations, from searching for something in the dark to signaling for help.

Whether you're out for a nighttime walk or caught in a power outage, [this flashlight](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11678/6374453/dd8a219f2bffd589c984988e8352ef0712c8e076/b00b9c67737d1efee5a63f091d34fb79fc9e7b03) will provide the light you need to stay safe and secure!

And right now, during our holiday sale, you can get [this amazing flashlight](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11678/6374453/dd8a219f2bffd589c984988e8352ef0712c8e076/b00b9c67737d1efee5a63f091d34fb79fc9e7b03) at 50% off! That's right, you'll be able to get all the benefits of a top-of-the-line flashlight for a fraction of the regular price.

Don't miss out on [this amazing deal](https://links.thetacticaldeals.com/a/1537/click/11678/6374453/dd8a219f2bffd589c984988e8352ef0712c8e076/b00b9c67737d1efee5a63f091d34fb79fc9e7b03). Get your Ultra Bright 800 Lumen LED Military-Grade Aluminum Flashlight today and light up your life!

name: American Update
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650977%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hs8j4%2brC45d%2fn20BKH3ewg&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled [“The Great Reset?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650978%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YpTTAoqSJTFm4qY7ZGYSxw&sysid=1)****[”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650979%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QL2Fa4Iy6ddPU7CP0fE5zg&sysid=1)[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650977%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hs8j4%2brC45d%2fn20BKH3ewg&sysid=1)--is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650970%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fs5RuBcWww7C7x3wrv7jHA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650971%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MMJadjHyIQNkW94WRu8UGA&sysid=1)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: A very real, tangible reason to contribute – one you’ll be able to see.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Being honest, you can probably tell there are A LOT of people who have remained silent or are on the fence for this race.
#

Peter -
There are just a few days left before our first full monthly fundraising deadline and we want to give you an important, tangible reason why your donation is so critical.
Endorsements.
Being honest, you can probably tell there are A LOT of people who have remained silent or are on the fence for this race.
Do you know what changes that?
Grassroots enthusiasm.
Most elected officials won’t choose to be on the wrong side of that.
So a lot of donations = more endorsements. More endorsements = more momentum to beat Senator Sinema.
We’re going to share our numbers, and every single donation sends a message. So please — the amount doesn’t matter.
[**Can you please make a contribution of $5, $10, or any amount you can afford to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate? name: 1600 Daily
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6guh943lirflrif6rmhin7hlq4r47ugbb11ci3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie4ob4cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled [“The Great Reset?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdf4qoabhf4strsvjgv2ffhcvvfdquq0jdiqoj6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie4ob4cjh2bs)****[”](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z07migvmd5ph7h2f9f1gvsb2b4sie6374fa2jsb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie4ob4cjh2bs)[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9vf19ajeddfui1potig216fuodu3kiqhhg37b50_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie4ob4cjh2bs)--is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb08s9se0v69cnbs7cfhdk3l8b377ik3pccadbuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie4ob4cjh2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9fjpt7ad8fdtgn016a3tahoqba0tvpvcj9m610o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie4ob4cjh2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Kathi Paroska
subject: ICYMI: Ohio Republican Leaders Endorse Matt Dolan for U.S. Senate
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lVNpCTDzhGkK8u4oy6gof0xSKzrslEu08f8tWKE1Zvc6bj9EQzV7bNDEjYFLFzu2hTke0XNITM6pO6ofxHVWzgjKc39Y22UVD4O5tVaYPn2wU_3M9RJrGTfKZU25f2HiSJZcQNPlKRUsNjuOdeayqw==&c=JqRj7MLJqbJhq2hJp-GXRbwW62_VKeMgmJQw1CnUeufLc73ap1VpNg==&ch=-m7_zGW6WYIU6VjnGTDWVqkLzKPNv4hEK58KqdzIsf-Ckw0r2K2fMQ==)
---
| For Immediate Release: February 21, 2023 | [press@DolanForOhio.com](mailto:press@DolanForOhio.com)

Ohio Republican Leaders Endorse Matt Dolan for U.S. Senate
Cleveland, OH: U.S. Senate candidate Matt Dolan announced Tuesday the latest slate of Republican campaign endorsements from across Ohio.
"The challenges confronting America today require the kind of hard work, innovation and results-oriented focus embodied by our growing list of Republican supporters across Ohio. Together, we're working to build a statewide movement of grassroots conservatives and dedicated public servants working to build a better future for Ohio families, workers and businesses. I'm proud to have their support for U.S. Senate," Matt Dolan said.

Full list of today's endorsements (county):
Council President Pro tem Jay "Chip" AuWerter, Gates Mills (Cuyahoga)
Vice Mayor Kate Baker, Huber Heights (Montgomery)
Mayor Robert Breneman, Wooster (Wayne)
Commissioner Sabrina Christian Bennett (Portage)
Councilman Lee Czerwonka, Blue Ash (Hamilton)
County Commissioner Julie Ehemann (Shelby)
Councilman David Furry, Rocky River (Cuyahoga)
Councilman Joe Gambatese, Lyndhurst (Cuyahoga)
Councilman Jim Kaminski, Strongsville (Cuyahoga)
Council President Phillip Kiriazis, Seven Hills (Cuyahoga)
Councilman Pete Marsh, Hilliard (Franklin)
Mayor Sarah Mays, Xenia (Greene)
Mayor Dennis Morley, Eastlake (Lake) Councilman Bobby Phillips, Troy (Miami)
County Commissioner Rich Regovich (Lake)
Councilman Bill Rozell, Troy (Miami)
Councilman Grand Russel, Findlay (Hancock)
County Commissioner Larry Schmidt (Crawford)
Councilman Roby Schottke, Grove City (Franklin)
Councilman Todd Severt, Troy (Miami)
Mayor Bob Stone, Beavercreek (Greene)
Councilman Patrick Thackery, Urbana (Champaign)
Councilman William Twiss, Troy (Miami)
Councilman Barry VanHoozen, Perrysburg (Wood)
Mayor Ann Womer Benjamin, Aurora (Portage)
For more information on Matt Dolan's campaign for U.S. Senate, email [press@dolanforohio.com.](mailto:press@dolanforohio.com.)
###

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Failed Border Policies Threaten Rural America
body:
251,487 individuals illegally crossed into the United States at our southern border in December 2022 alone. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/477c5c17d787/failed-border-policies-threaten-rural-america?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | | | From October to December 2022, there were more illegal immigrants crossing the U.S.-Mexico border than American citizens who were living in the Memphis metro area.

Let that sink in.

Just days ago, U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) announced 251,487 individuals illegally crossed into the United States at our southern border in December 2022 alone. That compares to just 40,565 in December 2020 during the Trump administration. And while those reading this likely reside hundreds of miles from the border, the vast number of people crossing have given every state, including Mississippi, border-state problems.

The Memphis metro area has experienced a massive influx of crime. In fact, Neighborhood Scout reports that Memphis is now “safer than 0% of U.S. cities.” Moreover, due to the proximity to I-55, the area has become the center for illicit drug distribution in America – hardly the type of characteristic any family-oriented community, like ours, desires in a neighbor.

At a time when the federal government refuses to address this crisis, it is critical that local leaders do everything possible to at least make our communities a stop of last resort for drug cartels and illegal immigrants.

Sadly, progressive district attorneys in much of the country have gone soft on crime, allowing their communities to become sanctuaries for traffickers and criminal kingpins. It is time to put a stop to that for our families and our communities.

As you may know, I recently announced my candidacy for District Attorney for District 23. As DeSoto County’s top law enforcement officer, I will protect our neighborhoods from becoming a haven for illegal immigrants. I will prosecute drug cartels, push for fast deportations, and fight for the strongest penalties possible. In doing so, we will eliminate the current dangers and discourage future illicit activity.

In short, my mission as your District Attorney will be to protect the good, law-abiding citizens of Mississippi and deter criminals who chase families and good-paying jobs away. DeSoto County is not their playground, and we will not allow them to overrun our communities or threaten our families’ safety and peace.

While policies at the federal level have failed to prioritize safety within our borders, we have the power to safeguard our own communities. DeSoto County is tough. But as your District Attorney, I will make sure illegal immigrants and cartels face an even tougher criminal justice system.

---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=389016af05&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=1da9ea494e&e=3c5d31b5ad)_

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18891?t=1001&akid=3001%2E346206%2EtYOZcN ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230222-3001-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3001_346206_tYOZcN&akid=3001%2E346206%2EtYOZcN

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3001%2E346206%2EtYOZcN

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Gun Guardians
subject: The nation's MOST restrictive gun control initiative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
For months responsible gun owners in Oregon have been on the edge of their seats, waiting to see if their rights will be stripped away.

| | | 🚨 **2ND AMENDMENT ALERT** 🚨** **** Oregon’s Attorney General is on a crusade against responsible gun owners.
---
[**DEFEND YOUR RIGHTS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc749q4bi9e7vgja81rr3n5vb0ipcdq0tdhhpa5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8pb4cdh2bs)
---
| | Friend, For months responsible gun owners in Oregon have been on the edge of their seats, waiting to see if their rights will be stripped away. _[Measure 114](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8u9stvos4vsdr2odom1gfq5ngfggjoj19as77n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8pb4cdh2bs)_ , Oregon’s new proposed gun law, is the nation's MOST restrictive gun control initiative. It...
* Places an **UNCONSTITUTIONAL** ban on ammo magazines with more than 10-rounds
* Requires citizens to get **GOVERNMENT PERMISSION** to exercise their 2nd Amendment rights
* Allows citizens’ **PRIVATE INFORMATION** to be added to a government registry

Luckily, the initiative was recently struck down by a judge in Oregon - but this fight is far from over... Ellen Rosenblum, Oregon's Attorney General, has made it her personal mission to deny law-abiding citizens their 2nd Amendment rights.
She's petitioning the State Supreme Court, helping introduce new legislation, and advocating for strict gun control measures. _[**HELP STOP HER! >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn5kr44h7jf503hgi6d583qc0vh4l6kmk4hl6akg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8pb4cdh2bs)_
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7jvms0e7evu15u5ul5us8tuit0r8gshhovhb5dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8pb4cdh2bs)
---
We can't sit back and watch our rights be taken away. **And we won't!** **If this situation proves anything, it's that our courts are the last line of defense we have in protecting our rights.**
---
[**SUPPORT OUR COURTS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0oia68oshj1o5569nk4555nr07ll0sdos0o9100_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8pb4cdh2bs)
---
| | Without fair, rule-of-law judges, Oregon's citizens would still be subject to this insane measure. **This is why Fair Courts America exists.** Our mission is to elect and protect rule-of-law judges and prosecutors. So when the left comes for our rights, they’re there to protect us. **Friend, we need your help. Any amount you can give will support our efforts to protect our rights. The woke mob wants unconstitutional gun control, and only one thing can stop them from achieving their goals: YOU.**
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1vl89gb2j0ggm1oroogjte176faab50e2qs2grg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1ie8pb4cdh2bs)

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: The GOP issued a direct challenge to Democratic donors.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| Peter, I just wanted to be certain you saw this update: According to a leaked document from a closed-door GOP meeting, I’ve been listed as a top target in 2024. I am one of just 17 Democrats whose seats they’re going all in to flip red. I can’t say I’m surprised, Peter. As a freshman member in a swing district, Republicans know that 2024 is probably their best and only shot at retaking this seat. But what was surprising is what the NRCC chairman admitted in the leaked materials: **The Democrats’ small-dollar, online fundraising advantage could hurt their chances of keeping the House.** They know we have the support of individual donors and local Illinoisans, and since the GOP’s grassroots support is weak, they’re planning to attack me using cash from corporate PACs and dark money groups.**Peter, if that’s not a direct challenge to Democratic donors everywhere, I don't know what is.** I know it’s early, but we need to get moving quickly if we want to defend this seat. So in light of this news from the GOP, we’re looking for a LARGE number of donations to come in. That’s the best way to stay in an early position of strength: **[Will you help me defend this seat by contributing $5 today? Right now it’s not about how much you give, it’s about the number of people who are stepping up to meet this direct challenge from the GOP head on.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFrJwInJdakOWn403KDuVg5K-KM1GQrT4oss8H_L7Ese8v-1v0aifX_8B_g4H5l9Vt14FkyAf-K0DZOyCwo7F1YN-THtwUTuM-9wSynydgHUD15sfz7GUZ6zGXSVxKuOOxfCHxUwhi6K0mNnth96B-SBH8Wsu9fFoHiCtEVB4IwCCToRCmdZnv_5sFON9PXM6GEfFZksy7VPwAO7pvHZX1BdNUqqlM-Co1D9HGT7XTnagKIYERAulEyAteRhrJKHhhPvh4KflLC1Iw_mn5o1oGJID-QF35Sb__OQQmyxd3FQHzy7GrsOMGMNdw6oo1ZuTnGIzkklcBWV_zm9kjUK-NX_txSGrzBdtZ98Y7BSCyeJ8R9p749zsZ-fMN8acGweA_lN-SAXRL3sVYcgaOw7CRrM6RC_0RamHFUuPBo5EFhQA/3tx/AJNyw5t8SqyHPs1_m7OFhw/h0/ZLHFYI5eBegL2bHdjcbh1YZTwgN-pG-WRcgStIP1elY)** I can’t thank you enough, Eric

body:
What's your top priority?| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=b71fd6ad4ac24904bf6ce5bc45295914&_e=K1AXfWljNTXFtcMcmqC1abOIWTx8ENlfR1048kKJQCXlL-_ObuoY7KZuolHL1bLchWiUtcgOT5BPO86NmOFu3GV-aF3aDNFFJ2_-6HJ6cRCSwTsclhevRbjN6uhSKlY4VBlEJMjEE64ffs1D5rxlE0NOoWf4PF7-sTPejtVT00HI7drOPegvK8vQVpsG_DXdhlHK7JusuO9_aEAq7ec0BjT1PuW1aYiRO-DRbPrr4xRxipM_tw_67fNpZy16w8Gq)

body:
and Republicans are bragging that attacks on voting helped them win

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59082557/393150290/227139380?refcode=20230222.1_EWV_2AN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODdhZTUzZi1jM2IyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u0fZ9VcGXl4wsL2YcuZMhJz1vJAMSFDw56mcTqiqVPM=&emci=651f19b8-fcae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=b87ae53f-c3b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | **We’ve got a problem, Peter.**

Even though Democrats defied expectations last November, we still fell short in several key races. That’s at least partly because, as a contributor in _The Hill_ put it, **“GOP voter suppression measures are working.”**

Now, Republicans are _openly boasting_ that new anti-voting measures helped them win. | “[F]ormer Georgia GOP senator Kelly Loeffler is bragging that her party reelected Governor Brian Kemp and scored big wins in the state legislature at least partly **because of voter-suppressing Senate Bill 202** , the February 2021 law that **severely curtailed the state’s absentee ballot and vote by mail programs**.”

— _The Nation_
---

Donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59082558/393150291/710125701?amount=10&refcode=20230222.1_EWV_2AN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODdhZTUzZi1jM2IyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u0fZ9VcGXl4wsL2YcuZMhJz1vJAMSFDw56mcTqiqVPM=)
---
The MAGA Republican agenda doesn’t have popular support.

They want to ban abortion, end Social Security and Medicare, and give handouts to their wealthy donors. **Rather than trying to win over voters, they’re making it harder for Black, Brown, disabled, elderly, and poor voters to oppose them.**
**That’s not democracy, Peter.**

[**_We can’t sit idly by while the GOP brags that voter suppression is helping them win.

Please: Will you donate now to help us build a massive grassroots movement to organize, educate, and mobilize voters so we can save democracy in Georgia?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59082559/393150292/710125701?amount=10&refcode=20230222.1_EWV_2AN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODdhZTUzZi1jM2IyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u0fZ9VcGXl4wsL2YcuZMhJz1vJAMSFDw56mcTqiqVPM=)

But first, let us explain why this is so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59106996/393213513/-2084059834?refcode=email_022223_monthly&recurring=auto&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjhlMjBmNy1lZWIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TRPVDg7M2UV0_jTojF5PyGmzzL9Ig33di-urXCwCnhw=)**

It’s been just over a month since Josh was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s Governor, and Derek, it’s been quite a month. Here’s just some of what Governor Shapiro’s done so far:
* Signed an executive order to prioritize work experience over college degrees for state government jobs
* Announced he would not sign any execution warrants and called on the Pennsylvania legislature to abolish the death penalty
* Established an office of Transformation and Opportunity to boost our economy and spur innovation

We’re just getting started, and we have our work cut out for us. We made it this far because of folks like you chipping in what you can.

So when we say one of the best ways you can help us get ready for the fights ahead is by committing to a monthly donation, we mean it.

clean_body: We’re hoping to make this birthday her best yet, and I know that a flood of contributions from her grassroots supporters is the best gift I could give! | = | Hi there – I’m Jesse, Hillary’s husband (and biggest supporter!). = | = | = Hillary is truly indefatigable. I see her up before us in the morning and burning the midnight oil at night. It’s part of what makes her not only an incredible partner in life but also a phenomenal Congresswoman. The boys and I miss her now that she’s spending more time in Washington advocating for our communities, but we couldn’t be more proud of the work she’s doing. We’re hoping to make this birthday her best yet, and I know that a flood of contributions from her grassroots supporters is the best gift I could give! = | = | = Thank you so much for celebrating with us, Jesse = * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . body:
For as much as we’ve gotten done over the past two years, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. | |
---
I ran for president for three reasons -- to restore the soul of the nation, to rebuild the backbone of the nation, and to unite our country. Over the past two years, the economy has created 12 million new jobs under Kamala and me -- the strongest two years of growth in history by a longshot. We also made the biggest investment in American infrastructure since President Eisenhower's administration -- in highways, bridges, ports, airports, clean water systems, high-speed internet, and rail. All of it. I have to be honest: For as much as we’ve gotten done over the past two years, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. We need to make the cost of insulin $35/month for every American, pass affordable child care and family paid leave, ban assault weapons, codify _Roe v. Wade_ , and so much more. **Kamala and I can’t do it alone -- it’s going to take the full support of this grassroots team to keep pushing our agenda forward. Will you make a $7 donation to the DNC today to invest in the resources Democrats are relying on to win races in every corner of this great nation?**

Republicans keep talking about what they're going to do. So, let's make it real simple: If Republicans try to cut Social Security -- that's not going to get passed by the Senate in my view, but if it does -- I'll stop them. _I got a veto._ And if they send me a national ban on the right to choose, _I will stop them._ But stopping Republicans is just the half of it. It is going to take electing Democrats up and down the ballot to keep building a better America in the next few years. And the Democratic National Committee is at the heart of that work. **So let me ask you a simple question: Are you with us?** **[If you are, I hope you’ll show your support for our party by making a $7 donation to the DNC today. clean_body: For as much as we’ve gotten done over the past two years, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. | | I ran for president for three reasons -- to restore the soul of the nation, to rebuild the backbone of the nation, and to unite our country. Over the past two years, the economy has created 12 million new jobs under Kamala and me -- the strongest two years of growth in history by a longshot. We also made the biggest investment in American infrastructure since President Eisenhower's administration -- in highways, bridges, ports, airports, clean water systems, high-speed internet, and rail. All of it. I have to be honest: For as much as we’ve gotten done over the past two years, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. We need to make the cost of insulin $35/month for every American, pass affordable child care and family paid leave, ban assault weapons, codify Roe v. Wade , and so much more. Kamala and I can’t do it alone -- it’s going to take the full support of this grassroots team to keep pushing our agenda forward. Will you make a $7 donation to the DNC today to invest in the resources Democrats are relying on to win races in every corner of this great nation? Republicans keep talking about what they're going to do. So, let's make it real simple: If Republicans try to cut Social Security -- that's not going to get passed by the Senate in my view, but if it does -- I'll stop them. I got a veto. And if they send me a national ban on the right to choose, I will stop them. But stopping Republicans is just the half of it. It is going to take electing Democrats up and down the ballot to keep building a better America in the next few years. And the Democratic National Committee is at the heart of that work. So let me ask you a simple question: Are you with us? Thank you and God bless you. Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, ** , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Col. Mike Waltz, Border Alert
subject: A ticking time bomb
body:
| | | Peter,
---
We’re sitting on a time bomb.

The reality is, dangerous cartels now control our border.

These massive criminal enterprises capitalize on the Biden-created surge of illegal aliens to bypass our valiant but overwhelmed Border Patrol officers.

Amid the chaos they’ve established effective -- and lucrative -- smuggling operations, raking in billions of dollars by funneling people, lethal drugs, and weapons to criminal organizations in the U.S.
---
[**STOP THE CARTELS**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=1b4edcc5d4e442d1b33c7a3bdbbf60f2&_e=bDUttS2WrdMBPvUSg5zkMBVEg6oVUsk3sdqqGmTBC5XesX9HJ_jsxCCpcxPV-YmEaGk6kDduiCvcBF4qSXcd7aPmfVIIqSPlqwZauCs75_erYrXF_nJfqbyw4CLu1AVKmy1xPYvkMyAF9q4yxCXr5dirdfFqWZ2yG5paK1NhwZtGZLdlBKeV1TTapvoteBIhwNxBVRzEr1q5QV7mKVKa3Pz53iw3XaTDV4zwcaKXBofp7_cpmFVl8gjurTphoC4lq6cCrpcAc04KOK6g_HreRP2Bo6gjq2ZjUUmNGuTzcBKuiSf0h1mAyifdsElLRLQuXI0zibOvzdqmneQOUtDVV_uyiaYUpgU2qqDxToQjPc0%3D)
---
Peter, we’re already facing a breakdown of law and order _all up and down the southern border._

I won’t stand by and allow heavily armed and deadly cartels to destabilize Mexico, smuggle people, import deadly drugs, and murder our countrymen, so I’m working overtime to **authorize the use of military force against these vicious Mexican cartels.**

But holding Joe Biden accountable for the _massive_ national security threat he’s created at the border only makes the Democrats chomp at the bit for my defeat. **Peter, there’s a bright red target on my back, and I need your help to fend off these attacks from the radical Left.**

[**Please pitch in whatever you can ASAP to join my mission and FIGHT BACK against the violent cartels running our border.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=1b4edcc5d4e442d1b33c7a3bdbbf60f2&_e=bDUttS2WrdMBPvUSg5zkMBVEg6oVUsk3sdqqGmTBC5XesX9HJ_jsxCCpcxPV-YmEaGk6kDduiCvcBF4qSXcd7aPmfVIIqSPlqwZauCs75_erYrXF_nJfqbyw4CLu1AVKmy1xPYvkMyAF9q4yxCXr5dirdfFqWZ2yG5paK1NhwZtGZLdlBKeV1TTapvoteBIhCMFUQ1XBYgCR7kXZriGlb8Ipvtk6DdFdkOhp2qLBaShyZdUOkA6lr6KztY6kwgbTXilVpVCP7h23oGrNvG3iHVvxNbNRdxEDauggBpZPrYWyz-ZrveRVYgcsmR8dt1pk9nTRcPenR9PHd0JzrOer3_hI8XeLp_6dBFQLdlFMfKc%3D)

We must push our leaders to find common sense solutions to the rising prices on gas, utilities, and groceries. **The latest economic report from the Department of Labor showed that the 12-month inflation rate was 6.4% overall since last year with no signs of getting better.**

clean_body: Let's get serious...| | | Inflation continues to crush our country, and it's time for solutions... We must push our leaders to find common sense solutions to the rising prices on gas, utilities, and groceries. The latest economic report from the Department of Labor showed that the 12-month inflation rate was 6.4% overall since last year with no signs of getting better. But we know that it's possible to ease the effects of poor governing from Washington D.C. Just a few miles up the road, Governor Larry Hogan was instrumental in growing the economy of Maryland during hard economic times and together, we are advocating for our leaders to do the same... With your partnership, we can reverse the current course of Washington and make sure it works FOR the people. Thank you,Team An America United | | | | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | | | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | |

With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers, adding three new Democratic trifectas, and defending every single majority. **But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high.**
State Democrats are facing a slew of special elections over the next two months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November.
**Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. **
As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your state. **So can we count you in?**

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Prayers Needed/ Meal Train for The Perkins Family
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
---
| | | | | | Prayers Needed/ Meal Train for The Perkins Family
---
| It is with much sadness, I inform you the Louisa County Assistant Commonwealth Attorney Michael L. Perkins has passed. Michael leaves behind a wife and two children. My brother, Louisa County Commonwealth Attourney Rusty McGuire and team, have set up a Meal Train to help the family during this difficult time. Please pray for the family and go to the link below for details on how to help with meals and financial contributions for the children.

This is the Meal Train for The Perkins Family:
[https://mealtrain.com/2neeyq](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010n3pNRac-bsFmPvp2wsO0SRTwbB1pNAmon33tYUVsS1tlTiWBC63ZWTcfdgg7Lx-aHrXHVGyKtSa7-ZuL4HKAzN_Crxux9zNiilOeuzN4vfYAm4VoyFKHFMxy81H-eIbVzNTILj3nDfy2OepSSlT0w==&c=eQc2rTaorHTYApcsgL-E8qPxIhUeyuFlmrFQpgN2r0h9M_exVxw-uQ==&ch=MVb52t6dF_abHiQz2J0zrOcmM2bUd26cy9DMe5mJ_4ygHA1G1IkMiQ==)

Please share this email with others.
---
| | |
---
| I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| God Bless America,
---
---
Delegate John McGuire Running for [State Senate D10](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010n3pNRac-bsFmPvp2wsO0SRTwbB1pNAmon33tYUVsS1tlTiWBC63ZXBmGKajWW4EHEJ6O8pcFNkD50h3s-LThpZU4LNet1kTZC1q1EYa8CP9BFZtrxDUM_FLA-OOajG-G3Zr9NxT4yl09qdpjiYKNAfBIdNBuQ0zBwESaBrsgApEBcNY3vdvuNVGX7QzDnQ7&c=eQc2rTaorHTYApcsgL-E8qPxIhUeyuFlmrFQpgN2r0h9M_exVxw-uQ==&ch=MVb52t6dF_abHiQz2J0zrOcmM2bUd26cy9DMe5mJ_4ygHA1G1IkMiQ==) in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 [Speech](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010n3pNRac-bsFmPvp2wsO0SRTwbB1pNAmon33tYUVsS1tlTiWBC63ZaRDzdGoWdj4Xeb2ICirC7f0UN_l7Z5aDIj-gCXFF-BofmyZRbWC5e2x0eiB1zQPsOcLsay6CdKg-XwA2KIMAwUuycA84IUtuKicM_NoCq5l8ZUo6Mkr3xTzJPFMqyjXIg==&c=eQc2rTaorHTYApcsgL-E8qPxIhUeyuFlmrFQpgN2r0h9M_exVxw-uQ==&ch=MVb52t6dF_abHiQz2J0zrOcmM2bUd26cy9DMe5mJ_4ygHA1G1IkMiQ==) NFIB 100 Endorsement List [Click Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010n3pNRac-bsFmPvp2wsO0SRTwbB1pNAmon33tYUVsS1tlTiWBC63Zch6tcRb8P5CGj5goapyv6ckIMvKD56BoyqqPKjhg7hE8xbRQmN2ZvUnRe5psqGEbNLbchXpPWFfUfy0_RxZ3ZRQQWmsYaL_VARqTjMALXAaAkfdG5nSvJom2fpjz8WqKQ==&c=eQc2rTaorHTYApcsgL-E8qPxIhUeyuFlmrFQpgN2r0h9M_exVxw-uQ==&ch=MVb52t6dF_abHiQz2J0zrOcmM2bUd26cy9DMe5mJ_4ygHA1G1IkMiQ==) The SD 10 Convention is May 6 Buckingham High School. name: Val Hoyle
subject: We were wrong about the Dobbs decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59087974/393170611/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGVkYmVkMC1jZmIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9IOALDsh6b3MxWZtE9PFF1uJRB9E0nwZKRQ4J62X-WM=&emci=8a387c01-33b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=78edbed0-cfb2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, Last year, lots of people said that the Supreme Court's disastrous anti-choice _Dobbs_ decision last year was the culmination of a long right-wing campaign to take away our reproductive rights. They were wrong. name: Your America
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07452%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7f%2f27do9U%2b1q8fNg2RpcyA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07453%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q3g6ISEiqp7Q8pY%2beHOHbA&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07454%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5UB4c1%2fKOf7VkhdukDQOIg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07465%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KAbm2B7o13aItX5BHAehkg&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.
They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.
It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.**
**[I can’t do it without your support, Peter. Can I count on you to step up and become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign today so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59088205/393171474/-453895337?refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230222_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjI2OGUwOC1kMWIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vgEipZjY8H6oolItcE70V-8lD-itgsi9VhNywIEHeVo=)**

I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.
**And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected.**
It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.
Thanks,
Jon
