name: Jon Tester
subject: You don't need ten fingers to know right from wrong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, it’s Jon Tester.

**I’m not a career politician and I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country.

[I just officially announced that I’m running for re-election, so here’s the part where I need to ask: Will you split a $5 donation between me and the DSCC to become a founding donor of my campaign and protect the progress we’ve made for working Americans?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=9925%2E9716520%2EAA-OlR)**

| | [DONATE](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=9925%2E9716520%2EAA-OlR)
---

Let me tell you a little story.

I grew up on my family’s farm, and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.

When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to the doctor.

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=9925%2E9716520%2EAA-OlR)
Here’s why I’m telling you this: Just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, **my background is what keeps me grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.**

With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.

**[But in order to win this race so we can keep fighting for families like yours, my team says we need to raise $1,000,000 in the first 24 hours of our campaign launch. So please, will you split $5 between my campaign and the DSCC?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=9&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=9925%2E9716520%2EAA-OlR)**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Jon Tester and the DSCC.

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=10&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=9925%2E9716520%2EAA-OlR)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=11&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=9925%2E9716520%2EAA-OlR)
---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=12&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=9925%2E9716520%2EAA-OlR)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=9925%2E9716520%2EAA-OlR)
---

You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.

I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign.

Thanks again,

Jon

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=14&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=9925%2E9716520%2EAA-OlR)

Jon Tester, the Senate’s only working farmer, is running for re-election in Montana to continue fighting for working families, veterans, and ordinary folks across the country.

**[Chip in now to help Jon keep Montana's seat blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=9925%2E9716520%2EAA-OlR)**
| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230222-JonTester-TesterTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=9925%2E9716520%2EAA-OlR)

* Requires citizens to get **GOVERNMENT PERMISSION** to exercise their 2nd Amendment rights
* Allows citizens' **PRIVATE INFORMATION** to be added to a government registry

We can't sit back and watch our rights be taken away. **And we won't!** **If this situation proves anything, it's that our courts are the last line of defense we have in protecting our rights.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your Update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132828?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

Lawmakers are moving at full speed through the session. It is imperative that Mississippians stay up to date with what is going on during the legislative session and stay knowledgeable on topics that directly affect citizens.

Here is your weekly update on bills we favor that have received some action this past week!

**_SB 2019_ from Sen. Chad McMahan and _HB 1661_ from Rep. Jody Steverson would remove the sales tax from gold, silver and other coins and currencies.** These bills would shrink the size of bureaucracy and encourages Mississippians to invest in sound money.

These bills have passed their respective chambers and have been transmitted to the other.

**_HB 549_ from Rep. Karl Oliver exempts certain sales of property transported from this state and first used in another state. **

This bill passed the House floor and has been transmitted to the Senate.

**_SB 2735_ from Sen. Angela Hill clarifies the scope of a mayoral veto. **The bill requires that a mayor cannot enter into any contract or spend more than $100 without approval from city council or aldermen.

This bill has passed the Senate floor and has been referred to the House Judiciary B committee.

**_HB 1310_ from Rep. Brent Powell revise provisions related to the integrity of elections. **This bill would help ensure election integrity by giving the Secretary of State more jurisdiction to audit elections.

This bill passed the House and has been referred to the Senate Elections and Accountability, Efficiency and Transparency committees.

**As of now, no income tax elimination bills have been considered in committee. **

After last year's historic income tax cut, discussion surrounding further tax cuts was being generated throughout the legislature. Several bills involving full income tax elimination, grocery tax elimination and rebate checks were introduced, but none have been brought up in committee hearings. Lawmakers have until the end of the day today for tax bills to come out of their committees.

Have a good week!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=65e5fdc2fd&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
| _PS you can stay up to date with every bill introduced during the session through the [2023 Legislative Tracker](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2186000724&e=5703353baa) found on our website. _
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=5edcd8e0ee) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=5edcd8e0ee).

body:

| | **Abortion rights are under attack in all 50 states. That's not hyperbole.** Here's what's going on: In the coming days, a right-wing Texas judge (hand-picked by Donald Trump) is set to rule on a case that could ban the abortion medication mifepristone nationwide. More than 50% of abortions in the United States are through medication. **If this ban is put into place, women in every state, even states that protect the right to abortion, will lose access to critical reproductive care.** Last week, Ron took to the Senate floor to do something he's never done: he called on the FDA and President Biden to ignore the ruling if this extremist judge decides to ban mifepristone. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59090038/393178857/-2044921950?refcode=2023-02-22-abortionpills-r&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0d74da61-d4b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDc0ZGE2MS1kNGIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RPtvq7mTAGW15drxP3Sh7mG6dOVK17AMHbgrez2AFX0=) Ron is exactly right. This is a battle with too much at stake. We must take decisive action to ensure that women across the nation do not lose access to this critical medication. Not for one week, one day, one hour. [**Can you chip in now and join the fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59090039/393178858/-2044921950?refcode=2023-02-22-abortionpills-r&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0d74da61-d4b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDc0ZGE2MS1kNGIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RPtvq7mTAGW15drxP3Sh7mG6dOVK17AMHbgrez2AFX0=) This judge, Matthew Kacsmaryk, has already earned the title of the most lawless judge in the country. He's known as an anti-abortion zealot and right-wing activist. **Kacsmaryk is preparing to use his power as a judge to create a legal loophole to circumvent the will of the people and criminalize abortion pills.** Republicans have placed right-wing activist judges in seats across the country, all the way up to the Supreme Court. They have eroded public trust in our judicial system. They've stripped away the constitutional right to privacy. Now, they're looking to take away even more rights. We must take a stand against their lawlessness. **[Chip in now to help elect strong pro-choice leaders who aren't afraid to speak truth to power.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59090040/393178859/-2044921950?refcode=2023-02-22-abortionpills-r&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0d74da61-d4b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDc0ZGE2MS1kNGIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RPtvq7mTAGW15drxP3Sh7mG6dOVK17AMHbgrez2AFX0=)** name: VADEMS
subject: 2023’s most important elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Virginia has elected its first black woman to Congress.

|
---
Derek, The 2023 elections are well underway and the stakes are higher than ever. We’ve had **THREE** attempts by Republicans to ban abortion so far this year, a $201 million error with public education funds, and Youngkin cutting taxes for big corporations. body:
Oregon’s Attorney General is on a crusade against 2A rights. You can help us fight back.| | | 🚨 **2ND AMENDMENT ALERT** 🚨** ** Oregon’s Attorney General is on a crusade against responsible gun owners.
---
[**DEFEND YOUR RIGHTS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a8d665d4dd184d31994f45db39a9d579&_e=6rouhr9fXgOamaukXN2bPocp9mRluYgdgqQq-Th9OOsAyiVaCxxHEjhk58a9iHyMZonoi4dU0umYnAZWfPtCQ5336C8oI6z0yaMCuTWLksm3glzGp5Asmf3bFLW79bHVHiKggXUr6qbROByInvC-2RFrZTggzuCo35yu1pGLekWJsipjqS1L7Q1phy6Lb4MYDhKQZV8vHmkOGdpUneuo8iYFIlwPhMhCcEPDeVA1thm2bAahJ9z8vc8asOKdfFCy3dXitwhj7udxbxIb6y1AUbSYt9YssdYnwKzyV7mtD2snYOioyz9_upNyNMx7fkzz7VzFwG4ksA78npLOg8zrzzvZsQUiLAYXgye8Zgn-p4gqsQNoMnOLLtu0e5IaCZxvrgma3R3krdYqL2EmCVUQpA%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, For months responsible gun owners in Oregon have been on the edge of their seats, waiting to see if their rights will be stripped away. _[Measure 114](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a8d665d4dd184d31994f45db39a9d579&_e=6rouhr9fXgOamaukXN2bPocp9mRluYgdgqQq-Th9OOsAyiVaCxxHEjhk58a9iHyMZonoi4dU0umYnAZWfPtCQ5336C8oI6z0yaMCuTWLksm3glzGp5Asmf3bFLW79bHVHiKggXUr6qbROByInvC-2RFrZTggzuCo35yu1pGLekWJsipjqS1L7Q1phy6Lb4MYDhKQZV8vHmkOGdpUneuo8iYFIlwPhMhCcEPDeVA1thl2cYGvTcPwSRrprfKEYFqD9gjg7-QZDku3I2GZxCmHlN-VIp8Bns6FGkxjXa3tF9WdsbwFAzrWdaaj3270bCC-DoPLf7zfwO2nsmzgBg4jydAs_umlnRKD2xi_ZoO2ozpMAs-YdLBAGbNHvWPRlVCe1pQEhcre23EndFV0xok_qg%3D%3D)_ , Oregon’s new proposed gun law, is the nation's MOST restrictive gun control initiative. It...
* Places an **UNCONSTITUTIONAL** ban on ammo magazines with more than 10-rounds
* Requires citizens to get **GOVERNMENT PERMISSION** to exercise their 2nd Amendment rights
* Allows citizens’ **PRIVATE INFORMATION** to be added to a government registry

Luckily, the initiative was recently struck down by a judge in Oregon - but this fight is far from over... Ellen Rosenblum, Oregon's Attorney General, has made it her personal mission to deny law-abiding citizens their 2nd Amendment rights.
She's petitioning the State Supreme Court, helping introduce new legislation, and advocating for strict gun control measures. _[**HELP STOP HER! >>>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a8d665d4dd184d31994f45db39a9d579&_e=6rouhr9fXgOamaukXN2bPocp9mRluYgdgqQq-Th9OOsAyiVaCxxHEjhk58a9iHyMZonoi4dU0umYnAZWfPtCQ5336C8oI6z0yaMCuTWLksm3glzGp5Asmf3bFLW79bHVHiKggXUr6qbROByInvC-2RFrZTggzuCo35yu1pGLekWJsipjqS1L7Q1phy6Lb4MYDhKQZV8vHmkOGdpUneuo8iYFIlwPhMhCcEPDeVA1thlg3RFm_i_UfUQ_EySKegmPv29wEljt0mEKOQf26CqMah78dorAIWp-KCN2MGO_Qus465KIi4T9KREP9PBzLfPNSxYf1yquSeuVKXero_kRtCWybSQP9SJL_n1VouOrz1flaVk_2f0xZzXmCyH72JugADOcO4IgfbVd_1S9fBFOaQ%3D%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a8d665d4dd184d31994f45db39a9d579&_e=6rouhr9fXgOamaukXN2bPocp9mRluYgdgqQq-Th9OOsAyiVaCxxHEjhk58a9iHyMZonoi4dU0umYnAZWfPtCQ5336C8oI6z0yaMCuTWLksm3glzGp5Asmf3bFLW79bHVHiKggXUr6qbROByInvC-2RFrZTggzuCo35yu1pGLekWJsipjqS1L7Q1phy6Lb4MYDhKQZV8vHmkOGdpUneuo8iYFIlwPhMhCcEPDeVA1thm5fMaqLgvbtjZD_G2Mq5uSr_pMx929GEhQ0_0-9WZcX-gryt2ZwGHsOdZ3itpfAU9UBQOawtF_rmNC6QtPVn5Ddm-DXa0eSvg4cEjw0qugIwRlmLg5NXmv3ImBfDwKuduRXOZPUdrVsCkkujWm7ylezNroTCnxWx_7_O6I9lxKxQ%3D%3D)
---
We can't sit back and watch our rights be taken away. **And we won't!** **If this situation proves anything, it's that our courts are the last line of defense we have in protecting our rights.**
---
[**SUPPORT OUR COURTS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a8d665d4dd184d31994f45db39a9d579&_e=6rouhr9fXgOamaukXN2bPocp9mRluYgdgqQq-Th9OOsAyiVaCxxHEjhk58a9iHyMZonoi4dU0umYnAZWfPtCQ5336C8oI6z0yaMCuTWLksm3glzGp5Asmf3bFLW79bHVHiKggXUr6qbROByInvC-2RFrZTggzuCo35yu1pGLekWJsipjqS1L7Q1phy6Lb4MYDhKQZV8vHmkOGdpUneuo8iYFIlwPhMhCcEPDeVA1thko7QNvbto_ZDDdDy_VkJQCJwRX20ZaoDtXdzlI9c5pSHQuElKo1vvyJr7ddiCX7RZM983h7XrDzCPAtL5xQ1y_PYBicfqjnebc2MBIh4SMuKXv5j5v_4hdTQFGEsH-bCs3GaJGvfldJB6mbW8E9HMaA20w5tGo0t3o_PXs6_PFBQ%3D%3D)

So when the left comes for our rights, they’re there to protect us. **Peter, we need your help. Any amount you can give will support our efforts to protect our rights. The woke mob wants unconstitutional gun control, and only one thing can stop them from achieving their goals: YOU.**

Jon

clean_body: | = Peter, I have an exciting announcement and I want you to be the first to know: I’m officially running for reelection here in Montana. I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago. They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running. It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: = = = I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate. And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected. It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all. clean_body: I am proud to say the Jane Fonda Climate PAC made a difference in the last election cycle by electing climate champions up and down the ballot. | = | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. Recently, I was on Who’s Talking to Chris Wallace? and I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss what I said on the show. = = | = | = I am proud to say the Jane Fonda Climate PAC made a difference in the last election cycle by electing climate champions up and down the ballot thanks to your support. I emphasized how the candidates we endorsed took a stand against new pipeline projects, fracking, and forever chemicals. Most importantly, I spoke about how climate champions are not afraid to speak up against the fossil fuel industry that’s killing our planet. We need their leadership now more than ever and with your support, we will continue to elect climate champions at every level of government. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Every dollar you invest has an immediate impact on our program. name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: two quick questions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Sometimes serving in Congress feels like being pulled in two different directions.

Hey folks,

Sometimes serving in Congress feels like being pulled in two different directions.

On the one hand, I’m fighting to make progress wherever I can for Colorado families — and that means building bipartisan relationships and working with colleagues from all over the political spectrum.

On the other hand, the Republican majority has put forward one devastating piece of legislation after another — and I know my constituents are counting on me to stand up against bills that would harm them and their families.

**I really value your input, team, and that’s why I’m coming to you with two simple questions. I’d like to know what issue you’d most like to see Congress make bipartisan progress on — and which right-wing GOP proposal you’re most concerned about.**

**[Will you please complete this quick two-question survey? I’d really appreciate your thoughts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59091499/393184339/-1686483894?refcode=email_022123_twoquestions&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDYxY2I0Mi1kOWIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTnbfEvLQrJZlwc6OiL64WWHykLfx9mPBYwZ0PDkIto=&emci=362acb8c-01b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=9461cb42-d9b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=19954364)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59091500/393184340/-1686483894?refcode=email_022123_twoquestions&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDYxY2I0Mi1kOWIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTnbfEvLQrJZlwc6OiL64WWHykLfx9mPBYwZ0PDkIto=&emci=362acb8c-01b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=9461cb42-d9b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=19954364)

From the day I launched my campaign for Congress last year, our fight has been about helping the regular families whose needs so often go overlooked in the halls of Washington.

I will never take for granted the responsibility the people of Colorado’s 7th District have entrusted me with, and I’m working every single day to make you proud.

**[The best way to succeed is to work together, so if you could take just a moment to complete our short survey, it would really help me out.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59091501/393184341/-1686483894?refcode=email_022123_twoquestions&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDYxY2I0Mi1kOWIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTnbfEvLQrJZlwc6OiL64WWHykLfx9mPBYwZ0PDkIto=&emci=362acb8c-01b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=9461cb42-d9b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=19954364)**

Brittany

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Our resident traitor in the House, Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59091533/393184460/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY2OWY2Ni1kOWIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_WCai1EJTH4hVt_QYfoyHVPUA4-zW-BodAkllQROPM=)
Friends —
Did you see this tweet from Marjorie Taylor Greene? Our resident House traitor is at it again, but this time preaching secession.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59091534/393184461/764803323?refcode2=95669f66-d9b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230222-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY2OWY2Ni1kOWIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_WCai1EJTH4hVt_QYfoyHVPUA4-zW-BodAkllQROPM=)
Marjorie Taylor Greene has said a lot of harmful things — from spreading conspiracy theories, comparing mask mandates to the Holocaust, and even posting that Democrats she didn't like should be executed on social media. But for a United States Representative to suggest secession is treasonous and un-American. Period.
Her antics are more than harmful to our country, they’re dangerous and preach a message of division. And it’s shameful that Kevin McCarthy is too afraid to hold her to account. We cannot let House Republicans sweep her treasonous ideas under the rug because they're afraid of her. We need to hold them all accountable.
[**Please support my movement today so I can continue fighting against the far-right’s message and strategy to divide us. With you by my side, I can continue to hold Marjorie Taylor Greene and all far-right Republicans accountable in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59091535/393184462/764803323?refcode2=95669f66-d9b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230222-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY2OWY2Ni1kOWIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_WCai1EJTH4hVt_QYfoyHVPUA4-zW-BodAkllQROPM=)
Marjorie Taylor Green is a danger to our democracy and we cannot allow her to continue to use her influence to spread hate and division.
\- Robert Garcia

clean_body: = Friends — Did you see this tweet from Marjorie Taylor Greene? Our resident House traitor is at it again, but this time preaching secession. = Marjorie Taylor Greene has said a lot of harmful things — from spreading conspiracy theories, comparing mask mandates to the Holocaust, and even posting that Democrats she didn't like should be executed on social media. But for a United States Representative to suggest secession is treasonous and un-American. Period. Her antics are more than harmful to our country, they’re dangerous and preach a message of division. And it’s shameful that Kevin McCarthy is too afraid to hold her to account. We cannot let House Republicans sweep her treasonous ideas under the rug because they're afraid of her. We need to hold them all accountable. = Marjorie Taylor Green is a danger to our democracy and we cannot allow her to continue to use her influence to spread hate and division. \- Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z06h6q1ng2j41no4t30ii34k6m9igob9f22a54lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chg6ap72c5h2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrto55t6skst8198te9r67dtqcl9qh2p79i2uoq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chg6ap72c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn79jitaa89btpc6oia4i7vr8rgkc1ibl5thcatg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chg6ap72c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

body:

Friend,

Congress begins its first public hearings on President Joe Biden's family, including Hunter and his ties to foreign companies.

But you won't find anything about it in the mainstream media.

_**ABC, CBS, and NBC refuse to give these stories the attention they deserve. **_

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the ONLY conservative organization dedicated to exposing the liars on ABC, CBS, NBC, and the rest of the Fake News media.

In fact, our work has successfully gotten CNN staff FIRED from their jobs.

Click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount today. >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8541f600e5914674a812538a1a576faf&_e=uYOAgUzMDE95mhsHTI8Rm4g8nPXCAlAGQZD7AdmTccpTzWt5IAsj7OUf7Q0xvT38JC-OJwB88zCeSUemVr0VciQawvjbyh1nigkCqaGk9CSzt-7aZwDitquOfNghLASU46_j7qSWZEZnjMmFyh2mbhnNSAyC6fvups5HsKjtPXqhs8fSILy_-3AiDF-r5apOwTre6pPqtCQ62quK0-m6_ZirV4v1gBpZTh06GzRuAxHwsSjMna87XgCDtkjy9UgCgBj1aPmnpLLxpao6c_uqWA%3D%3D)

**Here are 10 breaking Hunter Biden stories and how long the left-wing media covered them.**

2. Hunter Email on Ukraine Awfully Specific, Raises Questions About His Access to Classified Docs In Biden House- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
3. Hunter Email Offered to Sell Intel on Russian Oligarchs to Alcoa- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
4. Hunter Had a Home Office in Same Delaware House as Classified Documents- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
5. Joe Biden's Niece Offered $85K Job from Major Biden Donor, She Called it "Below Minimum Wage"\- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
6. Joe Biden Named In Email Found on Hunter Laptop In Seeking Multi-Million Dollar Natural Gas Deal with China- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
7. Hunter Allegedly Refused to Pay Female Assistant, Unless She Sent Him Nude Pics- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
8. Hunter Had Access to Joe's Corvette That Was Garaged Next to Classified Docs- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**

10. Hunter's Art Dealer Stonewalls House GOP Investigation- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**

Any one of these stories would've been widely covered if it was a Republican President's son, but the left-wing media has been almost completely silent.

I am counting on you to help us reach our $10,000 goal before March to expose the radical left-wing media. Your support empowers MRC to expose liars in the media, spread the truth, and ultimately save Free Speech.

_He’s right!_ For years, Republican politicians have used anti-democratic tactics to win unearned power...and they have no plans of changing their strategy.

**We’ll be blunt, team: The future of free and fair elections in our country depends on how we respond to this ongoing threat.** A.G. Holder explained why:
**“Our democracy is still at risk.** We should not think that because we had a fairly good result in the last election that everything is fine.

There are still people who are determined **through gerrymandering, through voter suppression, through attacks on our election infrastructure** in our nation to try to come up with ways to hold on to power to which they are not entitled...

**That’s why we’ve been fighting to make sure the process is fair.”**
---
_He’s right about that, too._ As long as Republicans are committed to using map manipulation and attacks on voting rights to win elections, those of us who believe in democracy must remain _just as committed_ to fighting for a level playing field.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Leon=20Benjamin?=
subject: Election Results
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, Inc
body:
Last night's election results. | | | |
---
| | |
#### For Immediate Release:
---
|
---
| Special Election Results
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 22, 2023**

Waverly Woods
Campaign Manager
_info@Benjamin4Congress.com_
804-352-3348

**Richmond, VA** \- Leon Benjamin makes a statement after last night's special election results.

"We are saddened by the results of last night's election. While we worked very hard to bring conservative values to the 4th District, we did not prevail in turning the district red.

I want to take this opportunity to thank everyone who came out yesterday to vote in the Special Election. The republic was hard at work even though we came up short.

I could not have made it this far without my wonderful team and volunteers. I owe them my gratitude. I also want to thank my wife, Maria, and my children for standing by me through this election. I also want to thank my congregation for their prayers and support.

We will continue to work hard to bring conservative values to the 4th and fight for the American people. I am committed to fighting against tyranny, wokeness, division, and opponents to our Constitution. Communism, Marxism, and Socialism have no place in our country.

As a man once said, "United we stand, divided we fall."

Let us continue to move forward to see this nation become a shining city on a hill that cannot be hidden. God Bless America."

###
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, Inc.

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m personally asking you to join my reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I’m a farmer
#
Can I explain something, Peter?
I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a farmer.**
Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.
I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.
The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.
**And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.**
**[That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $5 between my campaign and Senator Durbin’s today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59093032/393189620/359265235?refcode=dd_em_230222_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTA4ZTJlOS1kYmIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZYidnyFd5YfIdTGx8L01ICsHY0wRwq19-pIXVv2JOUc=)**

name: Team TNDP
subject: Biden's Agenda for Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Peter,

President Biden is rebuilding the backbone of America — our middle and working class — and he's making huge progress:

• A record 12 million jobs created since Biden took office — almost as many jobs in two years as any President ever has in a four-year term
• More than half a million jobs created just last month
• 800,000 manufacturing jobs created in last two years — a faster recovery than any other business cycle since 1953
• Lowest unemployment rate in 54 years — just 3.4%
• Black (5.4%) and Hispanic (4.5%) unemployment near record lows

It's clear that his economic plan is working. But because of pushback from MAGA extremists like Marsha Blackburn, we're at a crossroads as a nation. The choice we make together will decide the future of our country for decades to come. Which is why we've got to get to work and change the tide here in Tennessee.

If you're ready to get to work, then donate $10 right now to help us build Democratic infrastructure in Tennessee to support Biden's agenda for America. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
$25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
$50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
$100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

President Biden and the Democrats capped the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare. But we must finish the job and cap the cost for everyone at $35. Biden passed the Inflation Reduction Act — the most significant investment ever in fighting climate change. But there's still more work to do. We must codify Roe v. Wade and expand Medicaid. We've got to continue cutting costs for working families wherever possible.

President Biden has been working, but it's going to take all of us together to finish the job and complete his agenda. Can you donate $10 right now to help us get there? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Together, we can build a better Tennessee and America for all.

Team TNDP

Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party.Carol V. Abney, Treasurer.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c2d8bf0a6cc4d72a6f4fdedb658448d&_e=tZ8wFumSDgnm1tGis1R4heAd9fjhGZuEaVSIT-E30v5Ru1RyoNKoCKqfsoGj_8JnZuiPQ3mPkzgDbXjccFhDz6ORSpTihtQ_wRizJk_0qlWjieYb8HK5ekt7Cfv_II0FW-yVTlmQ3atVDACIAI95TWyv2fyxE_Xig90TRtG_b7AOk_Qfbh2It-p9FuO4OLPtQY4faFG_OTcVqBx5orw1fQb9rlQaYYACeywKUHwMbBDVXtjpgMBtcCn6F52TczB8a5Rb_djXjuqav8DMfk3koxDNP3VsAmA731O3-Im0AVrc1ci0KcCXXjOWqxq3CpnNgnj6Y4vL3WjVNZTFasOAyfiPj6i6h2tpQ-818YAadLGPmJjbC62VbdJpI7P1YKjB)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Does America need a "Great Reset?"
In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.
As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life.
A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives.
**This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c2d8bf0a6cc4d72a6f4fdedb658448d&_e=tZ8wFumSDgnm1tGis1R4heAd9fjhGZuEaVSIT-E30v5Ru1RyoNKoCKqfsoGj_8JnZuiPQ3mPkzgDbXjccFhDz6ORSpTihtQ_wRizJk_0qlWjieYb8HK5ekt7Cfv_II0FW-yVTlmQ3atVDACIAI95TWyv2fyxE_Xig90TRtG_b7AOk_Qfbh2It-p9FuO4OLPtQY4faFG_OTcVqBx5orw1fQb9rlQaYYACeywKUHwMbBBSb2VBPVIchFr_rtDEFYczSG20Lqr_Y6BOZuO_20lAJSaiDoRk6BYHh3aJX-ADnLtwl7CcH49NZNzNRz072M5BMioN4Kchflde2Ri0IHlSgk3gJEn5e4GguBy0jYAcHUkMpQVtrX0CQeyO7Xammvzv)****["](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c2d8bf0a6cc4d72a6f4fdedb658448d&_e=tZ8wFumSDgnm1tGis1R4heAd9fjhGZuEaVSIT-E30v5Ru1RyoNKoCKqfsoGj_8JnZuiPQ3mPkzgDbXjccFhDz6ORSpTihtQ_wRizJk_0qlWjieYb8HK5ekt7Cfv_II0FW-yVTlmQ3atVDACIAI95TWyv2fyxE_Xig90TRtG_b7AOk_Qfbh2It-p9FuO4OLPtQY4faFG_OTcVqBx5orw1fQb9rlQaYYACeywKUHwMbBB3eEKTHrCPiqFZ24EL7BfzTwWnhaxRExIuHfAav10-poVCFRjdrn_VBfveHQ-XgBN-kZFtfiEpfN1i3VyBSdNS0TTpQMf5TQr84WdXGBu_h9QLwfPXstwByTzXWczpNjZf4r0Zwvexjnc8lErq_7bO) --is now available as a free online video series.**

In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. [**Jon is a grounded and focused leader and a voice of reason in the Senate chamber. He is 100% focused on delivering for Montana and his seat is also crucial to maintaining our Democratic majority. That's why I need to ask: are you able to make a contribution today to help kick off Senator Tester's re-election campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59094170/393193898/360050458?refcode=&refcode2=89362e99-dfb2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=4uMHFiqvKg4QAr+s4pq/mErRFCXYBIk6rBznvXJ7TweM/QXqDc55uygJALNVA/oB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTM2MmU5OS1kZmIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZWmdjBaUuc8ZSzUvV1VVh795UNoSSahjl4PyyxG-H3Q=)

This race is going to be one of the most competitive in 2024 and the Republican money machine has already launched attack ads against Jon. Over $70 million was spent in 2018, so we’re gearing up for the most expensive and competitive race Montana has ever seen.
[**If we lose Montana, Democrats can kiss our Senate majority goodbye. I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.

They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.

It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.**

[**I can’t do it without your support, team. Can I count on you to step up and become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign today so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40933?t=13&akid=6490%2E878179%2EX-6dJJ)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40934?t=14&akid=6490%2E878179%2EX-6dJJ)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40935?t=15&akid=6490%2E878179%2EX-6dJJ)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40936?t=16&akid=6490%2E878179%2EX-6dJJ)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40937?t=17&akid=6490%2E878179%2EX-6dJJ)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40938?t=18&akid=6490%2E878179%2EX-6dJJ)
I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.

**And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected.**

It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.

Thanks,

Jon
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6490%2E878179%2EX-6dJJ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6490%2E878179%2EX-6dJJ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6490%2E878179%2EX-6dJJ) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=6490%2E878179%2EX-6dJJ). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6490%2E878179%2EX-6dJJ)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
In an interview published in Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ea7b65067de4dc5896ec42eef6e180a&_e=_d03eVN0om1IptUuvz4aXLX8glzOUVV4gFEiFcZj60Bl7zF6vwK4XBbyUeOOuyKH7BAojmhbRqqJGo6w2pI0Pt-K7qdHIJ6vr0TGwXumTPm5WMpTMRsgq8AJw40jPhpVCRW4xS7xh0ebM53LJpMFOL3CWRPxtlrp-qV74Dz5bY1pbYI4i0bJ_jj4RI0rrz6jKyph8-iGJqIk1-G59dJydMJCppu6VXJHv8HSTELKL44FR8Z3xxcmDwhZ1BXyjCFrAMqMrPo7422JTvuSUpgCzzjNN3HciuFkV_Eo952rqH_rcVE81BxQW3hHiR0WHgRfF24u66WIq4_fx86oP8QsHmp8TXNY18cEyEYVs9IMBnykbDBEk2EG5D94I5_g4aj97f8Ko3ahmJ-dVrnLblrbEw%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ea7b65067de4dc5896ec42eef6e180a&_e=_d03eVN0om1IptUuvz4aXLX8glzOUVV4gFEiFcZj60Bl7zF6vwK4XBbyUeOOuyKH7BAojmhbRqqJGo6w2pI0Pt-K7qdHIJ6vr0TGwXumTPm5WMpTMRsgq8AJw40jPhpVCRW4xS7xh0ebM53LJpMFOL3CWRPxtlrp-qV74Dz5bY1pbYI4i0bJ_jj4RI0rrz6jKyph8-iGJqIk1-G59dJydMJCppu6VXJHv8HSTELKL44FR8Z3xxcmDwhZ1BXyjCFrKIzA6Q1wYrKp_ADjJXzpUIaasnC6sZRK-Hw72Nz7qbvL0J64rxS9fJx0zgST6utgtW8mKFM8_f3UbkXSrk9_tSx0Stf7AkogfVUz5ePFUUeLzsjj-bP1H23R6mqPGYUXUQ6JAAtlQkcPlRONagQEpg%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ea7b65067de4dc5896ec42eef6e180a&_e=_d03eVN0om1IptUuvz4aXLX8glzOUVV4gFEiFcZj60Bl7zF6vwK4XBbyUeOOuyKH7BAojmhbRqqJGo6w2pI0Pt-K7qdHIJ6vr0TGwXumTPm5WMpTMRsgq8AJw40jPhpVCRW4xS7xh0ebM53LJpMFOL3CWRPxtlrp-qV74Dz5bY1pbYI4i0bJ_jj4RI0rrz6jKyph8-iGJqIk1-G59dJydMJCppu6VXJHv8HSTELKL44FR8Z3xxcmDwhZ1BXyjCFrz3SP9iT0T-aez3kGlIMzVCvPMtEp3e9IJkaalytZ5ZLLLvksLk2eGv7kK1yIAV93rrzzQIDDaAgzblV9QhL9gO9jppt_fgU2-v4Yr0qvFd9MSiukXep7fOnIFh-iRYRWBJ6LkLCMjYk4ZaUnTSq9Bg%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ea7b65067de4dc5896ec42eef6e180a&_e=_d03eVN0om1IptUuvz4aXLX8glzOUVV4gFEiFcZj60Bl7zF6vwK4XBbyUeOOuyKH7BAojmhbRqqJGo6w2pI0Pt-K7qdHIJ6vr0TGwXumTPm5WMpTMRsgq8AJw40jPhpVCRW4xS7xh0ebM53LJpMFOL3CWRPxtlrp-qV74Dz5bY1pbYI4i0bJ_jj4RI0rrz6jKyph8-iGJqIk1-G59dJydMJCppu6VXJHv8HSTELKL44FR8Z3xxcmDwhZ1BXyjCFrdkIeduN0PUldNRj6pb-nYbaLYclcsrRSF8mB48G84OYBTOJMT5ZOvXdnYTpR550BHl70FMwUGJIorpmpsfTcZVOrG7w2t9ELY0hcp5ElzBFsk8nZuJ7xLAU-s86Sr_gzVgAOya3Z5t2jj_Q_wbQ3wA%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ea7b65067de4dc5896ec42eef6e180a&_e=_d03eVN0om1IptUuvz4aXLX8glzOUVV4gFEiFcZj60Bl7zF6vwK4XBbyUeOOuyKH7BAojmhbRqqJGo6w2pI0Pt-K7qdHIJ6vr0TGwXumTPm5WMpTMRsgq8AJw40jPhpVCRW4xS7xh0ebM53LJpMFOL3CWRPxtlrp-qV74Dz5bY1pbYI4i0bJ_jj4RI0rrz6jKyph8-iGJqIk1-G59dJydMJCppu6VXJHv8HSTELKL44FR8Z3xxcmDwhZ1BXyjCFryVwyDnXR_CH2_uDBe0Tje8-tq6hIYq2b9TGizEatfSYvt95yekFNIlvgknWvx_6nRYzjKo99fcnDidTYlumVjvplwFLAL0Y_q1F2FwyICm9FGIJSFE9jcGxNuTSkOLPdP5ZQQVU0AaQhQfNPoiTypA%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Did you see what Marjorie Taylor Greene said?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The GOP is constitutionally illiterate.
#
Peter,
_**Did you see this?**_ This week, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene publicly called for a "separation" of red and blue states — in effect publicly calling for Republican-held states to secede from the rest of the country.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/37906?t=1&akid=2199%2E420207%2EySAXtj)
**It's abundantly clear:** Marjorie and other MAGA Republicans have clearly never glanced at the Constitution. For a party that considers itself "patriotic", it's alarming to see some of these same voices openly calling for secession.
Our movement isn't backing down. We are as committed as ever to fight the GOP's attempts to dismantle the democracy they so clearly detest — but we can't do this alone. **[If you're able to, can you pitch in to help our movement continue the fight against the GOP's ever more extreme agenda?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/37721?refcode=em20230222-2199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2199%2E420207%2EySAXtj)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/37721?refcode=em20230222-2199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2199%2E420207%2EySAXtj)**
**Let us be clear:_these extremists are not patriots._** We cannot underscore how dangerous this type of rhetoric is. We've seen the consequences of their behavior with an increase in far-right violence that culminated in the seditious attack on our democracy on January 6. The far-right "fringe" in Republican circles has become the mainstream. **They have no solutions, except apparently to encourage secession by a "national divorce."**
**We know that the American people are behind us too.** Despite the pundits telling us all otherwise, democracy itself proved to be a winning issue that resonated with voters, with most Trump-backed election deniers losing.
These far-right extremists are obsessed with control — control over our lives, our bodies, our futures, and our democracy. **We will not let them succeed.** Our coalition is building an inclusive and pro-democratic movement.
Failing to act would be disastrous for millions across the country. Our determination to strengthen our democracy will continue with or without the GOP. [**Can we count on your $3 donation today to support our efforts to curb the GOP's threat to our democracy?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/37721?refcode=em20230222-2199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2199%2E420207%2EySAXtj)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/37721?refcode=em20230222-2199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2199%2E420207%2EySAXtj)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230222-2199-footer&t=24&refcode2=2199_420207_ySAXtj&akid=2199%2E420207%2EySAXtj)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=2199%2E420207%2EySAXtj)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2199%2E420207%2EySAXtj)

I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.

They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.

It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.**
**[_I can’t do it without your suppor t, team. I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.

**And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected.**

It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.

Thanks,

Jon

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate. And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected. It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all. Thanks, Jon | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Peter,
---
Joe Biden might want you to think his policies are succeeding but just look at these poll numbers:
---
➢ 64% of Americans think the economy is in bad shape.
➢ 71% think the county is on the wrong track.
➢ 52% of registered Democrats said Biden should not seek another term.
---
And when he’s questioned about this, he shrugs it off, saying that polls don’t matter anymore.
---
**In other words, polls only matter when they show him in good standing.**
---
_But as he continues to boast about success amidst his failing policies, voters are making their voices heard and demanding change._
---
That’s why we are fighting to END Biden’s radical agenda that has left YOU behind for far too long, but we can’t do it alone.

clean_body: It’s time to END Biden’s failing agenda. | Peter, Joe Biden might want you to think his policies are succeeding but just look at these poll numbers: ➢ 64% of Americans think the economy is in bad shape. ➢ 71% think the county is on the wrong track. ➢ 52% of registered Democrats said Biden should not seek another term. And when he’s questioned about this, he shrugs it off, saying that polls don’t matter anymore. In other words, polls only matter when they show him in good standing. But as he continues to boast about success amidst his failing policies, voters are making their voices heard and demanding change. That’s why we are fighting to END Biden’s radical agenda that has left YOU behind for far too long, but we can’t do it alone. Biden’s lack of understanding of the current state of our country is quite terrifying. He expects everyone to trust him to protect and defend us, and to fix the issues plaguing American families, yet he refuses to listen. He ignores the polls that show his policies' failings and voters growing more and more dissatisfied with his agenda. And instead paints a pretty picture of how well our country is doing. But our country cannot continue down this dangerous and destructive path. That’s why our new House majority is FIGHTING BACK. With you fighting by our side, I know that we can get our country back on track by stopping Biden and the Left from destroying our country one policy at a time. Thank you, Rep. Scott Fitzgerald Wisconsin's 5th Congressional District Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress Po Box 5048 Elm Grove, WI 53122

Hi team,

I want to tell you about Latino Victory — an organization dedicated to building political power in the Latino community. They work to make sure that the voices and values of Latinos are reflected at every level of government, and in the policies that drive our country forward.

Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Hi team, I want to tell you about Latino Victory — an organization dedicated to building political power in the Latino community. They work to make sure that the voices and values of Latinos are reflected at every level of government, and in the policies that drive our country forward. Latino Victory was a key supporter of our campaign, and their work is more important than ever. | In the past midterm elections, Latino Victory worked hard to empower Latino voters, increase Latino turnout, and develop the bench of Latino candidates who support progressive policies — all with the goal of making Latino voters a deciding factor in political elections up and down the ballot. As part of their work, they supported more than 80 candidates across 17 key states — including me. I’m here to tell you that the work they do to increase Latino political involvement and representation is key. Donate to help hit our $100,000 goal and replace On Notice House Republicans with Democratic pro-choice women: Peter, Today, we're putting 23 House Republicans "On Notice." That means that these seats are the top 2024 targets and some of the best red-to-blue flip opportunities. With the Republican House majority margin in the single digits and the 2023-2024 cycle kicking into high gear, we are making this list official. And we're confident that we can replace each of these vulnerable Republicans with a fierce Democratic pro-choice woman next year. We selected these particular lawmakers — including Reps. Lauren Boebert (CO-03) and George Santos (NY-03) — because they are proudly anti-choice and anti-democracy, all failing their constituents during one of the most challenging periods in American history. We also selected these Republicans because every single one of them is vulnerable in 2024. And we intend to defeat them. Though none of them deserve to be reelected, you can be sure they and their anti-choice allies will fight harder than ever to keep their seats, raise millions of dollars, and advance their anti-democratic, anti-woman, anti-family agenda. Our 2024 candidates are going to need us in their corners starting right now. So let's get to work! Donate to help hit our $100,000 goal, replace On Notice House Republicans, flip these crucial seats, and TAKE BACK the House in 2024: Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Team NPP
subject: A sad state for democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Spotlight PA: Unequal election policies disenfranchised Pennsylvania voters in 2022.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59096768/393202348/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230222Patchwork_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDhiNTZmLWU2YjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6AY_EJYJaYxHE5yx8fh-y-nNte-zQSGrJKSSWuHN5AE=)
| Fellow activist, the Pennsylvania Constitution states “elections shall be free and equal.” This is not what free and equal elections look like: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59096769/393202349/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230222Patchwork_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_B_G1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDhiNTZmLWU2YjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6AY_EJYJaYxHE5yx8fh-y-nNte-zQSGrJKSSWuHN5AE=) Republicans in Harrisburg fought tooth and nail against reforms that would guarantee equal access to the freedom to vote in the Commonwealth, and our democracy paid the price.

The unequal restrictions they engineered directly disenfranchised at least 1,599 voters who could have had the chance to cure their ballots at their county board of election offices. At least nine counties refused to have voters fix errors on their mail ballots like a missing date or signature on the outer envelope. Just these nine counties alone have nearly a million registered voters.

**[As a voting rights organization, the New Pennsylvania Project advocates for the unrestricted freedom of ALL Pennsylvanians to vote. That any of us would not have this freedom is an attack on all of us. Can you chip in $10 today to help us continue educating and engaging voters about the importance of this freedom?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59096770/393202350/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230222Patchwork_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDhiNTZmLWU2YjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6AY_EJYJaYxHE5yx8fh-y-nNte-zQSGrJKSSWuHN5AE=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59096771/393202351/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230222Patchwork_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_B_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDhiNTZmLWU2YjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6AY_EJYJaYxHE5yx8fh-y-nNte-zQSGrJKSSWuHN5AE=) We must engage and educate voters about the many important elections that could restore free and equal elections, particularly this year’s election for a PA Supreme Court Justice.

Many of these restrictions and unequal rights stem from PA’s Supreme Court rulings made in the months after the death of Chief Justice Max Baer, where one more Justice willing to stand up for our voting rights would have made all the difference. **[Expanding the electorate and turning out historically disenfranchised voters for this “off-year” election may very well determine the health of PA’s democracy for years to come. Will you donate $10 now to help us stand up for the freedom to vote? We can’t wait around for an election like clean_body: Spotlight PA: Unequal election policies disenfranchised Pennsylvania voters in 2022. = | Fellow activist, the Pennsylvania Constitution states “elections shall be free and equal.” This is not what free and equal elections look like: = Republicans in Harrisburg fought tooth and nail against reforms that would guarantee equal access to the freedom to vote in the Commonwealth, and our democracy paid the price. The unequal restrictions they engineered directly disenfranchised at least 1,599 voters who could have had the chance to cure their ballots at their county board of election offices. At least nine counties refused to have voters fix errors on their mail ballots like a missing date or signature on the outer envelope. Just these nine counties alone have nearly a million registered voters. = = We must engage and educate voters about the many important elections that could restore free and equal elections, particularly this year’s election for a PA Supreme Court Justice. Many of these restrictions and unequal rights stem from PA’s Supreme Court rulings made in the months after the death of Chief Justice Max Baer, where one more Justice willing to stand up for our voting rights would have made all the difference. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

name: Katie Porter
subject: What being California’s Senator means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Here’s how I’d approach being California’s Senator.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18169%2E3422442%2EjdwqDe)
Derek, I’m running to represent California in the United States Senate. Let me tell you what the job means to me:
**Advocating for Californians** : It’s my job to make sure federal policy works for California families. This month I helped relaunch the SALT Caucus, which is fighting to reverse Trump tax code changes that unfairly punished middle class taxpayers in blue states.
**Bringing the best ideas from California to the rest of the country:** Our state is a leader in so many areas. From electric vehicle infrastructure to free community college, I’ll fight to bring the best California policies nationwide.
**Standing up to corruption and special interests:** I’ve never taken a dime from corporate PACs and I don’t take federal lobbyist money. I’m leading the fight to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks. I work only for my constituents.
**Showing up in every part of the state:** I grew up on a farm, and know rural areas are often overlooked. From Redding, to Bakersfield, to Indio, and everywhere in between, I promise to hear directly from diverse voices.
**Helping Democrats win tough seats:** California itself could deliver the House majority to Democrats, but we need leaders at the top of the ticket who can help turn out voters. I’ve represented a swing district and know how to win tough races. As a Senator, I’d be ready to play an important role representing Democrats all across the country, helping us win tough swing seats. I love campaigning!
**[I’m thrilled about the strong start we’ve had to this campaign, but we need to keep the momentum going. Can you chip in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230222-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230222-1&refcode2=18169_3422442_jdwqDe&akid=18169%2E3422442%2EjdwqDe)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230222-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF22_1_JOB_20230222_V1_F&refcode2=18169_3422442_jdwqDe&akid=18169%2E3422442%2EjdwqDe)**
Thanks for considering,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF22_1_JOB_20230222_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=18169_3422442_jdwqDe&akid=18169%2E3422442%2EjdwqDe)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=18169%2E3422442%2EjdwqDe)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=18169%2E3422442%2EjdwqDe)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Andy Beshear
subject: I've been banned from Russia.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Let's fight for what is right and stand up for the most vulnerable. Earlier this month, I woke up to the news that I'd been **permanently banned from Russia** along with 77 other state and federal officials, Peter.

The truth is, when Vladimir Putin opposes you, you know you’re doing something right. This is the result of standing up for our democratic principles and rejecting authoritarianism. I'll proudly wear it as a badge of honor and continue to fight for the most vulnerable in Kentucky and wherever injustice arises.

**I'm proud to be your governor and to use my voice to stand up for what is right.**

[**If you're with me, help me continue the fight to make our Commonwealth a model for hope and prosperity across the nation and contribute to my re-election campaign today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59097067/393203026/-500812825?refcode=em23_230222_russia_fnd_gq_nopn___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230222_russia_fnd_gq_nopn___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=34223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDY3MTA0Yi1lN2IyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7D4SNy5jI8_P_FPJ5HvEa6GQTuKuMh7m88HgC2uDKk=)
