clean_body: Our work today creates a huge impact on future elections, so I want to be really clear about the stakes... | | | | | In a few minutes, me explain: There's no sugarcoating it: We're in for a tough fight this year. Unlike federal candidates, state legislators don’t have off-years – we are facing over a dozen special elections just this year. And on top of that, we're up against big Republican spending – they’ve already dropped six-figures on attack ads and special elections. But a tough fight doesn't mean an impossible one. Every dollar we raise now is money we can put towards hiring organizers in key states, testing our message in battlegrounds, expanding our map of competitive battlegrounds and more. The key is to invest early in these races, but we can only do that with the help of this grassroots team. Unfortunately, as of 2:00 PM, we’re only 53% of the way to our February goal – so we’re power-fundraising $150,000 ahead of our end-of-month goal. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Republicans have already poured six figures into keeping and expanding their statehouse majorities — so it’s critical that Democrats stand together and fight back. The money we raise now will impact our most critical races – where we can flip key seats and entire chambers blue. It’s why right now is the most important time you could donate to help ensure our candidates have every last ounce of support going into their special elections. # [No, Kevin McCarthy Didn't Release All Of The J6 Footage To The "American Public"](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=104360188&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTA0MzYwMTg4LCJpYXQiOjE2NzcwOTQ2MjAsImV4cCI6MTY3OTY4NjYyMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMjM3NDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2etgxWBLOH3YyFu0xKOtFUVFlUu8X6IolTvr_VSRsmg)

Shortly after Congressman Kevin McCarthy finally won his election to become Speaker of the House, after 14 failed votes on the floor of the United States House, he and his political allies adamantly pronounced that he would be publicly releasing all 14,000 hours of the Capitol Hill footage from January 6th, 2021. At the time, I was highly skeptical that he would do this, in light of his track record of broken promises and political opportunism, which is why I traveled to Washington DC for the entirety of the Speaker vote, and urged Republican representatives to vote against McCarthy. That was several weeks ago.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..W-GHa6wkIdLw7hphxHevpPq3YLTdIJtG-tWmoSj4Koc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=104360188)
Over the weekend, I broke the news that Speaker McCarthy had no intent to *publicly* release the footage in its entirety to the "American Public" due to alleged 'national security concerns,' and that counsel for defendants would have to work directly with Representatives from the districts where defendants reside to attempt to arrange for specific release of the footage relevant to their case. This information was given to both me and J6 attorney John Pierce by members of the United States Congress.
[Laura Loomer @LauraLoomerI've been told @SpeakerMcCarthy isn't planning to release all of the J6 footage like he promised.He told members of Congress that it's a "national security risk" to release the raw footage.J6 defendants who want it have to ask their rep to issue a written request on their behalf.](https://substack.com/redirect/29bfd9bd-8fce-4b6d-a79a-4610294bb1e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[2:32 AM ∙ Feb 19, 2023
* * *
6,330Likes2,873Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/29bfd9bd-8fce-4b6d-a79a-4610294bb1e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), currently represents dozens of J6 defendants. "As often is the case, Ms. Loomer's investigative journalism had an immediate impact, as many Americans were immediately outraged by this revelation and demanded Speaker McCarthy release the tapes," said Pierce.
Unsurprisingly, in a transparent attempt at damage control, shortly after my report and viral posts, an attempt to quell the outrage was carried out on social media, prompting members of Congress and some of their associates to try to discredit my report with subliminal accusations that people who are calling McCarthy out for not releasing the tapes are "grifters and liars".
[Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene🇺🇸 @RepMTGThere are grifters and liars that our base believe. Unfortunately. These people always claim to know "the truth" and have "sources" but always mislead people and grift for donations. Can't wait for the real news tomorrow. I love being right.](https://substack.com/redirect/b40bfbc0-11e7-47ea-9911-5e9374481a8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[2:27 AM ∙ Feb 20, 2023
* * *
10,513Likes1,357Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/b40bfbc0-11e7-47ea-9911-5e9374481a8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
On Monday, Speaker McCarthy exclusively announced to Axios that over 42,000 hours of J6 footage from the Capitol had been provided exclusively to Tucker Carlson of Fox News (a network owned by Rupert Murdoch in which former Speaker of the House, Paul Ryan is on the board).
Although Kevin McCarthy's attack dog, Marjorie Taylor Greene falsely stated that Kevin McCarthy had kept his promise by "releasing the tapes" to the American Public, her statement, which was echoed by many others, is simply not true.
[Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene🇺🇸 @RepMTGFor all of you that doubted we would release the tapes. Here you go! I'm very happy to be right again in my support for Kevin McCarthy as our Speaker. Americans deserve to see the truth, not a one sided narrative and unfair two tiered justice system. ](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef2536d-48ae-4422-b1f5-ba1f650be97e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[axios.comExclusive: Kevin McCarthy gives Tucker Carlson access to massive trove of Jan. 6 riot tapeExclusive: Carlson producers were on Capitol Hill last week to begin digging through the trove, which includes multiple camera angles f...](https://substack.com/redirect/fdd5ae80-8496-45cf-96be-35a8474085f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[3:21 PM ∙ Feb 20, 2023
* * *
29,767Likes6,644Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef2536d-48ae-4422-b1f5-ba1f650be97e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Releasing the footage to Tucker Carlson in an embargo agreement with Fox News, is _not_ a *public* release of the footage. It is _totally_ insufficient and fails to protect the Constitutional rights of the January 6thdefendants, and it is an _insult_ to the intelligence of the American People, who are smart enough to see right through this charade. Put simply, Tucker Carlson is not the "American Public". While Tucker Carlson is a respected, right wing commentator who happens to work for the largest "consevative" mainstream media network, he is simply one person, who works for one network, and it is unreasonable to only give the footage to one news anchor.
[Cara Castronuova @CaraCastronuovaWHY is @SpeakerMcCarthy giving the J6 footage ONLY 2 @TuckerCarlson at @FoxNews? What about ALL THE REPORTERS LIKE MYSELF,@gatewaypundit @M5NewsTx @julie_kelly2 @gregkellyusa @LauraLoomer @TaylerUSA @HelpStopHate @EmeraldRobinson etc THAT HAVE BEEN POURING BLOOD 2GET J6 TRUTH OUT ](https://substack.com/redirect/87a74822-9b4a-4d5b-a497-2542c22acf8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[6:03 PM ∙ Feb 20, 2023
* * *
1,137Likes372Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/87a74822-9b4a-4d5b-a497-2542c22acf8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I am not alone in my assessment either. Following the Axios report, numerous outlets and reporters, including Gateway Pundit, as well as defense lawyers who are representing J6 defendants, took to Twitter to point out McCarthy's deception, and asked why only one network was being given access.
[norm_pattis @PattisNormI am a #J6 lawyer. #McCarthy promised to release tapes. Where are they, Kevin? https://t.co/JXfwF6dtP6Laura Loomer @LauraLoomerIf you are a J6 defendant and you want the footage, you have to contact your rep and have them put in a formal request with @SpeakerMcCarthy to have the footage released on a case by case basis. If you have a leftist rep, you are shit out of luck! These are MCCARTHY's rules.](https://substack.com/redirect/de72e377-6b3b-483a-a8cf-105d9be06001?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[12:09 PM ∙ Feb 22, 2023
* * *
190Likes67Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/de72e377-6b3b-483a-a8cf-105d9be06001?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Norm Pattis, a criminal defense lawyer who is representing Joe Biggs in the Proud Boys trial tweeted, "I am a J6 lawyer. McCarthy promised to release tapes. Where are they, Kevin?"
Pattis, along with other J6 defense lawyers, including John Pierce, and Brad Geyer, are disputing the claims that the 42,000 hours of footage has been "released to the public" and made available to the defendants and their lawyers.
[Laura Loomer @LauraLoomerGreat interview by @EmeraldRobinson. Just as I have reported, Kevin McCarthy & MTG have not been honest w/ Ppl by saying the J6 footage has been released to the public. Watch the interview w/ a J6 defense lawyer below. He confirms J6 lawyers have not been given access to footage. https://t.co/K4JqZKf5STThe Absolute Truth with Emerald Robinson @AbsoluteWithESpeaker Kevin McCarthy is giving Tucker Carlson's producers exclusive access to 44,000+ hours of J6 surveillance footage. J6 defense attorneys like Brad Geyer would also like to examine the footage. Geyer joined @EmeraldRobinson to discuss the importance of this. 🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨 https://t.co/8NpLJAhpbT](https://substack.com/redirect/1f5b4e56-e968-4ebd-b83f-9ef895be26f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[12:09 PM ∙ Feb 22, 2023
* * *
760Likes437Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/1f5b4e56-e968-4ebd-b83f-9ef895be26f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[John Pierce @CaliKidJMP@LauraLoomer is correct. She has been a warrior for J6 defendants -- raising funds for their defense, spending countless hours ferociously advocating for them on all fronts, and helping in court. We have NOT been given 44,000 hours of January 6th footage. Release it all NOW. https://t.co/aoCizNoZPfLaura Loomer @LauraLoomerGreat interview by @EmeraldRobinson. Just as I have reported, Kevin McCarthy & MTG have not been honest w/ Ppl by saying the J6 footage has been released to the public. Watch the interview w/ a J6 defense lawyer below. He confirms J6 lawyers have not been given access to footage. https://t.co/K4JqZKf5ST](https://substack.com/redirect/491c0ba4-f3e1-47f2-95b2-0ca602c49948?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[3:38 PM ∙ Feb 22, 2023
* * *
142Likes57Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/491c0ba4-f3e1-47f2-95b2-0ca602c49948?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
There are numerous January 6th trials happening _right now_ and many more that are imminent. Every second of the 42,000 hours of January 6th footage that was turned over to Tucker Carlson must be _publicly_ released _immediately_. It goes without saying that this is the right thing to do from a principled standpoint - both with respect to the public's right to know, as well as to repair the integrity of Speaker McCarthy following yet another broken promise.
McCarthy advocates have unfortunately chosen to attack my reporting and intentions to help the J6 defendants as "lies and grifting", when in reality, they are simply upset that this failed promise by McCarthy is being exposed in a very public manner on my Twitter account, and J6 lawyers and defendants are publicly agreeing with me and calling Kevin McCarthy and his establishment lackeys out for more failed promises.
McCarthy advocates argued that people who don't have the footage are simply "bad lawyers" and that myself and others who are calling McCarthy out for not publicly releasing the footage "don't understand how the process works". However, it is evident to everyone who wants to be honest about this situation that Kevin McCarthy is playing semantic games with the public in an effort to conceal the fact that all of the J6 footage has still not been released to the American public, despite his promise to do so.
They argue that J6 defendants who want the footage need to contact the House Administrative Committee with their case number and request for footage, but that process doesn't appear to be efficient or reliable.
When I posted the contact information for the House Administrative Committee with instructions for how defendants could request the footage, my post was replied to by Lloyd Cruz, a J6 defendant who said the Secretary at the office put him on hold, and appeared to have no idea what the defendant was talking about, and told him "the footage has already been released" by Tucker Carlson.
Lloyd tweeted, "The guy I talked to said he has no idea how I can get the footage. He tried to tell me some has already been released."
[Laura Loomer @LauraLoomerIf you are a J6 defendant and you call the House Admin Committee inquiring about the J6 footage, let me know what they say or if they give it to you and your lawyer. This is the process they want J6ers to follow to get footage, so let's see how "competent & efficient" it is. https://t.co/M86MtHpZiF Laura Loomer @LauraLoomerIf you are a J6 defendant, you can contact the House Amin Committee to get you the footage you need. This is Still not a "public release of footage" like we were promised, as I have said. No Democrat rep will help any J6 defendants. Here's contact # https://t.co/iRuEhg6yq2 https://t.co/0mzJFprwq6](https://substack.com/redirect/bb78d50d-60ec-4060-8b05-fb3719785efd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[2:53 PM ∙ Feb 22, 2023

Firstly, it is rather concerning that the phone operator at the office where J6 defendants and their lawyers are being directed to request the J6 footage is aloof and unable to properly satisfy the questions asked of them, and secondly, it is a blatant lie that Tucker Carlson has "released the footage". In an episode of his show this week, Tucker Carlson said his team had received 42,000 hours of footage and that his "team" would be reviewing it. However, it is mathematically impossible to review 42,000 hours of footage in one week, and many members of the American Public have been quick to point this out.

However, it goes further than that. Every J6 defendant is facing potentially decades in prison in this Soviet Style Witch hunt of Trump supporters who attended the protest at the Capitol on January 6, 2021. The current and future J6 defendants have an absolute right under the United States Constitution, as interpreted in the _Brady_ case, to have access to all 42,000 hours of footage that is being embargoed by Kevin McCarthy with Tucker Carlson.
The Brady decision ruled that **the defense has the right to examine all evidence that may be of an exculpatory nature**. In light of the fact that many J6 trials are completed, ongoing, and imminent, the only way to ensure defendants' _Brady_ rights are protected is an immediate, public, complete, full and unconditional release of all footage in an open source format for the American public to review and see themselves.

It is practically impossible for any small group of human beings - either at a law firm, or a "team" of producers who work for Tucker Carlson at anti-Trump Rupert Murdoch's Fox News - to complete any meaningful review of the footage in time for the J6 trials.
And let's be honest, Kevin McCarthy knows this. If Kevin McCarthy wants to play semantic games and Russian Roulette with the lives of J6 defendants and their families, then I will continue to ride his ass like a cowboy with spurred boots on a unbroken horse on a daily basis until all 42,000 hours of the J6 footage is released, not just to Tucker Carlson, but to the entire American Public. Speaker Kevin McCarthy is playing semantic games with the public in an effort to conceal the fact that the J6 footage has still not been released to the American public, despite his promise to do so. | | | Feb 22 | | | | | | | | | | ? | | | | ---|---|--- Shortly after Congressman Kevin McCarthy finally won his election to become Speaker of the House, after 14 failed votes on the floor of the United States House, he and his political allies adamantly pronounced that he would be publicly releasing all 14,000 hours of the Capitol Hill footage from January 6th, 2021. At the time, I was highly skeptical that he would do this, in light of his track record of broken promises and political opportunism, which is why I traveled to Washington DC for the entirety of the Speaker vote, and urged Republican representatives to vote against McCarthy. That was several weeks ago. LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Over the weekend, I broke the news that Speaker McCarthy had no intent to publicly release the footage in its entirety to the "American Public" due to alleged 'national security concerns,' and that counsel for defendants would have to work directly with Representatives from the districts where defendants reside to attempt to arrange for specific release of the footage relevant to their case. This information was given to both me and J6 attorney John Pierce by members of the United States Congress. John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), currently represents dozens of J6 defendants. "As often is the case, Ms. Loomer's investigative journalism had an immediate impact, as many Americans were immediately outraged by this revelation and demanded Speaker McCarthy release the tapes," said Pierce. Unsurprisingly, in a transparent attempt at damage control, shortly after my report and viral posts, an attempt to quell the outrage was carried out on social media, prompting members of Congress and some of their associates to try to discredit my report with subliminal accusations that people who are calling McCarthy out for not releasing the tapes are "grifters and liars". On Monday, Speaker McCarthy exclusively announced to Axios that over 42,000 hours of J6 footage from the Capitol had been provided exclusively to Tucker Carlson of Fox News (a network owned by Rupert Murdoch in which former Speaker of the House, Paul Ryan is on the board). Although Kevin McCarthy's attack dog, Marjorie Taylor Greene falsely stated that Kevin McCarthy had kept his promise by "releasing the tapes" to the American Public, her statement, which was echoed by many others, is simply not true. Releasing the footage to Tucker Carlson in an embargo agreement with Fox News, is not a public release of the footage. It is totally insufficient and fails to protect the Constitutional rights of the January 6thdefendants, and it is an insult to the intelligence of the American People, who are smart enough to see right through this charade. Put simply, Tucker Carlson is not the "American Public". While Tucker Carlson is a respected, right wing commentator who happens to work for the largest "consevative" mainstream media network, he is simply one person, who works for one network, and it is unreasonable to only give the footage to one news anchor. I am not alone in my assessment either. Following the Axios report, numerous outlets and reporters, including Gateway Pundit, as well as defense lawyers who are representing J6 defendants, took to Twitter to point out McCarthy's deception, and asked why only one network was being given access. Norm Pattis, a criminal defense lawyer who is representing Joe Biggs in the Proud Boys trial tweeted, "I am a J6 lawyer. McCarthy promised to release tapes. Where are they, Kevin?" Pattis, along with other J6 defense lawyers, including John Pierce, and Brad Geyer, are disputing the claims that the 42,000 hours of footage has been "released to the public" and made available to the defendants and their lawyers. There are numerous January 6th trials happening right now and many more that are imminent. Every second of the 42,000 hours of January 6th footage that was turned over to Tucker Carlson must be publicly released immediately. It goes without saying that this is the right thing to do from a principled standpoint - both with respect to the public's right to know, as well as to repair the integrity of Speaker McCarthy following yet another broken promise. McCarthy advocates have unfortunately chosen to attack my reporting and intentions to help the J6 defendants as "lies and grifting", when in reality, they are simply upset that this failed promise by McCarthy is being exposed in a very public manner on my Twitter account, and J6 lawyers and defendants are publicly agreeing with me and calling Kevin McCarthy and his establishment lackeys out for more failed promises. McCarthy advocates argued that people who don't have the footage are simply "bad lawyers" and that myself and others who are calling McCarthy out for not publicly releasing the footage "don't understand how the process works". However, it is evident to everyone who wants to be honest about this situation that Kevin McCarthy is playing semantic games with the public in an effort to conceal the fact that all of the J6 footage has still not been released to the American public, despite his promise to do so. They argue that J6 defendants who want the footage need to contact the House Administrative Committee with their case number and request for footage, but that process doesn't appear to be efficient or reliable. When I posted the contact information for the House Administrative Committee with instructions for how defendants could request the footage, my post was replied to by Lloyd Cruz, a J6 defendant who said the Secretary at the office put him on hold, and appeared to have no idea what the defendant was talking about, and told him "the footage has already been released" by Tucker Carlson. Lloyd tweeted, "The guy I talked to said he has no idea how I can get the footage. He tried to tell me some has already been released." Firstly, it is rather concerning that the phone operator at the office where J6 defendants and their lawyers are being directed to request the J6 footage is aloof and unable to properly satisfy the questions asked of them, and secondly, it is a blatant lie that Tucker Carlson has "released the footage". In an episode of his show this week, Tucker Carlson said his team had received 42,000 hours of footage and that his "team" would be reviewing it. However, it is mathematically impossible to review 42,000 hours of footage in one week, and many members of the American Public have been quick to point this out. However, it goes further than that. Every J6 defendant is facing potentially decades in prison in this Soviet Style Witch hunt of Trump supporters who attended the protest at the Capitol on January 6, 2021. The current and future J6 defendants have an absolute right under the United States Constitution, as interpreted in the Brady case, to have access to all 42,000 hours of footage that is being embargoed by Kevin McCarthy with Tucker Carlson. The Brady decision ruled that the defense has the right to examine all evidence that may be of an exculpatory nature. In light of the fact that many J6 trials are completed, ongoing, and imminent, the only way to ensure defendants' Brady rights are protected is an immediate, public, complete, full and unconditional release of all footage in an open source format for the American public to review and see themselves. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- With the amount of footage at issue, and it should be noted that the DOJ and Kevin McCarthy first claimed and told the American Public for over two years that it was14,000 hours, and now he's saying it's 42,000 hours (3 times the amount of footage originally claimed) then only a public release of the footage, with the ability of tens or hundreds of millions of people being able to review it immediately in an open-source format, will even come close to helping ensure that defendants' Brady rights are protected and upheld, as well as ensuring that that American Public is given 100% transparency about what happened on January 6, 2021. It is practically impossible for any small group of human beings - either at a law firm, or a "team" of producers who work for Tucker Carlson at anti-Trump Rupert Murdoch's Fox News - to complete any meaningful review of the footage in time for the J6 trials. And let's be honest, Kevin McCarthy knows this. But he needs to deceive the American public into believing otherwise, or else he could possibly be subjected to a "Motion to Vacate the Chair" under the new concessions made during the 14 failed votes it took in order for McCarthy to strongarm and lie his way into the Speaker's seat. If Kevin McCarthy wants to play semantic games and Russian Roulette with the lives of J6 defendants and their families, then I will continue to ride his ass like a cowboy with spurred boots on a unbroken horse on a daily basis until all 42,000 hours of the J6 footage is released, not just to Tucker Carlson, but to the entire American Public. I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet.

[_**If you’re with me, please split a donation between Fight for Progress and my campaign right now to become a Founding Donor. I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.

They didn’t know the meaning of the word "quit." And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.

It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.**

[_**I can’t do it without your support, Peter. Can I count on you to step up and become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign today so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59103146/393208721/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230222-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmYmMzOThmLWViYjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CMAtdno-v803L5mquMzwsGHnom9kqmgrtdMvnM4Azek=)

I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.

**And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected.**

It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.

Thanks,

Jon

| I'm the Congressman who the media tried to slander. I'm the one who the PACs and lobbyists tried to defeat. I'm the one who the Deep State tried to destroy. I'm even the one whose own party will attack from time to time when I expose the levers of the Swamp.
And in a minute, I'll tell you the exact reason why - despite all of this - none of it will ever deter me from keeping up the fight for you, for our movement, and for our great nation. But first, if you'd like to fuel this fight in the Swamp straight away now that I've been VINDICATED from their latest attack against me, [I'd be honored if you did so today with a grassroots donation of any amount.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001koizqF4gpAWxYnoB5ZzL9X1BHAihXLeqge7qYuMj9e1j0lJMw9pacTvz2VJ7Dsihzu3sKq5MrS2fTXByvCcT6Rt4Rc0P9uSGfC3nl7YvYEcVHJyKdpG4bLKgN53g71tP7nmIjOi8oS94a_N3s4qWr38pi0h8oxUPpJqEcC_RJtK4L48CBk-YgUj2wTD4McvBaNdYrjOWV48bF0iU_dJ-q-JvMIsOxnaZ18KFWOQ2uw4=&c=2RgvhU2aQ_phyR_T9RzrUXWnoW4sTp_qcHX54xE71IZvidQ_VZ7rbw==&ch=BfBnoQ91hkyNvSO94CdjJWrFRb2sX4UhaXXKtVIF8FSCsxdZ8YW1MA==)
Contributions from you are the ONLY thing that fund my fight in Congress, so rest assured that every single dollar WILL make an immediate impact!

| Peter, the crises we face today are not ones that can be solved by controlled opposition, RINO Republicans. While some like Liz Cheney try to drag us back to the old Establishment GOP, I am proud to carry the mantle of Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda in Congress!
Because just look at what the Regime in charge right now is doing to the nation we love...
They are bankrupting the American People with non-stop money printing that would rival Zimbabwe, driving inflation to historic levels. Wages haven't been able to keep up with inflation for 21 straight months now, all because these Swamp politicians have a need to spend a fortune on foreigners instead of you.
They have also rolled out the welcome mat along the Southern Border - which we share with a Narco State, Peter. And as a result, over 5 million illegal immigrants have poured into our country since the Biden term started, along with enough fentanyl to poison to death every single American citizen.
Yet rather than focus on the bandits in Sinaloa who ARE causing real harm to our country... The America Last, D.C. Cartel is more focused on sending weapons and billions of dollars to the corrupt nation of Ukraine!
Peter, why should Americans have to pay the costs for freedom elsewhere when our own leaders won't stand up for our freedom here?
Because here's the thing... With Big Tech and the Deep State working in tandem to suppress our Constitutional rights and corrupt our politics - all while one America Last Disaster after another comes out of the Swamp - one thing is crystal clear:
We need fighters in D.C. who will have the courage to stop this and stand up on behalf of the American people.
And so I will NEVER stop doing just that, Peter - no matter what attacks the Swamp Establishment throws my way! I will continue standing up to this D.C. Cartel even when they come after me with disgusting lies and smears... because I work for YOU - NOT THEM!
In fact, I don't take a dime of their dirty money either. I can't be controlled by the Swamp lobbyists and PACs. So if you believe in this brand of grassroots, America First leadership: [will you consider making a personal investment today of even just 5 bucks to help me continue this fight?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001koizqF4gpAWxYnoB5ZzL9X1BHAihXLeqge7qYuMj9e1j0lJMw9pacTvz2VJ7Dsihzu3sKq5MrS2fTXByvCcT6Rt4Rc0P9uSGfC3nl7YvYEcVHJyKdpG4bLKgN53g71tP7nmIjOi8oS94a_N3s4qWr38pi0h8oxUPpJqEcC_RJtK4L48CBk-YgUj2wTD4McvBaNdYrjOWV48bF0iU_dJ-q-JvMIsOxnaZ18KFWOQ2uw4=&c=2RgvhU2aQ_phyR_T9RzrUXWnoW4sTp_qcHX54xE71IZvidQ_VZ7rbw==&ch=BfBnoQ91hkyNvSO94CdjJWrFRb2sX4UhaXXKtVIF8FSCsxdZ8YW1MA==)

Peter, You might not have known it, but yesterday was Election Day for many important races around the country. And there’s lots of great news to go around: Jennifer McClellan won her special election for Virginia’s Fourth Congressional District and will become the state’s **first** Black congresswoman. Janet Protasiewicz won Wisconsin’s State Supreme Court primary — a huge win for women across Wisconsin, as she could become the tie-breaking vote on abortion rights in the state, amongst other critical issues. [_**These are the first big wins of 2023, and now we need to keep up the momentum. Can you pitch in any amount today to celebrate these women and help elect more across the country?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59106211/393212704/-1909562274?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGYzN2MzYWQtZWRiMi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2Jg5lg7Xroek3gd5KGOa2Hg3USoCVkYRMbYWiFAblHE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59106212/393212705/-1909562274?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGYzN2MzYWQtZWRiMi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2Jg5lg7Xroek3gd5KGOa2Hg3USoCVkYRMbYWiFAblHE=)

Peter,

We don't treat our farm workers right. For decades now, our nation's farm workers have had to sacrifice their lives and livelihoods while battling ever-changing weather caused by climate change to provide millions of Americans with the sustenance needed to grow, produce, and innovate.

All while fighting to make a living wage.

**[That's why we can't stand back when fighting for climate change, a living wage, and affordable healthcare. name: Joe Shepherd, United Rural Democrats
subject: Quick check in with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
I'll make this quick... | | | Hey Peter — I’ll make this quick. As you know, I’ve spent the last few weeks in DC and on the road visiting communities in rural America. There’s a lot that makes me hopeful for the future. People are starting to understand the role the rural voters play in shaping the progress of this nation — and the difficulties that are unique to rural communities. But I’m also seeing extremely worrying signs from the Republican Party. The chaos of the upcoming presidential elections, the political posturing in Washington, and the lack of action for the American people is a failure of governing that will hurt everyday Americans deeply. We need to invest in resources now to make sure that the Democratic candidates of tomorrow (2023 and 2024) are well-equipped to beat the GOP and usher in a new era of actually getting things done. I’m confident we can do it, but we need your help. Democrats need rural voters to win — no doubt about it. clean_body: I'll make this quick... | | | Hey Peter — I’ll make this quick. As you know, I’ve spent the last few weeks in DC and on the road visiting communities in rural America. There’s a lot that makes me hopeful for the future. People are starting to understand the role the rural voters play in shaping the progress of this nation — and the difficulties that are unique to rural communities. But I’m also seeing extremely worrying signs from the Republican Party. The chaos of the upcoming presidential elections, the political posturing in Washington, and the lack of action for the American people is a failure of governing that will hurt everyday Americans deeply. We need to invest in resources now to make sure that the Democratic candidates of tomorrow (2023 and 2024) are well-equipped to beat the GOP and usher in a new era of actually getting things done. I’m confident we can do it, but we need your help. Democrats need rural voters to win — no doubt about it. Thanks, team. — Joe Shepherd President, United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Jon Tester
subject: I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59106983/393213443/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2306-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxOGUyMGY3LWVlYjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=74K3v_SLcWFNzxPkngMoPKxviJCNhMoC5Qe0Y_gLy50=)
Folks, I have an exciting announcement and I want you to be the first to know: **I’m officially running for reelection here in Montana. **

I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet.
**[If you’re with me, please split a donation between American Bridge PAC and my campaign right now to become a Founding Donor. If I’m going to win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the start. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59106984/393213444/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2306-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxOGUyMGY3LWVlYjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=74K3v_SLcWFNzxPkngMoPKxviJCNhMoC5Qe0Y_gLy50=)**
| | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59106985/393213445/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2306-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxOGUyMGY3LWVlYjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=74K3v_SLcWFNzxPkngMoPKxviJCNhMoC5Qe0Y_gLy50=)
---
I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.

They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.

It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate – they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 – and I’ll do it again.**
**[I can’t do it without your support, team. Can I count on you to step up and split a donation between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to become a Founding Donor so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59106986/393213446/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2306-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxOGUyMGY3LWVlYjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=74K3v_SLcWFNzxPkngMoPKxviJCNhMoC5Qe0Y_gLy50=)**
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately:__ | | | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59106987/393213447/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2306-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxOGUyMGY3LWVlYjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=74K3v_SLcWFNzxPkngMoPKxviJCNhMoC5Qe0Y_gLy50=)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59106988/393213448/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk2306-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxOGUyMGY3LWVlYjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=74K3v_SLcWFNzxPkngMoPKxviJCNhMoC5Qe0Y_gLy50=)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59106989/393213449/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk2306-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxOGUyMGY3LWVlYjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=74K3v_SLcWFNzxPkngMoPKxviJCNhMoC5Qe0Y_gLy50=)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59106990/393213450/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2306-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxOGUyMGY3LWVlYjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=74K3v_SLcWFNzxPkngMoPKxviJCNhMoC5Qe0Y_gLy50=)
---
I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.

**And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected. **

It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.

Thanks,
Jon

| | Every morning, my team and I exchange topics of interest we should address that align with our goal to advance Democratic principles in rural America. I couldn't believe I would be Tweeting at Marjorie Taylor Greene, telling her our District would not tolerate secession. Secession! She said, "We need a national divorce. We need to separate by red states and blue states." It wasn't a gaffe. She doubled down on it repeatedly. Usually, we're all better off ignoring Ms. Greene's outlandish comments, but I did some research. Far too many Americans support 'regional unions.' It's a minority, but look where it's growing - in rural America, where underrepresented citizens are susceptible to lies and misinformation from radicals like Majorie Taylor Greene. I had to quip back. [This needs to stop! Immediately. The people of MI01 will not tolerate secession advocates in our House. It's unconstitutional, unpatriotic, and un-American. We will respect each other, and we will work together. ](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/56OPwqE3m/c?w=gtzphGp-W4B1NWulryrfmq94F0-vm_67zRqKm5F7lSI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjcyODhhNWQzLTMwZDMtNGVlZS04NmI5LThjNDk4ODY3NTQ3ZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)[ ](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/56OPwqE3m/c?w=gtzphGp-W4B1NWulryrfmq94F0-vm_67zRqKm5F7lSI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjcyODhhNWQzLTMwZDMtNGVlZS04NmI5LThjNDk4ODY3NTQ3ZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)[Congresspeople are elected to problem-solve for all Americans, not just for those with whom we agree. Ms. Greene's comments are dangerous, divisive, and nearly treasonous.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/56OPwqE3m/c?w=gtzphGp-W4B1NWulryrfmq94F0-vm_67zRqKm5F7lSI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjcyODhhNWQzLTMwZDMtNGVlZS04NmI5LThjNDk4ODY3NTQ3ZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)[ ](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/56OPwqE3m/c?w=gtzphGp-W4B1NWulryrfmq94F0-vm_67zRqKm5F7lSI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjcyODhhNWQzLTMwZDMtNGVlZS04NmI5LThjNDk4ODY3NTQ3ZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)[The only secession I support is Ms. Taylor Green's dangerous rhetoric seceding out of Congress.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/56OPwqE3m/c?w=gtzphGp-W4B1NWulryrfmq94F0-vm_67zRqKm5F7lSI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjcyODhhNWQzLTMwZDMtNGVlZS04NmI5LThjNDk4ODY3NTQ3ZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) Legislatively, Greene and our current representative vote together 80% of the time. That's frightening. \- Please [join me](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/56OPwqE3m/c?w=gtzphGp-W4B1NWulryrfmq94F0-vm_67zRqKm5F7lSI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjcyODhhNWQzLTMwZDMtNGVlZS04NmI5LThjNDk4ODY3NTQ3ZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) in recultivating a better approach to politics. I hope to spark an exemplary movement in rural Michigan, a philosophy based on cooperation, collaboration, and compromise that I know can take seed here; because of the nature of the constituency. That's where my faith is; in our people. It's why I've dedicated my entire life to public service and running for US Congress. I'm not naive about the challenges ahead of us. Our country is more divided than we've been since 1860s, but when I consider the state of our District, I think about the fiercely independent nature of the people we serve. In Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula, we serve the most resilient and congenial people in America. Will you [stand with me today](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/56OPwqE3m/c?w=gtzphGp-W4B1NWulryrfmq94F0-vm_67zRqKm5F7lSI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjcyODhhNWQzLTMwZDMtNGVlZS04NmI5LThjNDk4ODY3NTQ3ZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) with a contribution of $5 or more to help us accomplish great things together? Not separate. Together. Thank you for your consideration. -Dr. Bob LorinserCandidate for US Congress, (D, MI01)info@votedrbob.com

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Senator Jon Tester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Just like they did here in PA, Mitch McConnell + Donald Trump are sure to spend million$ trying to defeat Senator Tester.
#
Hey Derek,
Senator Jon Tester just announced his bid to continue representing Montana for another term.
**Right now, Tester is the most vulnerable Democrat up for reelection in 2024.** His race is listed as a toss-up, and it's key to keeping our Democratic majority in the Senate.
Just like they did here in PA, Mitch McConnell + Donald Trump are sure to spend million$ trying to defeat Senator Tester. We need to do everything we can to send him back to the Senate, but getting this seat is going to be a top priority for the GOP. 😵💫
**[That's why we have to ask: Can you rush a split contribution between Jon Tester and Team Fetterman so we can protect our narrow Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230222-1?refcode=em20230222-1-8254&refcode2=8254_434096_FwDWCF&akid=8254%2E434096%2EFwDWCF)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230222-1?refcode=em20230222-8254&refcode2=8254_434096_FwDWCF&akid=8254%2E434096%2EFwDWCF)**

name: Andy Kim
subject: Focused on finding solutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
The opioid epidemic has crushed communities and families across New Jersey and our nation. I've heard from countless people how opioid addiction has devastated them or their loved ones.

During my time in Congress, I've focused on building coalitions to end this crisis once and for all. And thanks to bipartisan efforts, overdoses and poisonings have gone down for five months in a row.

I'm proud to be a part of this work. Last year, I cosponsored legislation to reduce the red tape health care professionals face when prescribing proven treatments for substance abuse. By removing these barriers, more people than ever can get the help they need.

There is still more to do, as fentanyl deaths remain high, particularly among young Americans. We need to continue cracking down on trafficking while also providing education about the dangers of overdose.

The opioid epidemic is bigger than Democrat vs. Republican. We can develop long-term solutions by spreading awareness, breaking down bias, and bringing more people into this conversation.

Andy

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Lucas=20Kunce?=
subject: The stakes are already high.
body:
#
Peter — We set a goal of raising 5,000 individual donations to elect Lucas Kunce between today and midnight on February 28th. So before I ask you to help **[kick off our end-of-month fundraising drive,](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=3ccdcbf279&e=8095450ef8) please give me a moment to explain why hitting this goal is so critical for our campaign.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW »](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=285744bbc9&e=8095450ef8)**
Lucas made waves after launching his campaign to replace Josh Hawley on January 6th — two years to the day that Hawley ran away from the insurrectionists he helped incite outside the Capitol. And whether it’s calling Hawley out on prime-time TV for being a coward or breaking Missouri fundraising records within the first week of his campaign, Lucas has put a real spotlight on Missouri’s U.S. Senate race.
But that doesn’t mean it’ll be easy. Election watchers are keeping a close eye on the movement we’re building behind Lucas. They know the kind of resources we’ll need to stand up to Josh Hawley, and they’ll use whatever data points they can find from these first few months of our campaign to determine whether we’ll be strong enough.
**So it might only be February, but the stakes are already high.** Hitting this goal means we’ll show everyone — pundits, GOP insiders, and anyone else who’s watching our race — the sheer amount of people power Lucas has behind him.
**So what do you say?[Will you help us prove the strength of our grassroots campaign by adding a donation of $5, $15, or anything at all toward our February end-of-month fundraising goal today?](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=8d60957ae1&e=8095450ef8)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=77384aff6d&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $25](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=634676b46f&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $30](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=7adc2761d3&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $50](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=b91a9f80d0&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $100](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=9ef67dde1c&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $250](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=83caed7d05&e=8095450ef8) [Give another amount](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=5fc1449fb3&e=8095450ef8)
---
With your help, we can defeat Josh Hawley and elect a real warrior for working people to the U.S. Senate next year.
Thanks for all you do,
Emma Dillon
Team Lucas

**[Donate](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=95cff6e4e1&e=8095450ef8)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=10a32a162c&e=8095450ef8&c=0d197e5c3b). Mail us: PO BOX 1240, Independence, MO 64050.

name: Team Cori
subject: Open for some music recs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We’re sharing your favorite Black History Month and Black joy related music!
#
Today’s email is about uplifting some of Team Cori’s favorite Black songs and musicians, but our February fundraising deadline is less than one week away. **[Can you chip in a donation of $5 right now so we can stay on track and meet our goal?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230222.YN0whp&amount=5&refcode=em20230222-2221&t=1&akid=2221%2E1082990%2E4ci_6a)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230222.YN0whp&amount=5&refcode=em20230222-2221&t=2&akid=2221%2E1082990%2E4ci_6a)**
---
Hey,
We’re continuing our share out from your Black History Month recommendations today by sharing some of your favorite songs to celebrate Black Joy.
There were so many options to choose from — from Whitney and Aretha to Nat King Cole and Sam Cooke — we want to make it clear that we aren’t trying to pick favorites here. 😂
Here is a random selection of your favorite songs:
🎵 “We Ready” by Archie Eversole, recommended by Cori Bush
🎵 “Keep Ya Head Up” by 2Pac, recommended by Sunshine in Pennsylvania
🎵 “This Magic Moment” by The Drifters, recommended by Irma in Washington, D.C.
🎵 “Juicy” by The Notorious B.I.G, recommended by Eric in California
🎵 All of Beyoncé’s _Renaissance_ , recommended by Kasele in New York
If you need a pick-me-up today, consider throwing on some of these songs and appreciating the artistry of Black musicians. 💜
Thanks for your support,
Team Cori
P.S. Cori is fighting for working people every day on Capitol Hill. **[Can you chip in $5 today to support our movement and help us reach our February fundraising goal?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230222.YN0whp&amount=5&refcode=em20230222-2221&t=3&akid=2221%2E1082990%2E4ci_6a)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230222.YN0whp&amount=5&refcode=em20230222-2221&t=22&akid=2221%2E1082990%2E4ci_6a)**

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230222?refcode=em20230222-2221-footer&t=23&refcode2=2221_1082990_4ci_6a&akid=2221%2E1082990%2E4ci_6a) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

name: Greg Casar
subject: Supporting workers on strike in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59107605/393215962/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZkMWNiYS1mMmIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PGlHIy6du-2kggWEx4WcITrjyf5BV2c4LZBSN2GxO8I=&emci=f7425c83-f2b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4ffd1cba-f2b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6830379)
Bernie Sanders and I are teaming up to defend workers’ rights in Texas, Peter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59107607/393215964/-803653937?v=MkEf8l8MNMs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZkMWNiYS1mMmIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PGlHIy6du-2kggWEx4WcITrjyf5BV2c4LZBSN2GxO8I=&emci=f7425c83-f2b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4ffd1cba-f2b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6830379)
This past fall, dozens of YouTube Music workers in Austin and across the country filed a petition to create a union. These workers often make $19/hour, even while Google makes billions in profits. In an apparent attempt to retaliate against the union drive, Cognizant, the Google contractor that employs the YouTube workers, issued a “return-to-office mandate.” However, many of the YouTube workers have second jobs as touring musicians, or live outside or Austin, and now face possible termination because of this mandate.
To make matters worse, after the workers went on strike to protest the union-busting, Cognizant doubled-down and has reportedly offshored their work to workers in India.
**Yesterday Senator Bernie Sanders and I sent a letter to Alphabet and Google CEO Sundar Pichai urging him to ensure all Google workers can exercise their right to join a union.** As we said in our letter, _a company with $60 billion in profits last year can afford to treat their workers fairly._
As a long-time labor organizer, I know how important it is to have allies in these fights. That’s why Bernie and I are working to build a movement to deliver better protections, pay, and benefits for workers like those in Austin — from passing the PRO Act, to guaranteeing paid sick and family leave, to strengthening rights of workers to unionize.
Peter, it’s critical that we speak out when companies use their power and size to retaliate against workers trying to unionize.
You can rest assured that Bernie and I will continue to use our voices to speak out against any reported union-busting and ensure that all workers are able to freely exercise their right to join a union and earn a decent wage.
Thank you for having our backs,
— Greg
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59107609/393215966/-1598051274?refcode=em-20230222&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZkMWNiYS1mMmIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PGlHIy6du-2kggWEx4WcITrjyf5BV2c4LZBSN2GxO8I=)
_Congressman Greg Casar
Texas Congressional District 35_

Peter, without an ounce of remorse, House Republicans announced significant cuts to Social Security and Medicare benefits on the horizon.
This could devastate MILLIONS of Americans.
But President Biden refuses to give up — making it clear that he will do everything in his power to stop the GOP’s egregious agenda:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59107594/393215947/-993214491?refcode=em_UTC_PET_GOPthreatSSMedicarepoll_RS_022223_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkZmQxY2JhLWYyYjItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7RKeXGm091UeKFGwbW5THx6lgC2Rgj-Nb4euNx8ryw4=&emci=754bc97e-edb2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4dfd1cba-f2b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16951753)

We can't afford to leave an entire generation behind in the pursuit of green energy products that can't keep up with our reliable fossil fuels that make up nearly half of our domestic energy consumption. Despite our best efforts, renewable energy sources only account for 29% of our energy needs. It is impossible to increase that to 100% without causing skyrocketing costs for consumers. These are just the facts. Minnesota needs relief now. clean_body: We can't allow this! | | | | | It's official, my friend! We have a left-wing climate activist in the Governor's mansion. Rather than lowering taxes during a crippling period of inflation, Walz is focused on pleasing East Coast liberals. Walz has signed an energy bill into law that will cost taxpayers significantly more, making it harder than it already is for so many Americans to pay their bills. With radicals like Ilhan Omar and Tim Walz in leadership, I'm taking a stand for Minnesota families and those who need relief now. We can't afford to leave an entire generation behind in the pursuit of green energy products that can't keep up with our reliable fossil fuels that make up nearly half of our domestic energy consumption. Despite our best efforts, renewable energy sources only account for 29% of our energy needs. It is impossible to increase that to 100% without causing skyrocketing costs for consumers. These are just the facts. Minnesota needs relief now. Thank you, Brad Finstad | | - | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Giffords
subject: It’s infuriating
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

See this?
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230222-1-15&t=1&akid=4295%2E3935704%2EjrY3c-)
We’re less than two months into the year, and our nation has already experienced over 80 mass shootings.
Gun violence is the number one cause of death for kids in America.
Assault weapons were used in seven of the deadliest mass shootings between the years of 2010 to 2020.
Yet one of our nation’s representatives is more interested in making the AR-15—a weapon used to slaughter hundreds of Americans in the last decade—the “National Gun of America.” It’s infuriating.
In Las Vegas, Orlando, Sandy Hook Elementary School, Sutherland Springs, El Paso, Robb Elementary School, Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School, and Aurora all of the perpetrators in these shootings used an assault weapon.
The AR-15 was not promoted as the ultimate expression of the 2nd Amendment until the gun industry politicized it after Sandy Hook, when it was used to rip apart innocent children. Make no mistake—this cruel proposal is offensive to gun owners and non-gun owners alike.
The introduction of this bill is a prime example of what we’re up against: A House majority where extreme factions of the Republican party are more concerned about prioritizing the gun lobby’s desires over the safety of the communities they’ve been elected to represent.
We need your help to cut through the noise. It’s the only way we’ll be able to help pass lifesaving legislation like the Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2023 and block extreme gun lobby-backed bills.
[**So please. Donate $3 today. Do it to help us fight back against extreme legislation like making the AR-15 the National Gun of America.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230222-1-15&t=2&akid=4295%2E3935704%2EjrY3c-)

Jon Tester grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. He lost three fingers on his left hand in a meat grinding accident when he was a kid. He is and always will be a farmer, like his parents and grandparents, and he wears a $12 flat-top haircut from his local barbershop.

He's also the only Democrat elected statewide in Montana, and he balances his service to Montana with full-time work on the farm.

It's tough work, and facing attacks from corporate special interests and dark money super PACs only makes it harder, but Jon's committed to fighting for his neighbors and working families everywhere.

Just like they're doing to Bob, Mitch McConnell and Washington Republicans will throw the entire kitchen sink at Jon in their fight to flip the Senate. More than $70 million was spent in 2018, and we expect this race to be even more expensive.

**[So please, don't wait to step up. Help Jon Tester hit the ground running and defend the Senate majority by chipping in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59108486/393219605/-1789187321?refcode=em23_230222_jntest_fndt_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230222_jntest_fndt_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmY5NjlkOS1mNGIyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KDjsJwCt-VTQWx_s21xsrTSMfQNkupVIPbwnPu19ZD8=)**

clean_body: Bob is joining Democrats across the nation to help Jon hit the ground running. Peter, Who has seven fingers, is a third-generation dirt farmer, and is arguably the most vulnerable Democrat up for re-election in 2024? Montana's own Jon Tester just made his re-election campaign for U.S. Senate official — and Bob is joining Democrats across the nation to help Jon raise $1 million to hit the ground running. Republicans have been running vicious attack ads against Jon for over a month already, and they're just getting started. If we don't have Jon's back now, we could lose the Senate majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Jon Tester grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. He lost three fingers on his left hand in a meat grinding accident when he was a kid. He is and always will be a farmer, like his parents and grandparents, and he wears a $12 flat-top haircut from his local barbershop. He's also the only Democrat elected statewide in Montana, and he balances his service to Montana with full-time work on the farm. It's tough work, and facing attacks from corporate special interests and dark money super PACs only makes it harder, but Jon's committed to fighting for his neighbors and working families everywhere. Just like they're doing to Bob, Mitch McConnell and Washington Republicans will throw the entire kitchen sink at Jon in their fight to flip the Senate. More than $70 million was spent in 2018, and we expect this race to be even more expensive. = Thank you for all that you do, Team Casey Help Bob Casey and Jon Tester defend the Democratic Senate majority. Chip in. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.

They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.

It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate – they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights.**I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 – and I’ll do it again. **
**[_I can’t do it without your support, team. I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.

**And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected. **

It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.
Thanks,

Jon

name: Athena Hollins
subject: Banning “conversion therapy”
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-feb23?refcode=022223 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-feb23?refcode=022223]
Friend,
Earlier this week the Minnesota House passed a bill to ban the dangerous and discredited practice of “conversion therapy”. I authored this bill to ban this harmful practice and make Minnesota a state that treats everyone with the dignity and respect they deserve, but we couldn’t have done it without your support. Friend, will you continue supporting the Minnesota House DFL majority by making a contribution today?

Jenn’s victory represents our first win this cycle, and sends a strong message to the GOP Caucus about their slim majority (that just got slimmer!) Peter, not only did Jenn win her race: she made history doing it. Jenn McClellan is officially the FIRST Black woman to represent Virginia in Congress. | Thank you for all that you do, Peter — in Virginia and across the country. Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She's served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America's ambassador to the United Nations...and she's a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.

Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

In order to build momentum and get Nikki's message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki's team and pitch in a donation today?

Team Haley

| | Peter, There’s no doubt about it: our border is WIDE OPEN to anyone wanting to come into the United States,_including actual terrorists._ Despite knowing that, House Democrats __refuse__ __ to visit the southern border and see the issue first-hand. **_And they’re claiming they had NO IDEA this meeting was taking place._**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d91e514919fb47b6b7d626bfe0b08ff5&_e=lg33ndJQN1o0P-RmFSu3WICsDzVQXYmZpTP-m0nVCjzOSiHivPQ5CFmM-lju12NHWWpu4dS9JyddhZrxukvxrdX7RrSmVkZOoGmAxznX5u0BoGsxabGvEqK8utKUIRxSVidtaD6t5C8DMqJvbU8woXNUGT1gsZcs3QtrWEHFqT7baoHcv3SJVeXKrjPlPzZrF4O_--oLAiCMsMeCL0mvfCpmvh4y4Bl8kJZrsaaVb6tgkuQOP2bTkoU6s8xZntKZQ-u-E1ZN3F9-QKhpiMEhPwaRKmJH_PxwRpDf-MJTCpm656Tql_kD4UVx7W07GIVg93mjkMmk5llbCKWUotlmuBvXpYn8bsj5ZPKv6UBrtwbH3VosZS75ULiKoBtyGfmOkrthCddqXK9qYfFl9CJbFQ%3D%3D)
---
Jerry Nadler lied when he said Democrats weren’t aware of the trip House Republicans planned. They knew about the visit for _three weeks. _ **_Peter, if Democrats ACTUALLY cared about_** _**_literal terrorists_**_** _crossing the border, they would take the time to see the national security threat for themselves._** _[**_Stand with House Republicans and demand border security by rushing in a critical donation now. >>_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d91e514919fb47b6b7d626bfe0b08ff5&_e=lg33ndJQN1o0P-RmFSu3WICsDzVQXYmZpTP-m0nVCjzOSiHivPQ5CFmM-lju12NHWWpu4dS9JyddhZrxukvxrdX7RrSmVkZOoGmAxznX5u0BoGsxabGvEqK8utKUIRxSVidtaD6t5C8DMqJvbU8woXNUGT1gsZcs3QtrWEHFqT7baoHcv3SJVeXKrjPlPzZrF4O_--oLAiCMsMeCL0mvfCpmvh4y4Bl8kJZrsaaVb6tgkuQOP2bTkoU6s8xZntKZDTBpinfB4AqIpN42s5GaAx7c2Tr_TnMEfWrD2SlI1V1W6NA-RKTlhttretpxxC0NLCb8op4GqvcEy1BcXyZPT26o3z5I61kNYpAbdsOk1aGIdKlXydGSZVH_repRM6HgG6Saxe2klVccYBtq1MvQAg%3D%3D)_ Thank you,

CONGRATULATIONS! >>
| **BREAKING: Jennifer McClellan WINS VA-04 Special Election Runoff, shrinking the GOP’s House Majority** **Listen, this is a HUGE victory for Democrats and our fight to take back the House, so we’re sending McClellan a letter from our top grassroots supporters to congratulate her!** [We’re sending this letter to her office at 8 am tomorrow – so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40976?t=6&akid=6495%2E878179%2EYAe3nU) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40976?t=7&akid=6495%2E878179%2EYAe3nU) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40976?t=8&akid=6495%2E878179%2EYAe3nU)

TO: Representative Elect Jennifer McClellan
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS
**_Dear Jennifer McClellan – CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we had when we found out you soared to victory last night!**

This election was absolutely _essential_ for Democrats to win if we want to take back the House in 2024\.

**We know becoming the first Black woman elected to the U.S. House from Virginia was no easy task, but you worked tirelessly to win and we’re so excited to see all that you will accomplish in office.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding victory and to continue to elect incredible House Democrats like you »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40976?t=9&akid=6495%2E878179%2EYAe3nU) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40976?t=10&akid=6495%2E878179%2EYAe3nU) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40976?t=11&akid=6495%2E878179%2EYAe3nU)

I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.
They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.
It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.**
[**I can’t do it without your support, team. **Exciting news, team** : **Democratic candidate Jennifer McClellan just won the first special election of the new year!** Jennifer McClellan is a strong leader who will work to tackle gun violence, take action on climate change, and revitalize the economy. Last night’s special election was an important victory for Democrats — and it also shows that elections aren’t just won on Election Day. It takes _weeks and months_ to knock on doors, share our message, and get folks to the polls. We need to keep up that momentum so Democrats can win _everywhere._ [**Can we count on your donation today to help bring a new generation of leadership to Congress? name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Biden Issues Second Executive Order to “Further” Advance Governmentwide Racial Equity
body:
Although the U.S. has already implemented a governmentwide plan to
advance racial equity and support underserved communities under a 2021
Biden executive order, the president has issued a
second directive to strong arm federal agencies into launching more
initiatives that will further tax Americans.

[alt_text]

[*****]
February 22, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62304&L=28916&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4taXNzdWVzLXNlY29uZC1leGVjdXRpdmUtb3JkZXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=be29379c3e7a6ad10ddc81cf4ef421c9f2f2d726934805c935a4dc2fd51f6992]

Although the U.S. has already implemented a governmentwide plan to
advance racial equity and support underserved communities under a 2021
Biden executive order, the president has issued a
second directive to strong arm federal agencies into launching more
initiatives that will further tax Americans. Under the recently issued
mandate government agencies have 30 days to establish an “Agency
Equity Team” and conduct proactive engagement with members of
underserved communities through culturally and linguistically
appropriate listening sessions. Biden is also creating a White House
Steering Committee on Equity composed of senior officials who will
coordinate the government’s sweeping efforts to promote his leftist
agenda.

[alt_text] [*****] February 22, 2023 [article-image] [] Although the U.S. has already implemented a governmentwide plan to advance racial equity and support underserved communities under a 2021 Biden executive order, the president has issued a second directive to strong arm federal agencies into launching more initiatives that will further tax Americans. Under the recently issued mandate government agencies have 30 days to establish an “Agency Equity Team” and conduct proactive engagement with members of underserved communities through culturally and linguistically appropriate listening sessions. Biden is also creating a White House Steering Committee on Equity composed of senior officials who will coordinate the government’s sweeping efforts to promote his leftist agenda.
