name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.ORAjBo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1003&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]Senator Jon Tester of Montana smiling on his farm

Derek, I have an exciting announcement and I want you to be the
first to know: I’m officially running for reelection here in Montana.

I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t
done yet.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.ORAjBo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]If you’re with me, please split a donation between Adam Schiff’s
campaign and mine right now to become a Founding Donor. If I’m going to
win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the start.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Jon Tester and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.QmeFGH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.tHcmdu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.sqdWff&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.agFRKm&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.1QkNEs&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.ORAjBo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the
differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn
proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my
grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.

They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our
work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.

It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in
their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads
attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right
now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win
tough fights. I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red
state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.ORAjBo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]I can’t do it without your support, Derek. Can I count on
you to step up and become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign today
so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Jon Tester and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.QmeFGH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.tHcmdu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.sqdWff&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.agFRKm&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.1QkNEs&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1016&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2023_abs_em_tester.ORAjBo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_IN30_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt
farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work
for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and
ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States
Senate.

And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected.

It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United
States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m
grateful to have you by my side through it all.

Thanks,

Jon

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1001&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1002&akid=1835%2E5257348%2EKzAHgh ]Privacy Policy

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Yesterday, liberal Judge Janet Protasiewicz finished with 46.4% of the vote. The two Republicans received a combined 46.1%. When you add 7.5% a second Democrat got, you see if we continue to fund and support Protasiewicz, we absolutely have a majority to elect her in April.
body:
Great election results yesterday!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc08669c-8f50-4f59-b1a7-1a304894edb8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **YOU. DID. IT.** **_You saw the importance of the races on election day yesterday, stood up, made your voice heard and we had another huge day for democracy._** _**First, Jennifer McClellan won the congressional seat in Northern Virginia by an overwhelming margin** \--we've successfully shaved a seat off the House majority of Marjorie Taylor Greene's pet, Kevin McCarthy._ _You also delivered a stunning result in Wisconsin, where an amazing liberal (judicial races are "non-partisan") not only won, but beat her two GOP opponents combined in the open primary for a Supreme Court seat that determines if MAGA devotees or those devoted to the rule of law have final say over this ultimate swing state's electoral votes in 2024._ **_Liberal Judge Janet Protasiewicz finished with 46.4% of the vote. The two Republicans received a combined 46.1%. When you add 7.5% a second Democrat got, you see if we continue to fund and support Protasiewicz, we absolutely have a majority to elect her in April._** **_[Celebrate our win by getting Judge Janet Protasiewicz off to the strongest start possible in beating this cave-dwelling bigot, Kelly. Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to ensure we win the seat and prevent disaster?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T937a66bb-49d6-4de6-bd9a-e4551a0254dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80c6dbc1-a09c-418f-9b69-510ec63d4acf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _**Also, the Republican who won, friend of Trump and far-more-extreme, Daniel Kelly, clarified the race.** _ _This will help explain:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbcb20a16-0d4c-4861-be2a-50738c436940/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_You didn't read it wrong. A guy who wants to be on the highest court in Wisconsin compared Social Security to slavery. Attacked gay rights openly and derisively._** **_[So, let's celebrate our win by getting Judge Janet Protasiewicz off to the strongest start possible in beating this cave-dwelling bigot, Kelly. Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to ensure we win the seat and prevent disaster?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3beb0808-5ab6-45fe-8fdb-695593eabac3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** _It's one of the best investments you'll ever make in both a great human being, and democracy._ Cliff

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38f59b40-3ea8-46a6-b784-b6d897603d63/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Chair Jaime Harrison
subject: Reserve your 2023 membership card now →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Investments right now make a huge difference in funding our party’s work. Everything we do is only possible because of grassroots donations. | |
---
Derek -- Democrats nationwide made enormous progress last year: passing critical legislation like the _Inflation Reduction Act_ and the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , flipping gubernatorial and state legislature seats from red to blue across the country, and holding our Senate majority. That was thanks to this grassroots team. Believe me when I say _**we could not have accomplished what we did in 2022 without dedicated Democratic Party members.**_ Right now, we’re preparing to continue fighting back against the GOP and to elect Democrats, but we need you to make a commitment to supporting our party. **Democratic Party members have helped make incredible progress this year. I’m personally asking you to chip in $10 and become an official Democratic member for 2023.**
[ ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJTuIqr9HOMmVZlOQ_CFcw4_69kXWykL_CX2TNtPJXDdHB1_aAm5EwkLkYojc28nCEnenO0MgKTXcQU9fTdjP6Eo9gmZ1UEKhURcB4BKawxDtNAene9MpwBikvCZopZHbZHDEkhyDPq0SF7LsLZwlw3rnZhdX5td2Yl9aFNe57GA4VyIszcgPa6tFnBzx75QxKQnCVBYnBP03IXHlrlQwBYUeJDyNFdjs0aNmTE4EGsLCeKLSrio5ltLQIkv1Bdblc2TAmSrzruW8FsPUhQoepjEZPzUcK1IAp9qKAI2zWlG1qj0CrMb_LCGImIptjDv2s2JPj5l4lzX2bwXqNT9Fxv1yI1ch1JsdmvGrape5q5W0KfQLVAc77erxZbPG5GQGqXk_m_sOBDVT9MJOeu2xc-PJg2jjY-aj5GUp1oaZfUis/3tx/gWTYgxPDSayFoo1nb2CRMw/h0/GJ0EubHp75cry-zDyBUsrTOexNc6EzR1-2C-9hTZ1eE)
[**GET YOURS**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJTuIqr9HOMmVZlOQ_CFcw4_69kXWykL_CX2TNtPJXDdHB1_aAm5EwkLkYojc28nCEnenO0MgKTXcQU9fTdjP6Eo9gmZ1UEKhURcB4BKawxDu0eR8-hHWHteCCNfiKOzha0P9JbwrmMBCtV60ovyx-tU_ReDWGkkOkvT0NnLfpN0254R-PZx4D6vbUh_bibQ7dl_GuLmqsfCq5Udp_bra56ONlziABsau8bWw8RO8fEEwiEuRsFGvZIDB_rx6YCkdG-qPwsvtVRv8TnfhF4kxEZsy3TWOe4Yz3i5j1-U0AK0SzUEjCLANKuBwgyOblw5UG75gRvA0VcPVKPDGLvH__JNr6wlFMARJPC3GfxWreu5QP9okI-e7L_kDZgPOcCVBB8K3zaRVNme968bQSsSGMTppOhB2pAVthSQ_fuTIx3IE/3tx/gWTYgxPDSayFoo1nb2CRMw/h1/VbN9j5CTAXe01iYttx8CtIm9fpZwkc-jtptdvynK9rE)

name: Jon Tester
subject: my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59111048/393228744/1999187487?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230222-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJiMjk1ZS0wMGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Np3VO_lA9982Z-WhNFVNvMsdA2VzYGR9VIakVeB-8aE=)
---
Peter, can I tell you a little story about me?

I grew up on my family’s farm and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.

When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor.

Here’s why I’m telling you this: just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, **my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.**

With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.

**I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country.**

[_**I’m officially running for reelection, so here’s the part where I ask: Can you become a Founding Donor of my campaign to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59111049/393228745/1999187487?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230222-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJiMjk1ZS0wMGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Np3VO_lA9982Z-WhNFVNvMsdA2VzYGR9VIakVeB-8aE=)
| [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59111050/393228746/1999187487?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230222-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJiMjk1ZS0wMGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Np3VO_lA9982Z-WhNFVNvMsdA2VzYGR9VIakVeB-8aE=)
---
You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.

I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign.

Thanks again,

Jon

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Virginians just made history!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59111580/393230712/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230222JM_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODY3MDkyOC0wM2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tiR0rLduxQgD8WMiB63gqjXtqz4zyA4xDJg0QBAokMo=)
---
Last night, the people of Virginia's 4th District made history by electing the first Black woman to ever represent our Commonwealth in Congress.

**I'm so excited by the resounding victory of my friend Jennifer McClellan, and I can't wait to officially welcome her to the House.**

Having served alongside her in the Virginia General Assembly, I can tell you that she's a tireless advocate for her constituents, a champion for equal justice and opportunity, and someone who knows how to get results (she was a driving force in the Assembly behind landmark laws on voting rights, reproductive choice, and climate change). She's going to prove _very fast_ to be an amazing Representative.

[**Will you sign your name to help me congratulate Congresswoman-elect McClellan?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59111581/393230713/825147683?ms=EM_PET_230222JM_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230222JM_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODY3MDkyOC0wM2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tiR0rLduxQgD8WMiB63gqjXtqz4zyA4xDJg0QBAokMo=&emci=1979b1a0-f1b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b8670928-03b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) [Sign Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59111582/393230714/825147683?ms=EM_PET_230222JM_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230222JM_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODY3MDkyOC0wM2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tiR0rLduxQgD8WMiB63gqjXtqz4zyA4xDJg0QBAokMo=&emci=1979b1a0-f1b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b8670928-03b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) I'm looking forward to showing Jennifer McClellan just how enthusiastic folks throughout the Commonwealth are about her victory.

– Jennifer Wexton | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59111583/393230715/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230222JM_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODY3MDkyOC0wM2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tiR0rLduxQgD8WMiB63gqjXtqz4zyA4xDJg0QBAokMo=)****

name: Team AOC
subject: Guns in the Capitol
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The one thing the GOP has done with control of the House.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230222-3924-header&t=1&akid=3924%2E2526796%2EJsjb4q)
Republicans have controlled the House of Representatives for seven weeks and haven’t passed a single bill.
What they _have_ done — rather than lowering the cost of groceries or capping corporate price gouging — is repeal a rule that prohibits Members of Congress from bringing guns into committee hearing rooms.
[It's never been more clear that the GOP is more concerned with their far-right agenda than improving the lives of everyday people. If you can support AOC’s fight for what matters most to working families, can you chip in $5HPC today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230222.KfP9rx&refcode=em20230222-3924-P_FND_MMF_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3924%2E2526796%2EJsjb4q)
While guns are prohibited in the House and Senate chambers and adjacent areas, Democrats installed metal detectors after the January 6th insurrection to ensure the rules were being followed by the new crop of far-right extremists elected to office.
In the same vein, after Rep. Lauren Boebert joined the Natural Resources Committee in January 2021, the committee quickly added a written amendment to their rules that guns were expressly forbidden from its hearing room.1
Then this term, within days of Republicans finally selecting a Speaker of the House, the metal detectors were gone.2
And when AOC asked the new Republican Chair of the Natural Resources Committee whether or not he believed firearms should be allowed in committee, he said simply, ‘I believe it’s up to every member of the House to follow the House rules.’
[While Republicans are more worried about protecting guns than people, AOC is keeping up the pressure on accountability for corporate price gouging, divestment from fossil fuels, and health care for all. If AOC can count on your support today, please chip in here →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230222.KfP9rx&refcode=em20230222-3924-P_FND_MMF_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3924%2E2526796%2EJsjb4q)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230222.KfP9rx&refcode=em20230222-3924-P_FND_MMF_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3924%2E2526796%2EJsjb4q)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [NBC News: Republicans quash Democratic ban on carrying guns in a congressional committee room](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16846?t=23&akid=3924%2E2526796%2EJsjb4q)
2 - [The Hill: Lawmakers clash over gun prohibition in Natural Resources committee](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16847?t=24&akid=3924%2E2526796%2EJsjb4q)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230222?refcode=em20230222-3924-P_FND_MMF_OPP&t=25&refcode2=3924_2526796_Jsjb4q&akid=3924%2E2526796%2EJsjb4q)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230222-3924-P_FND_MMF_OPP&t=26&akid=3924%2E2526796%2EJsjb4q)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=27&akid=3924%2E2526796%2EJsjb4q) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=28&akid=3924%2E2526796%2EJsjb4q) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=29&akid=3924%2E2526796%2EJsjb4q)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The Democratic Party has a problem.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, did you see
this recent headline from Politico?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/128093?refcode=em20230222-27663&t=1001&akid=27663%2E1203867%2Ee_6rW_ ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/128093?refcode=em20230222-27663&t=1002&akid=27663%2E1203867%2Ee_6rW_ ][IMG]

It’s time for the Democratic Party to wake up and realize that when we go
all in for the next generation of leaders — leaders who actually represent
their communities — we can win bigger and better than ever before.

That’s why we exist, and we need your help so we can keep building our own
infrastructure to help our candidates succeed outside of the political
establishment. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/128093?refcode=em20230222-27663&t=1003&akid=27663%2E1203867%2Ee_6rW_ ]Can you chip in $3, or anything at all,
to power our work today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/128093?refcode=em20230222-27663&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=27663%2E1203867%2Ee_6rW_ ]Contribute $3

From day one at Justice Democrats, we’ve known the Democratic Party has a
problem. The establishment wing protects its own entrenched incumbents and
constantly underestimates the new, diverse, committed leaders who are
ready to help revitalize the party.

We recruit and support working class candidates from all backgrounds who
will run for office — candidates like Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush — that
the Democratic establishment would never take a chance on.

People said they would never win. Now Jamaal & Cori are in Congress,
proving the establishment wrong and using the opportunity to rebuild trust
with voters who don’t see themselves represented in the Democratic Party.

We don’t take any of this work lightly. We recruit candidates and ask them
to go all in for the movement. In turn, we go all in for them. We believe
they can win and we do everything in our power to make it happen — by
organizing from day one through to election day. But that takes major
resources, and we don’t have establishment money at our disposal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/128093?refcode=em20230222-27663&t=1023&akid=27663%2E1203867%2Ee_6rW_ ]Peter,
you’re here, reading this email, because
you believe our political system needs to change. Can you chip in
$3 to sustain our movement and help us elect transformative
leaders to do just that?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=27663%2E1203867%2Ee_6rW_ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=27663%2E1203867%2Ee_6rW_ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230222-27663-footer&t=1026&refcode2=27663_1203867_e_6rW_&akid=27663%2E1203867%2Ee_6rW_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=27663%2E1203867%2Ee_6rW_

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Pekau Hires Big Campaign Donor Who Also Donated to Lightfoot
body:
In a strange turn of events, embattled Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot and Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau share something special: the same big donor.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/022e438ae690/alert-pekau-hires-big-campaign-donor-who-also-donated-to-lightfoot?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Mayor Keith Pekau Playing Favorites, Hires Big Campaign Donor Who Also Donated to Lori Lightfoot, to Develop Orland Park Land Deal Worth $253M (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/mayor-keith-pekau-playing-favorites-hires-big-campaign-donor-who-also-donated-to-lightfoot-to-develop-orland-park-land-deal-worth-253m.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

It pays to be friends with Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, literally, as one local realty firm has discovered, when last March, Pekau and the village board voted in favor of signing a six-figure consulting agreement with one of the mayor’s biggest donors to develop village-owned property along one of Orland Park’s busiest corridors.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/mayor-keith-pekau-playing-favorites-hires-big-campaign-donor-who-also-donated-to-lightfoot-to-develop-orland-park-land-deal-worth-253m.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau presiding over a village board meeting. (Source: WGN-TV)

Edwards Realty, a longtime supporter and campaign contributor to both Pekau’s mayoral and congressional campaigns, was hired in March of 2021 to consult (https://www.chicagotribune.com/suburbs/daily-southtown/ct-sta-orland-park-state-of-village-st-0526-20210525-k53l67wb5rewvfc7kwprc7rze4-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) the mayor and village board on ways to develop Orland Park’s Main Street Triangle property.

The Memorandum of Understanding and consulting agreement
signed (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1-9RYb1XD2SpcuJ_aCHA5Sh3DZ-GgvgLk/view?usp=sharing&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) by Pekau and Edwards Realty president Ramzi Hassan, a longtime friend and close ally of the mayor, included a $10,000 a month retainer for twelve months.

In announcing the partnership between the village and one of the mayor’s biggest campaign contributors, Pekau
stated (https://patch.com/illinois/evanston/board-chooses-local-realty-company-further-develop-triangle?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“Being a local developer and Orland Park resident, Edwards Realty Company understands what will make this project successful in the eyes of residents.”

In response, Hassan expressed excitement about the new project that included a lucrative consulting deal for his company,
stating (https://patch.com/illinois/evanston/board-chooses-local-realty-company-further-develop-triangle?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“We have been excited about this project from Day 1 and look forward to working closely with the village to develop the Downtown Main Street Triangle site.”

The land development deal is estimated to cost around
$253 million (https://www.chicagotribune.com/suburbs/daily-southtown/ct-sta-orland-park-triangle-development-st-1125-20221124-qspwiexn65hghk6uptq33jdqtq-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , and the village is expected to share around $50 million.

In November of 2022, the village board voted to
reimburse (https://www.chicagotribune.com/suburbs/daily-southtown/ct-sta-orland-park-triangle-development-st-1125-20221124-qspwiexn65hghk6uptq33jdqtq-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Edwards Realty up to $1 million in potential costs as it related to the development project, and could assist Hassan in the purchase of the village-owned land.

In 2020, Edwards Realty sponsored a Pekau for Mayor golf outing, tweeting a photo from their official account of Hassan in front his sponsorship sign.
https://twitter.com/edwardsrealtyco/status/1300938721957679106?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1300938721957679106%7Ctwgr%5E167f1d47651c697ee57e87db9b4524b7a8e41cf8%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.illinoisreview.com%2Fillinoisreview%2F2023%2F02%2Fmayor-keith-pekau-playing-favorites-hires-big-campaign-donor-who-also-donated-to-lightfoot-to-develop-orland-park-land-deal-worth-253m.html&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

In 2021, the Edwards Realty Facebook page posted a news story about Pekau, writing,

“Thank you Keith Pekau for your leadership. We look forward to continued collaboration and progress on the Triangle project...we are excited to bring our unique perspective on the area to create a leading development for the benefit and enjoyment of the community.”
https://www.facebook.com/EdwardsRealtyCo/posts/4038597839509641?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

During Pekau’s congressional campaign in 2022, the Federal Elections Commission website shows Hassan and employees of Edwards Realty donating $15,400 (https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/?cycle=2022&data_type=processed&committee_id=C00794479&contributor_employer=edwards&two_year_transaction_period=2022&line_number=F3-11AI&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to his failed bid for Congress.

Hassan also maxed out his personal campaign contribution to Pekau’s congressional account,
donating (https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/?cycle=2022&data_type=processed&committee_id=C00794479&contributor_employer=edwards&two_year_transaction_period=2022&line_number=F3-11AI&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) $5,800.

Hassan was also listed as the primary sponsor of Pekau’s boat cruise during his primary congressional campaign.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/mayor-keith-pekau-playing-favorites-hires-big-campaign-donor-who-also-donated-to-lightfoot-to-develop-orland-park-land-deal-worth-253m.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Edwards Realty president Ramzi Hassan is listed as the primary sponsor of Mayor Peaku’s boat cruise fundraiser in June, 2022. (Source: Instagram)

In 2019, Hassan donated (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByAllContributions.aspx?ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&txtLastOnlyName=VPOJ9GWMYlby0qiS9zAjdQ%3d%3d&ddlLastOnlyNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&txtFirstName=AhOf2YTJ89yCIxT0wQkR7Q%3d%3d&ddlFirstNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) $1,000 to Keith for Mayor.

But Hassan doesn’t just donate to his friend Pekau.

On December 27, 2022, he made a $5,000 personal contribution to Chicago
Mayor Lori Lightfoot (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByAllContributions.aspx?ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&txtLastOnlyName=VPOJ9GWMYlby0qiS9zAjdQ%3d%3d&ddlLastOnlyNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&txtFirstName=AhOf2YTJ89yCIxT0wQkR7Q%3d%3d&ddlFirstNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , who is trailing in polls (https://twitter.com/cbschicago/status/1626076494345674752?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) as she struggles to keep her job as mayor.
https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByAllContributions.aspx?ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&txtLastOnlyName=VPOJ9GWMYlby0qiS9zAjdQ%3d%3d&ddlLastOnlyNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&txtFirstName=AhOf2YTJ89yCIxT0wQkR7Q%3d%3d&ddlFirstNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
On Dec. 27, 2022, Edwards Realty president and friend of Mayor Pekau contributed $5,000 to Mayor Lori Lightfoot’s campaign. (Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website)

Under Lightfoot, homicides (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/pandemic-violence-lightfoots-record-crime-forefront-chicago-mayoral-election?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in Chicago have skyrocketed; carjackings are on the rise; she remains critical of the police; and residents and businesses are fleeing the city in droves.

In a city known for its “pay-to-play” style of politics, perhaps Hassan is exploring potential deals in Chicago – hence, a $5,000 donation to a wildly unpopular mayor.

But if Hassan is looking to replicate his suburban success in downtown Chicago, his campaign donations to power-hungry mayors will attract the attention and questions from more than just the press.
https://youtu.be/8rzstveU9VQ?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Amy Erkenswick, school board candidate for Dist. 200 joins Editor-In-Chief Mark Vargas on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas" on AM560 The Answer to discuss her inspiration for running (Feb. 19, 2023).
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=76dfe928ae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_22_08_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-76dfe928ae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

============================================================

clean_body: In a strange turn of events, embattled Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot and Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau share something special: the same big donor.

name: Letitia James
subject: Asking for your priorities, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
| | **FEBRUARY 2023 PRIORITIES SURVEY**
---
NAME: Peter
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard
---
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59112019/393232442/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk990-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg1ZDVhMC0wNGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amBvlVgMA4PSOzlGhc1dWBR3Pn3E6eDHAUOqR2W4ydQ=&emci=e55e19b8-05b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=1b85d5a0-04b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.

I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. I received my full education, kindergarten through college, from the New York City public school system. And, throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were directly affecting me and my family.

**You might be wondering why I’m telling you this, and the answer is simple: I know what it is like to feel voiceless.**
That’s why, when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to never let another person feel the same way – and that’s why I created my priorities survey.

**[Peter, I’m proud to put the people’s priorities first, but to do that effectively, I need to know what your concerns are. So please, will you take my February Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59112020/393232443/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk990-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg1ZDVhMC0wNGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amBvlVgMA4PSOzlGhc1dWBR3Pn3E6eDHAUOqR2W4ydQ=&emci=e55e19b8-05b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=1b85d5a0-04b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59112021/393232444/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk990-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg1ZDVhMC0wNGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amBvlVgMA4PSOzlGhc1dWBR3Pn3E6eDHAUOqR2W4ydQ=&emci=e55e19b8-05b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=1b85d5a0-04b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
I know that Democrats were able to win big in the 2022 elections – but our work is nowhere near complete. This year, we are still fighting for abortion to be safe and accessible to all, we are still fighting against voter suppression laws that are eerily similar to those seen during the Jim Crow era, and we are still losing too many loved ones to gun violence.

Peter, I vow to never stop fighting until all people who live in America are protected, but I need your help. With the political landscape drastically different today than it was four months ago, I need to know which fights to prioritize this year – and that’s where you come in.

**I’m looking for 1,000 fearless fighters to step up now and complete my survey before midnight, but it looks like I’m still missing your response, Peter. So please:[Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59112022/393232445/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk990-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg1ZDVhMC0wNGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amBvlVgMA4PSOzlGhc1dWBR3Pn3E6eDHAUOqR2W4ydQ=&emci=e55e19b8-05b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=1b85d5a0-04b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59112023/393232446/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk990-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg1ZDVhMC0wNGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amBvlVgMA4PSOzlGhc1dWBR3Pn3E6eDHAUOqR2W4ydQ=&emci=e55e19b8-05b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=1b85d5a0-04b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard.

Letitia
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/0_qpfjczsECwUbLJUZRAAg2?unsubscribedata=4xxrlEjtQYmNmzXCaTv5Vk2fb5LI4qWasZOLKfoPbP%2FWCBGRqEDdo4i1S47%2BMZvr1ISs0HG7DraKMQCfUkpmWeyW9Hgyzr38654aZLmQskebJcqwSEeOsLTQA4yozpEgzvrVuzY%2BJIQRdi%2FPUzGTVGFzn6dFyADpaeThm%2BL3y0s9xXFL4aHY0BVLGsV3mH0Ubjagved6KSFQf%2BTK7LFCg9lpJhFLQ1nCTrzeYZ41Jtru28pDr6lWpIEi2Td5YVqBS15LYzbClc%2BCSzCXbfxtzIhKbpT4EYCCI%2FiWRR5SL%2FqfIm2XCB0%2F4NMb0e%2Bo7Th804UDTudzoVSHpn%2FoQyad3ijudH7brUNN5ORs18H%2Ftzxxl%2FueVZAfCMfaJklkrcpzOsx%2B8sTNVRkXKF3rP%2F8CqYPuxGj2bpkByRmlDa2rd4xP7IBumzYGrXiIbFZvaGC6) James for NY
PO Box 476
New York, NY 10034

name: MTG Alert
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene calls for a Civil War?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Honestly, no.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends,
All the time, people ask me if becoming a U.S. Senator is a dream come true.
And honestly, my answer is no.
When I was growing up, I never dreamt that anything like this was possible.
But now that I’m here, I promise that I will not take a single day for granted.
I promise to keep fighting to make that dream possible for future generations.
Because the American Dream has never been about passive participation. It’s made possible by those who work for it and by those willing to defend and expand it.
It’s because of the people who came before me that the first-generation son of a short order cook from Jalisco and a housekeeper from Chihuahua is now serving in the United States Senate.
And it’s because of those who will come after me that I will never stop fighting to make the American Dream accessible for everyone.
I’m one of the few U.S. Senators who still has young children at home. So when we talk about the future of this country — and frankly, when it comes to climate change, the future of our planet — it’s not in the abstract. I’m thinking of my kids and their generation.
But here is the truth:
**I cannot do it alone. Nobody can.**
We’re facing a Republican Party — with a majority in the House — that wants to cut Social Security and Medicare, pass voter suppression laws across the country, and puts gun lobby profits over the safety of our children and communities.
And the ONLY way we’re going to be able to take them on and make the American Dream a reality for all of us if we do it _together_.
[**So please, consider making a $5, $10, or $20 contribution to my campaign today so I can keep fighting to make the American Dream a reality for ALL of us.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-feb23.sxVlPs&refcode=em230222-1-180&t=1&akid=1193%2E159979%2EhCmyUx)
Thank you for being in this fight with me.
Alex Padilla
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-feb23.sxVlPs&refcode=em230222-1-180&t=2&akid=1193%2E159979%2EhCmyUx)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1193%2E159979%2EhCmyUx)

clean_body: 🇺🇸 📖 🏆 | Hi friend, In case you have your doubts, I wanted to lay out Jim Banks’s plan for you when he gets to the U.S. Senate: 🇺🇸 Save America from the Radical Left. → 🏦 Unleash the American economy. → 💸 Stop reckless government spending. → 🧱 Secure our Southern Border. → ⚠️ Prioritize national defense. → 🪖 Support our veterans → 🚓 Back the Blue. → 🗳️ Secure our elections. → 🤱 Defend Life. → ❌ Oppose wokeness in schools. → ⛹🏼♀️ Keep boys out of girls’ sports. → | Feel free to let us know which issue matters most to you! name: Working Families Party
subject: Abortion and democracy are on the ballot in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
The stakes could not be higher. | | | Peter — One of the most important elections of 2023 isn’t a Senate or Congressional race — it’s an election for a swing seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. Last night, Judge Janet Protasiewicz, who campaigned on defending abortion rights and democracy, secured the most votes in the primary for the decisive seat on Wisconsin’s highest court. Now she’ll face off against Daniel Kelly in the general election, an anti-abortion former justice who advised Republicans on a “fake elector” scheme in an attempt to overturn the 2020 presidential election.1 **In a state that could determine the fate of the 2024 presidential election, it’s imperative that we stop an election denier from becoming the deciding vote on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.** But we know Republican megadonors are prepared to spend big to maintain their majority in what will be a five-week sprint. With the election coming up on April 4th, we need to get to work right now if we’re going to raise the resources to fight back against Republican big money attacks by making sure working people show up at the polls. **[Will you rush a donation of $10 now to help us mobilize voters in Wisconsin? clean_body: The stakes could not be higher. | | | Peter — One of the most important elections of 2023 isn’t a Senate or Congressional race — it’s an election for a swing seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. Last night, Judge Janet Protasiewicz, who campaigned on defending abortion rights and democracy, secured the most votes in the primary for the decisive seat on Wisconsin’s highest court. Now she’ll face off against Daniel Kelly in the general election, an anti-abortion former justice who advised Republicans on a “fake elector” scheme in an attempt to overturn the 2020 presidential election.1 In a state that could determine the fate of the 2024 presidential election, it’s imperative that we stop an election denier from becoming the deciding vote on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. But we know Republican megadonors are prepared to spend big to maintain their majority in what will be a five-week sprint. With the election coming up on April 4th, we need to get to work right now if we’re going to raise the resources to fight back against Republican big money attacks by making sure working people show up at the polls. The stakes of this election could not be higher. The Wisconsin Supreme Court is set to decide in the coming year on whether to allow heavily gerrymandered maps drawn by Republicans to go forward, as well as on the legality of an abortion ban that has been on the state’s books since before the Civil War. Conservatives have held the majority on the court for the last 15 years. But with one conservative retiring this year, we have a huge opportunity to flip the court and elect a pro-choice, pro-voting rights justice as the deciding vote. This election is gearing up to be one of the most watched — and most expensive — of 2023. That’s why we are getting to work right now, reaching out to voters in Wisconsin and ensuring they know the stakes of this election. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , NBC News , Feb. 21, 2023. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Rick Scott
subject: I’m setting the record straight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | Joe Biden, Democrats, and some leaders of the Washington establishment have made a lot of false claims about me and my Rescue America plan over the past few weeks.

_Now, it’s time to set the record straight._

In my plan, I proposed that we sunset federal programs every five years, so Congress is forced to review the ridiculous spending programs, analyze if they are working or not, and reauthorize the ones that are. It’s common sense to everyone except the politicians, bureaucrats, and lobbyists who get rich off the government gravy train that’s led to $32 trillion in debt.

But that plank of my Rescue America plan was obviously not intended to include entitlement programs such as Medicare and Social Security- programs that hard-working people have paid into their entire lives - or the funds dedicated to our national security.

I have never supported cutting Social Security or Medicare, ever. But you know who has? _**Joe Biden.**_
* In 1975, Joe Biden proposed sunsetting all federal programs every four years.
* In 1984, Joe Biden proposed freezing all federal spending, including Medicare and Social Security benefits.
* In 1985, Biden suggested freezing all federal spending for two years.
* In 1995, Biden said “When I argued that we should freeze federal spending, I meant Social Security as well. I meant Medicare and Medicaid. I meant veterans' benefits. I meant every single solitary thing in the government.”

The media is doing what they do - covering for Joe Biden and lying about Republicans. But facts are facts, and I'm doing what I can to set the record straight.
**With the media and the radical Left on my tail, I need every grassroots American who is ready to RESCUE AMERICA to stand with me and hold Joe Biden accountable for his lies.**
[**Join me today so we can HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE and get to work to RESCUE AMERICA from the DC establishment. clean_body: | | | Peter, | | Joe Biden, Democrats, and some leaders of the Washington establishment have made a lot of false claims about me and my Rescue America plan over the past few weeks. Now, it’s time to set the record straight. In my plan, I proposed that we sunset federal programs every five years, so Congress is forced to review the ridiculous spending programs, analyze if they are working or not, and reauthorize the ones that are. It’s common sense to everyone except the politicians, bureaucrats, and lobbyists who get rich off the government gravy train that’s led to $32 trillion in debt. But that plank of my Rescue America plan was obviously not intended to include entitlement programs such as Medicare and Social Security- programs that hard-working people have paid into their entire lives - or the funds dedicated to our national security. I have never supported cutting Social Security or Medicare, ever. But you know who has? Joe Biden. In 1975, Joe Biden proposed sunsetting all federal programs every four years. In 1984, Joe Biden proposed freezing all federal spending, including Medicare and Social Security benefits. In 1985, Biden suggested freezing all federal spending for two years. In 1995, Biden said “When I argued that we should freeze federal spending, I meant Social Security as well. I meant Medicare and Medicaid. I meant veterans' benefits. I meant every single solitary thing in the government.” The media is doing what they do - covering for Joe Biden and lying about Republicans. But facts are facts, and I'm doing what I can to set the record straight. With the media and the radical Left on my tail, I need every grassroots American who is ready to RESCUE AMERICA to stand with me and hold Joe Biden accountable for his lies. | | Thank you, Rick Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. **We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)

---
|

**Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!****99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.****Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**
---

Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives. get involved please emailmailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact | | | | | | | | | | | Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.1. Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures(Completed November 23rd, 2022)2. After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.(Completed January 20th, 2023)3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this. tel:+19078028116 | Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.Rank Choice creates division and bitterness. mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter | | PAID FOR BY ALASKANS FOR HONEST ELECTIONS. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. | | Alaskans For Honest Elections 2521 E. Mtn Village Dr Ste B #904 Wasilla, AK USA

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: An update on SCOWIS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter — I have some big news to share with you: **Today, I am endorsing Janet Protasiewicz for the Wisconsin Supreme Court.** Janet is a community leader who firmly believes in upholding our constitutional rights and protecting our democracy from radical right-wing extremists. This April, we have the opportunity to change the trajectory of Wisconsin’s Supreme Court. We can protect reproductive rights, defend voting rights, and keep our elected leaders from gerrymandering for their own political gain. **The people of Wisconsin deserve a court that follows the law, gives every case a fair hearing, and protects our fundamental rights — not one that injects right-wing extremism into its rulings.** A big win in April would mean putting an end to a conservative-ruled Supreme Court that has cared more about advancing a political agenda than upholding our laws. Janet is the candidate who will restore the integrity of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and leave unjust political biases out of our judicial body. Now, it’s time for us to come together and stand behind her. **[So Peter, will you join me in supporting Janet Protasiewicz by splitting a donation between us today? Any amount you can afford today will make a big difference for her campaign ahead of the April 4th election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59113056/393236422/-861602873?refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UyNWFlYi0wYWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e6xOHfD7lBLD73XB5E-r1PD0JO3a3_c1SBPI4niTF8M=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Janet Protasiewicz and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59113057/393236423/-861602873?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20230222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UyNWFlYi0wYWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e6xOHfD7lBLD73XB5E-r1PD0JO3a3_c1SBPI4niTF8M=)

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Biden Challenges Putin
body:
The White House denies involvement in pipeline sabotage. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qhulrky-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Wednesday!**
## **Here are some recent articles shared by CaucusRoom members. **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-j/) **Biden Challenges Putin** Biden [**challenged Russian President Vladimir Putin to "end the war" against Ukraine**, ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-t/)and warned that the U.S. and its allies around the world will continue to support Ukraine **Another Train Derailment** **[Yet another train derailed in the Midwest](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-i/)** in Gothenburg, Nebraska. Luckily, this train wasn't carrying hazardous materials. **Northern Border Overwhelmed** US Border Patrol officials have [**issued an appeal for agents to volunteer for redeployment to part of the northern border** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-d/)that is being overwhelmed by an increase of migrants illegally entering from Canada. **Buttigieg Will Finally Visit Ohio** Pete Buttigieg revealed **[that he will finally pay a visit to East Palestine, Ohio](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-h/)** \- nearly three weeks after a Norfolk Southern freight train derailed earlier this month. **Bidenski?** **[Biden told the President of Poland he wanted to add 'ski' to the end of his name](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-k/)** as a kid because he grew up around so many Polish people. _Add this to the list of weird things he has said._ **WH Denies Pipeline Sabotage** The White House's John Kirby hit the airwaves on Sunday and [**renewed strong denials of any U.S. involvement in the sabotage of Russia 's Nord Stream pipeline.**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-u/)

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-o/)!**
* Biden gets a **[performance review](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-x/).**
* Baby gets**[what baby wants](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-m/).**
* This guy**[ruins everything](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-c/).**
* **Yep,[this sums it up](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhulrky-trhiujldw-q/).**
